name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Big Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley Congressional Committee 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [A Congressman for California](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzior0Ywq_9kD3RLRDsWP8yxAUU9Vuchb_mOYKyEurSRsArQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_21&n=1) I'm running for the United States Congress. Thank you for all your encouragement and invaluable feedback. [You can donate to the campaign here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G1r99J7kXgFJVypvzcyAukn&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_21&n=2). As your Representative, I'll fight Biden and Pelosi's radical agenda just as hard as I’ve fought Newsom and the Supermajority. I’ll use the platform of Congressman from California to keep our movement growing – to get our state _and_ country back on track. The campaign is starting later than usual, as they just finished mapping the new districts. That means we have a short amount of time to raise a large amount of resources. It’s the ultimate opportunity to show what our community of grassroots supporters can do. [With your help, I'm confident we can take command of the race right now](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G1r99J7kXgFJVypvzcyAukn&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_21&n=3). This is an open seat for the newly created 3rd District, where Republicans have a narrow advantage. If we are to gain control of the House, it’s vital that we win this seat. Thanks so much for your support. We have profoundly important battles ahead of us, and I couldn’t be more excited, determined, and honored to be in the fight with you. [Be one of our campaign’s first supporters](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G1r99J7kXgFJVypvzcyAukn&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_21&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[ElectKevinKiley.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=46JphwgMS_nx4Jy_hVRltV7bfMPCE9ZT2udr1wr_AxY&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_21&n=5)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley Congressional Committee 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_21&n=6).

clean_body: | | | | Can you help? Dear Friend, This is it. The final countdown. We are just one week away from our FIRST campaign finance report and I need your help. Maryland is at a crossroads. Later this year we have a choice to make: will we choose to continue moving Maryland forward or go back to the tax and spend days of Martin O'Malley? Because without a Republican in the Governor's office, there will be no check on the Democrats' power in Maryland. And I can promise you this, any one of my opponents is going to raise your taxes. Join me today to continue to move Maryland in the right direction and to make Maryland more affordable for families, retirees, and small businesses. Sincerely, | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. body:

Friend,
After years of getting away with lying and misrepresenting facts as the truth, 2021 was the year the corporate media got exposed for their bias and deceitfulness like never before.
[**HELP ME FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE CORPORATE MEDIA **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ad5a20638e244688b203425d2216110b&_e=FKYYcEU6ySmH71y4KIJSvcX0W1Cf4LkUVd8-Gae-pTCnNJt7qslkfxT7cpCzPyC9u7DxipNDi0LdFimP5BZSZ057ERd9MREsbsrP0GUVaLB5FiT-z7PcOGH4yaGNorS1lhbeOuLCM426z9-h-iErxBWihe70yxfsaYsLSJY59U9Cni2lvqu-cEudYQ2UpkhF-0lZ_qPj9oBE3fOHGb75i0ho9XaWZxPhWn3sTmNDc6ojEdJrT4oy6pk1sSDLJRYi7Ct1_qyKJ2u_0EbKXOmP4m8sfk3St93ZpkR4R2NEtB743-p7AcSFOEhrK_GEtvoZw2Eewp7-76muM9eRH88KybeU7gkBqwWY5rVEFWflPsIPos1-oxb_u0Q0hfRrSNSDwzUro7-1d-UlKO8-SLRCtw%3D%3D)
One of the pivotal moments of exposing corporate media bias was when "60 Minutes" tried to advance a half-baked conspiracy to smear me. In their effort to run cover for Democrats, they deceptively edited video of me to totally misrepresent the truth. What they never anticipated was that I would FIGHT BACK and CALL OUT their lies.
The corporate media had become accustomed to never being held accountable for pushing Democratic Party propaganda. But I refuse to let them smear me with their dishonest narratives, especially in 2022.
[**JOIN THE FIGHT TO STAND UP TO THE DISHONEST CORPORATE MEDIA **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ad5a20638e244688b203425d2216110b&_e=FKYYcEU6ySmH71y4KIJSvcX0W1Cf4LkUVd8-Gae-pTCnNJt7qslkfxT7cpCzPyC9u7DxipNDi0LdFimP5BZSZ057ERd9MREsbsrP0GUVaLB5FiT-z7PcOGH4yaGNorS1lhbeOuLCM426z9-h-iErxBWihe70yxfsaYsLSJY59U9Cni2lvqu-cEudYQ2UpkhFdsCb8alqzOFSYbyCh6wQetXhyCHnVL6fBmJFWN4Ef7pmj-LuAhvjeO2bTZ2-N1OqRIcfyYC_J1V3xrW2tx35t_CQS34rDdGkZvDgI_VB8-onex3cUJYHe2ljbqa8lLqm9u1sWhk8tJ65zU36h7Cn1xwGIPWqGC3RvYkGYxSV2Vbiro9iyRkQCAjShv5WBGEIFUwWb3fAQUZrdJEXIJBMSg%3D%3D)
[**CHIP IN $22 NOW >>> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ad5a20638e244688b203425d2216110b&_e=FKYYcEU6ySmH71y4KIJSvcX0W1Cf4LkUVd8-Gae-pTCnNJt7qslkfxT7cpCzPyC9u7DxipNDi0LdFimP5BZSZ057ERd9MREsbsrP0GUVaLB5FiT-z7PcOGH4yaGNorS1lhbeOuLCM426z9-h-iErxBWihe70yxfsaYsLSJY59U9Cni2lvqu-cEudYQ2UpkhFJVUwkQC63ZBzzkD6cuFaC1JCzIEHAeJMG6PmnamHM6gIcfQ0fbhRsTdo8VuxGxB8Ra5f_MIywG8E5yNikj2JYlVYGzf5Vfv47tQ1gkiE61A1-UcD5ftMLpF7vJwaeFgIwLMdvKLr23owfu9wT16Flf5xCTMmd8WupyQLVBO5q5E6SZQpLQI3aBvQYChy9e3hkis6m63d23VFEc20MMk8_w%3D%3D)
I'll never stay silent. I'm calling out the media for their lies and I'm holding them accountable. By acting as nothing more than a Democratic propaganda machine, the corporate press has incinerated what little trust the American people in the media.
2022 will see more smear attempts from the corrupt corporate press, we will continue our mission to keep Florida free while holding the media accountable.
**[It's an uphill battle in 2022. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $50, or just $22 now to help me continue my fight against the biased corporate media in the new year?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ad5a20638e244688b203425d2216110b&_e=FKYYcEU6ySmH71y4KIJSvcX0W1Cf4LkUVd8-Gae-pTCnNJt7qslkfxT7cpCzPyC9u7DxipNDi0LdFimP5BZSZ057ERd9MREsbsrP0GUVaLB5FiT-z7PcOGH4yaGNorS1lhbeOuLCM426z9-h-iErxBWihe70yxfsaYsLSJY59U9Cni2lvqu-cEudYQ2UpkhF2PaOv3LZlCmDVCCxkUKqHm7YdTYjMJaiKWvG3HKG20v482CGMzdijiDaKv_zRoDgrpH11GbDHJjOKVQTaoc10gW9ZuEWrXGztWgvnR56T3HcEdqYqDJv73RDISJqJrQTKCDlcsDGHg-FULaNSzjYPlZhfHgSwpMWkDfbQjmpedeMrpBgEtVqVsnYOpTcVt1yWGj2tzU-bQHLFI8PoIvKwQ%3D%3D)**
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

name: Tom Winter
subject: How could this happen in our country?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA
body:
I know the wounds we suffered can heal if we come together to defeat these evil forces. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x5NBheYHjUvzNKN38fqcgWOKnL2OUf71Xp_eQDIdzqYHU0IDkmS3F4tnQaQ0AbzzehTQZ4IKIGMlIL6GM8sg5wbEpT6Nl-He0FV9PfpBd_y6CxqswARb5uVSeR5_1vp3Xn21oLGEthOMoujRg7q_wzuNPFdDl2jj8WKRZl4Bs5DKtIvkOd-c4HawwfshWFJwfMIin_yAKs8X7dgDvOaNAhu_gbrfgZcD1Z9Wn7qpY_Vb_rFwiF9TEvAUgY7hPVDDqZfL83QrwftNCMpXnjtdRllr4L5h9wJC9xpvILrDQ8UVMMA9lFdMcPaHySkqp7eoTug8wV53u0vU4RvpvN3tRhUFT9Tk9b4tzS7vqon5h2-w/3ii/iYMzfeGlQ3i5_xd3ablAvQ/h0/iBVgN2iKDiZXU16k4essQASyTRLdkym0W6UekcR4HeE) Friend,

It’s hard to believe that it’s been a year since we watched violent insurrectionists attack our nation’s capital. Like you, I remember watching the news in shock, talking with my friends and family with the same question being asked over and over again: **How could this happen in our country?**

But the more we dissect the events of January 6th, 2021, the more we realize that our democracy is more precarious than we know. And the people putting our democracy in danger by sewing division and doubt were led by Donald Trump and his cronies in his corrupt regime — the very people who took an oath to us to protect our democracy above all else.

**And what was even more concerning to learn is that Montana sent more insurrectionists per capita than any other state in our Union – _by nearly 1.5 times the next closest state._**

**We have got to stay true to our values as Montanans and Americans. We have got to hold the insurrectionists and the corrupt politicians who profit off their delusions accountable for what they’ve done.**

It’s not going to be an easy task, Friend. The same out of touch right-wing extremists who led us to the events of January 6th, 2021 are still operating without any real accountability – and their power will grow if we don’t come together to stop it. And one of the people behind the far-right’s quest to unravel our democracy is California’s own Ryan Zinke, currently running against us in Montana.

**Zinke has remained notably silent when it comes to the insurrection. Why? Because he wants voters to forget he was one of Trump’s staunchest, most corrupt, and most vocal allies in the former Administration – and he will go straight back to doing Trump’s dirty work if he makes it back to Washington.**

So while the wounds our democracy and our communities suffered one year ago today will not heal easily, I know we *can* heal them if we come together to defeat these evil forces. Here in Montana, we can do our part by defeating Ryan Zinke this November.

_**[How about you? What do you think it will take to heal the wounds of January 6, 2021? Share your thoughts with me on Facebook – and I’ll personally reply to every good-faith comment that comes in in the next 24 hours.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiIs7YQ7QwKPcPNHYZzdBGgYof1pFrQocnMH5JWqzHEXEMYoBaPMa8NtJ0JEwtFNHyw_uTaByfxLXh6KKvcXrW1GT9RsegC3hcOmrbeLROzvmAcplR68zgnTdlxO-Z5z_5F1vAP2kOWVXRLyHdHeneabc0uteagWC_v44YkYur06F4swhpds8hrUUDQeFLeKGBOeo3L9z_AAxb9H5LilvvFe6hWo5Mv1xaupfylB6wCjqkKan1gi8H-l5z1zy0nXWWiT1MuYqNnaH6rgLGSCyThsdROJ7EdqFewYb845Q85Deg/3ii/iYMzfeGlQ3i5_xd3ablAvQ/h1/18feS8L7PMU3-ONWt85MnQEjcq1XZpE9_MtY2sM4wdM)**_

**Thank you so much for being on this team — and thanks for everything you do to show you believe our democracy is worth defending.**
Best,
Tom | [DONATE >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x5NBheYHjUvzNKN38fqcgWOKnL2OUf71Xp_eQDIdzqYHU0IDkmS3F4tnQaQ0Abzze-hXqbhzGsmCbmydt_E6w6AOJznhSYcvFzHy6HGL6JCEnz5o3ulF8PxzsVG5NGcZnXsdvM4nmKA2Az9V5x9FkKlUxbi9S5wrhBcd91iiglvjbA5vPyvV8JIVGVi5B9FzFiuUKCJqSsj-bM0PgcwOpnaGYhLwJPc1-c51_hxJCL-Z97UVuS5APFQoASXCLRC23-oCGt-MiZSNKHlX0FQuN2vk8K6xuuysgdCFbmv593ScIVPAlAI6bnxFs62DCyJa4Crlw7JN6L06JehV78JxD-_ArEgIZqSgBBUR3rM4Kkow/3ii/iYMzfeGlQ3i5_xd3ablAvQ/h2/92GOPkTk9ZgKcpz6agTRvOIsHOkxTsL8C6MQl79gK24)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen=20Brown?=
subject: Trump's Jan 6th treasonous acts
body:
Thank you Joe Biden | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bc7c6488367b/trumps-jan-6th-treasonous-acts?e=4712f71bea)
---
|
---
[](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=7e6d8cb6eb&e=4712f71bea)
|
---
Last January 6th, **Donald Trump and a band of rioters committed acts of treason** as they tried to overturn the will of the American people. I watched those events in shock and horror; they motivated me to run for Congress.
| [Click to help me get to DC!](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=c5cdc548c3&e=4712f71bea)
---
My opponent in TX-13, Ronny Jackson, is a January 6th flip-flopper. After calling Trump’s mob domestic terrorists, Ronny _still_ voted against certifying the results of the election that day.In the last year, Ronny **voted against Trump’s impeachment**; **voted against creating the January 6th commission in Congress; voted against holding Trump’s crony Steve Bannon in contempt of Congress**.Ronny Jackson is unfit to serve in the United States Congress. He does not respect the rule of law.While January 6th was a terrible day, good can still come from it.[**We can kick Ronny Jackson out of Congress**. ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=ba75445548&e=4712f71bea)In his place, I will stand for shockingly basic but very American things: I will **respect** the rule of law, **respect** winners of free elections, and **expand the right to vote** for all.But I can’t get there without your help. Can you chip in $5 to support American democracy?
| [Chip in $5 to save democracy?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=8f2ad3928f&e=4712f71bea)
---
Thank you for everything you do to protect our great country, Kathleen.
|

clean_body: Thank you Joe Biden | | | | | Last January 6th, Donald Trump and a band of rioters committed acts of treason as they tried to overturn the will of the American people. I watched those events in shock and horror; they motivated me to run for Congress. | My opponent in TX-13, Ronny Jackson, is a January 6th flip-flopper. After calling Trump’s mob domestic terrorists, Ronny still voted against certifying the results of the election that day.In the last year, Ronny voted against Trump’s impeachment; voted against creating the January 6th commission in Congress; voted against holding Trump’s crony Steve Bannon in contempt of Congress.Ronny Jackson is unfit to serve in the United States Congress. He does not respect the rule of law.While January 6th was a terrible day, good can still come from it. his place, I will stand for shockingly basic but very American things: I will respect the rule of law, respect winners of free elections, and expand the right to vote for all.But I can’t get there without your help. Can you chip in $5 to support American democracy? | Thank you for everything you do to protect our great country, Kathleen. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Kathleen for Congress. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Exposing the Corrupt Media
body:
[****](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6051db9fbabe42acbc2f4486672a19b5&_e=LSyKloqROUv_sAZbH2OYzme1vZwLFu0fGINlGyjG5O4FI3jIhrFgKxLWpmHGcq_G74e12Zk58wY7aerVKAM1LfjT7G0nmjXMjWTk8ERcUB9uavJnJNnv57_kpYGIFIGYuSNhMFxYkdXfzd-aCLQBCh226kjv0HEWVOCarhI3CsGWdQO1y6t5cyBhETQ4S-fbvI1JVpaByfupnNm5XUO8ZYQKlOGhWj12essyXu74ACbdIN-O8TmPeHoBYJduP3fvfNnzNhaA4_-NcXm1q8rxbEyBTzka9pI6GQeDz7Blx4V3IAEZr59bHXiDHblVydpTd6yR2I2vABPPbazFz6LpKI8meowcUa0hhifS7O6SBSpb-rnI8JONYcI7eMQ-72A28Nv1D-cKhd1-FbQxP0Tpnw%3D%3D)
Peter,
After years of getting away with lying and misrepresenting facts as the truth, 2021 was the year the corporate media got exposed for their bias and deceitfulness like never before.
[**HELP ME FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE CORPORATE MEDIA **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6051db9fbabe42acbc2f4486672a19b5&_e=LSyKloqROUv_sAZbH2OYzme1vZwLFu0fGINlGyjG5O4FI3jIhrFgKxLWpmHGcq_G74e12Zk58wY7aerVKAM1LfjT7G0nmjXMjWTk8ERcUB9uavJnJNnv57_kpYGIFIGYuSNhMFxYkdXfzd-aCLQBCh226kjv0HEWVOCarhI3CsGWdQO1y6t5cyBhETQ4S-fbnCPejcVL8ZnsH5ACCapToRgzQcSIl7NrxSsBVkZmBK63u34PiPftoW8lOrafJUHShp_oBC5tGUq8kuxAphEH3s2QYYaf9HY8cTft1vEdUN3_GmE4lCZa9T6c5rq5z-8sTTej3MMyvtTbaVWRrRaImoi452cNOR5gmwqI38G4qYHSZWJejOeXGB1obc5INAj9hn7aF3jdoBhXY3GgcP6KIQ%3D%3D)
One of the pivotal moments of exposing corporate media bias was when "60 Minutes" tried to advance a half-baked conspiracy to smear me. In their effort to run cover for Democrats, they deceptively edited video of me to totally misrepresent the truth. What they never anticipated was that I would FIGHT BACK and CALL OUT their lies.
The corporate media had become accustomed to never being held accountable for pushing Democratic Party propaganda. But I refuse to let them smear me with their dishonest narratives, especially in 2022.
[**JOIN THE FIGHT TO STAND UP TO THE DISHONEST CORPORATE MEDIA **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6051db9fbabe42acbc2f4486672a19b5&_e=LSyKloqROUv_sAZbH2OYzme1vZwLFu0fGINlGyjG5O4FI3jIhrFgKxLWpmHGcq_G74e12Zk58wY7aerVKAM1LfjT7G0nmjXMjWTk8ERcUB9uavJnJNnv57_kpYGIFIGYuSNhMFxYkdXfzd-aCLQBCh226kjv0HEWVOCarhI3CsGWdQO1y6t5cyBhETQ4S-fbkh4zIC_0Yh-iXyLijpuJQwNtq2BcgBSytw35DIv1i_lnehZAreu3_YweinYc6rFOXFh_KEIpPpoBX-6QCkt0ABB3OrLdkpCarUEnEp97BpM-LNa6SzrqPu3bBC2zaC0lQwY5UOZOaQKjlCudEVkJnD7ptKKOTSWMsgrLPRxFmhmgNReIcOGdSh9-RTCNA4a-yxZVoCzYWg_slSpXgScfTQ%3D%3D)
[**CHIP IN $22 NOW >>> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6051db9fbabe42acbc2f4486672a19b5&_e=LSyKloqROUv_sAZbH2OYzme1vZwLFu0fGINlGyjG5O4FI3jIhrFgKxLWpmHGcq_G74e12Zk58wY7aerVKAM1LfjT7G0nmjXMjWTk8ERcUB9uavJnJNnv57_kpYGIFIGYuSNhMFxYkdXfzd-aCLQBCh226kjv0HEWVOCarhI3CsGWdQO1y6t5cyBhETQ4S-fbNFgjVq670ZDHk8kpZRb5s122SE-XRsgY8j8nOheNo9jzwXWFeB7w6bpLrbXLMSCQJejPB1kcaatdyBbkR6JfjrEF4d2qQI_EDt61TvjSwLn4woZeTDdpAehJZTJPUbKLmclS-bYSMWx9-F8EcvD9Xo5_56tzOdfktbG43f9JtjBelhf9WlLm6QbV4qAZ9y782QoAR68s49TXEe4zXp9NFg%3D%3D)
I'll never stay silent. I'm calling out the media for their lies and I'm holding them accountable. By acting as nothing more than a Democratic propaganda machine, the corporate press has incinerated what little trust the American people in the media.
2022 will see more smear attempts from the corrupt corporate press, we will continue our mission to keep Florida free while holding the media accountable.
**[It's an uphill battle in 2022. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $50, or just $22 now to help me continue my fight against the biased corporate media in the new year?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6051db9fbabe42acbc2f4486672a19b5&_e=LSyKloqROUv_sAZbH2OYzme1vZwLFu0fGINlGyjG5O4FI3jIhrFgKxLWpmHGcq_G74e12Zk58wY7aerVKAM1LfjT7G0nmjXMjWTk8ERcUB9uavJnJNnv57_kpYGIFIGYuSNhMFxYkdXfzd-aCLQBCh226kjv0HEWVOCarhI3CsGWdQO1y6t5cyBhETQ4S-fbBvmbz0zhzyVdsqktm3UA8B6RSmkm1FkLnFuQQdWjepVxikgJu9g_6m6ZbIl_eiFr9VsjPsaTGcMwd0HVtVn-Vf_NLHkNZ8RyCcYo4gOwYfxH0HLJ1uoHbrEuWcGUFxAeA_8_pW4GwJm7ZFOW53IUILc7EgbatFL8Km6-ldXuuQBDJfiCKLAqxCjBuGofXdGwWlu_wCVTStvuSXMC7w-NXw%3D%3D)**
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6051db9fbabe42acbc2f4486672a19b5&_e=LSyKloqROUv_sAZbH2OYzme1vZwLFu0fGINlGyjG5O4FI3jIhrFgKxLWpmHGcq_G74e12Zk58wY7aerVKAM1LfjT7G0nmjXMjWTk8ERcUB9uavJnJNnv57_kpYGIFIGYuSNhMFxYkdXfzd-aCLQBCh226kjv0HEWVOCarhI3CsGWdQO1y6t5cyBhETQ4S-fbVXy9GQAhM3hXYWQR0evyrMVgseAfzNE_fkkx8h3aW2jtsn6pvjpIiRZ8B4Bw0RHDoSOzeDvmKvOJSAYwAe3adOnFzt9isgxVy4BcntbbAhrJGh-c3Ul7fAb0jyEdEJQmw6y-nKCEN0IYZTX3VCBBHBZMkRko2B-OCsDV5AVF-vZiDLx5dfoG2bADzUXtg88_PBEPdR5bVrJ-wo_mHydntQ%3D%3D "CHIP IN") [CHIP IN](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6051db9fbabe42acbc2f4486672a19b5&_e=LSyKloqROUv_sAZbH2OYzme1vZwLFu0fGINlGyjG5O4FI3jIhrFgKxLWpmHGcq_G74e12Zk58wY7aerVKAM1LfjT7G0nmjXMjWTk8ERcUB9uavJnJNnv57_kpYGIFIGYuSNhMFxYkdXfzd-aCLQBCh226kjv0HEWVOCarhI3CsGWdQO1y6t5cyBhETQ4S-fb-4k9eU9G1euH4tkRWio1lntkkt0sQlSpPpzlCES9kg-VmtpZnxaory8-fZ4mXxcSjgRfZcWgmw8SJur3O8sZhgouQrW51XJgsKvtEJ1AS-GKIV7PdU2u9MQuMQtiniFPsHB9S0xVxGs-0h-qnBnenBalVAZ_1svPyGKH39_uJAdLb3XJAgUs28K9-2b2IJAtwbVU-mCm4vUoaNQDcDM5mQ%3D%3D)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This is good news. But we can’t take anything for granted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Fellow American,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b72d4c7c18a242fb9eb10d037d8af34e&_e=Xw4cRgANMdpNLqWPdrngfH0B8hIE5UJ3hG2DYcOKSx0A8okgyc_zabZKxw9r4Ozqzk-h5cN1L-V4kihNL0ekTTy6Wwr4gpUSKVK27UcWwOU4mFmBI9a2Acu8Zvv7hMnuLmlGjXWGkUHvFtqZfFZStDk9rnkQBuTwrz8whSZsmwf6KIgu9YpbrWd3BGQefaaEbbq_hTugTnIJjhqaZXZqvo-H93kK4nYxtJrvhM2kIO2GTtQvHb2Mu1Aa8DYSJ1qEI1GyHGXsTB9M16T9sPdDh-_zfF-CbIPbAyreNX9p2m-C6dPTcxJieglc15cBfd032S2E-apFjqZcTn_r9-Ybs0Q6HW9p0bK16FtVvI8Aa1nic0-ZueCOa4zrV9RzPluuG0nSM95ngALCTvswfCNrdmlabF0j6J3Yrynkxugocjrx3WsxGQyMsvapsgRtrfPvF-x-9eIkh4zKq32237vQug%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b72d4c7c18a242fb9eb10d037d8af34e&_e=Xw4cRgANMdpNLqWPdrngfH0B8hIE5UJ3hG2DYcOKSx0A8okgyc_zabZKxw9r4Ozqzk-h5cN1L-V4kihNL0ekTTy6Wwr4gpUSKVK27UcWwOU4mFmBI9a2Acu8Zvv7hMnuLmlGjXWGkUHvFtqZfFZStDk9rnkQBuTwrz8whSZsmwf6KIgu9YpbrWd3BGQefaaEbbq_hTugTnIJjhqaZXZqvo-H93kK4nYxtJrvhM2kIO2GTtQvHb2Mu1Aa8DYSJ1qE8RNBZj8xCFLNI3OCxKginGBWriOHb9eZcaAy_4RSeisbI3pBEuB3NvPD5aDEClb8qZIJe8_Cj5h50EdPDppgQXSaSqVj9qJQTRoWbpDe-LKqnfQNnoW7DOzmtDmjns45uF7J5IFzPyFjMQgCzij9yuw6AIosL7O3ZXA7o67z6kG31DfKbpZ-5cQ7SKNGC-4eMZxv_3ud2F3PcXgEJ3APqw%3D%3D)**

We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. _**[Can we count on you to act now?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b72d4c7c18a242fb9eb10d037d8af34e&_e=Xw4cRgANMdpNLqWPdrngfH0B8hIE5UJ3hG2DYcOKSx0A8okgyc_zabZKxw9r4Ozqzk-h5cN1L-V4kihNL0ekTTy6Wwr4gpUSKVK27UcWwOU4mFmBI9a2Acu8Zvv7hMnuLmlGjXWGkUHvFtqZfFZStDk9rnkQBuTwrz8whSZsmwf6KIgu9YpbrWd3BGQefaaEbbq_hTugTnIJjhqaZXZqvo-H93kK4nYxtJrvhM2kIO2GTtQvHb2Mu1Aa8DYSJ1qEzgBpRli7w0DTA0USEHj8PX5f75p5MOGLzUkhXLiHgj15FocHBF8Vq9AGvfLbVebM1Rt6nu6NpXxDMMp6wy_9wGdJDftgBmPVFlBdwqv2RPney9pZddW5Kb5g9Vr0Xtdzqw4D-0RYvgzNC9Yxfct4iuLO6CfkNq5rmbRwjT1IZ3s5V8A342K6ZUzAaQSFHhRBJfdWvShXFbusRrV79Aatyg%3D%3D)**_

If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish.

[**Chip in $3 ->**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b72d4c7c18a242fb9eb10d037d8af34e&_e=Xw4cRgANMdpNLqWPdrngfH0B8hIE5UJ3hG2DYcOKSx0A8okgyc_zabZKxw9r4Ozqzk-h5cN1L-V4kihNL0ekTTy6Wwr4gpUSKVK27UcWwOU4mFmBI9a2Acu8Zvv7hMnuLmlGjXWGkUHvFtqZfFZStDk9rnkQBuTwrz8whSZsmwf6KIgu9YpbrWd3BGQefaaEbbq_hTugTnIJjhqaZXZqvo-H93kK4nYxtJrvhM2kIO1SNedv-nFLOikH1Jmae_oEHcA5dw6P45-RCKLUnmapKC4E2J8P_wL2KLyQBajvW4ZstP3irQSAJnOo8aT62h-vO41HoQxecKNyd2rfd_xAsk3bm0fvjxPg7sc3qbmbOhoVpMRah9ZmpfW-peeFUbmMKkRyNG2qQnecwkjfGnpuDnqKqruMwGwFSmV0xSmPgs6xZC6kq4yd6BWdJcCJu9wB_muYVS4J0OygQdgy8eoinw%3D%3D)
[**HELP TEAM HERSCHEL BUILD EVEN MORE MOMENTUM**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b72d4c7c18a242fb9eb10d037d8af34e&_e=Xw4cRgANMdpNLqWPdrngfH0B8hIE5UJ3hG2DYcOKSx0A8okgyc_zabZKxw9r4Ozqzk-h5cN1L-V4kihNL0ekTTy6Wwr4gpUSKVK27UcWwOU4mFmBI9a2Acu8Zvv7hMnuLmlGjXWGkUHvFtqZfFZStDk9rnkQBuTwrz8whSZsmwf6KIgu9YpbrWd3BGQefaaEbbq_hTugTnIJjhqaZXZqvo-H93kK4nYxtJrvhM2kIO2GTtQvHb2Mu1Aa8DYSJ1qE8ZET12brbe2SMtxj3ewKWrmtK8_YVVdFCXxbBmffyWVySc3CItgCmljPgD1bmH77MRJukVMcWssSgDCVOVzKUwLRiXXuTbo86Ahffq4Fh81hdeewvfoPm4kvXIQqyhmMqyz8f_KL4boxcYbm7M_H5TwouiKOA0zEW6Twsxzq3wvvpoMr0pawWZKubR-80Gplo71MGuMzC2TnoJ48DwA_2w%3D%3D)
Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the _MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION._

We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Fellow American, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

One year ago this week, we came dangerously close to the end of our democracy. And Donald Trump’s allies are paving the way to another attempt at a coup.
As rioters stormed the Capitol on January 6, Melanie’s Republican opponent Tweeted that he was “proud of the hundreds of thousand[s] of patriots who came to DC today to support our president”, dismissing the violent mob as a “small group.”
[**Melanie D’Arrigo is running for Congress to defend democracy, and she’s defending a MUST-WIN Democratic open seat. The good news is that our Senate campaign is off to a tremendous start! While I am not a politician, there has been an outpouring of support from conservatives across Georgia and around the country for our campaign.

The bad news is that our Democrat opponent is the #1 fundraiser in the country and has $17 MILLION in his campaign war chest, which is growing by the day.

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Fellow American, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi4ea9hnvieqak7dnidnfngjeeh0394unr32bp7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4climcpj6cdh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zveo6m8bpkl72q0st4lbojj4s4tcikoqm1b8sk8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4climcpj6cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsc6s704bsf0ftnccamsefrbguj448hfmlmdk478_rp22sh2s8i66ob4climcpj6cdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo8uvhbk8smq2r8biiuc9qhg7h43jt8cepeb2gi0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4climcoj2c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi2c50sphhe7soabdi66o21esnpe84g1uqacb1lo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4climcoj2c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Sam Coleman
subject: Important Information for Public Employees in the new year!
body:
| The Freedom Foundation & Opt Out Today have assisted more than 100,000 public employees cease their union membership over the last three years. Got a question? We can help!
---
---
|
---
Peter, Welcome to 2022! Like many folks right now, you're probably taking stock of the previous year and looking forward to something better. While you ponder that gym membership, I want you to consider another voluntary membership you hold that may not be providing you enough value - your membership with your union. **Did your union earn your money last year?** For example, let's say you purchase a gym membership expecting state of the art equipment, a clean gym, friendly staff, and a good environment worth your money. Instead, you receive broken equipment, gross bathrooms, and angry staff members who don't help you when you need it. Would you want your money back? I would. Your membership with your union is no different. **Thanks to the U.S Supreme Court, you can cease this membership with no changes to your professional life.**

Your pay, healthcare, and other benefits stay in effect, and you keep your dues in your pocket. We make it easy to cease your membership - Simply [visit our website](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59180820:61sRS2EN1:m:1:3261058643:D78E763BD29C9EAC183254C85E92A20F:r) to access our resources. Need more information? Just ask!
---
| [Stop Funding Your Union]()
---
---
---
---
---
---
[Unsubscribe from all future e-mail ](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o61sRS2EN1)
Opt Out Today is a project of the Freedom Foundation, a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization which exists to inform public employees about their constitutional rights. If you need assistance ceasing your union dues contribution, or have any questions, please reach out to info@optouttoday.com.
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoeap52srk7m4hp7174f73botmvn2b8rsomos4go_rp22sh2s8i66ob4climao30shh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7hm12h3g9uhv2qi08qpn9t2i2kr6n0gkmc5d3c0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4climao30shh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0a6blr12e01sheqph05sq5s0j26eoqfr6bkgnj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4climao30shh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc0r0pvs4mkuij617g5pbasmno79pgc346dol2hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4climao30shh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Goldco
subject: Biden's Plans for Retirement Accounts
body:
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
Urgent: Only Weeks Remain To Shield Your Retirement Savings |
---
| | **Urgent: Only Weeks Remain To Shield Your Retirement Savings From Biden’s Tax Plans **
---
| | With Biden in the White House, you need to act fast.

His tax plans are directly aimed at your retirement investments.

And if you DON’T want to see your retirement income potentially take a double-digit tax hit...

You’ve got to move your money.

Now.

BEFORE he changes the laws.

Look, **Joe Biden has already said he’s making raising taxes a top priority**.

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: Stewart Navarre's Statement on Redistricting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://stewartnavarre.com/ [https://stewartnavarre.com/]Stewart Navarre’s Statement on Redistricting
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:
KING GEORGE — Stewart Navarre issued the following statement in response to the release of the new Congressional maps.
“I announced my candidacy for Congress because I am deeply concerned that millions of Americans have begun to doubt the promise of America and our democracy - and I believe that our best days are ahead of us. Over the past several months, I have had the privilege of speaking to thousands of fellow citizens in Virginia and across America who have shared their hopes and fears about the direction of our country. I have received exceptional support by family, friends, a great campaign team, community leaders, and donors. It has been an absolute privilege to campaign for Congress. We are in uncertain and difficult times and it is during times like these that we need leaders who have been tested and will work tirelessly for their constituents in our District and for fellow Americans across our country. The recently approved Congressional map places my home county - King George - in the 7th District of Virginia - where Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger (D) is the incumbent - and with whom I share a common vision for our future. After discussion with friends and family I believe that it is in the best interests of our district, our country, and our democracy to support Representative Spanberger’s re-election to Congress. Therefore, I am formally suspending my campaign. While I am greatly disappointed that I will not have an opportunity to serve in the next session of Congress, I am not done, and am committed to doing all I can to make a better future for all of us. I hope all of you will join me in doing everything we can to help re-elect Representative Spanberger.”
RSN
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/54cfc9e6-136f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/5987b88e-b56f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTg3Yjg4ZS1iNTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rqvsmu9hCYY1fQ96A3RnKE-6xVSfsdHnp3QVRUqqTPA=&id=108459448 .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: You're Invited - MLK Day Celebration!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement

>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq
# Dear Hoosier,
On Jan. 6th, 2022, I paused from politics to unite and observe, remember, and recommit to the spirit of patriotism to our country. I gave special thanks and a tribute to the brave souls in blue who stood for us against the Jan. 6th attack. It was our Capitol's police, the DC law enforcement, and the National Guard who saved the day. We must never forget.

Our democracy was upheld that day because these individuals swore to uphold their duties in loyalty and defend the U.S. against all enemies both foreign and domestic. For that, our hearts will forever be grateful. It's a shame we didn't hear from either one of our U.S. senators.

Moving forward, mark your calendars and plan to join me on Sunday, Jan. 16th, 2022, at First Baptist Church located at 626 W. 21st Ave., Gary, IN 46407 for the 36th Anniversary Celebration of the Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. National Holiday Observance.

This event is sponsored by the Katie Hall Educational Foundation, Inc. Katie Hall was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives from Indiana in 1982 and is remembered for sponsoring legislation to make Martin Luther King, Jr.'s birthday a national holiday.

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Candidate for U.S. Senate
Indiana 2022
---
|
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=ae42373039&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
| Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=33ce6c5621&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
Haneefah Khaaliq for U.S. Senate - Indiana 2022
|
---
|
---
| Want to volunteer? Sign up [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=eb920839a5&e=a49cb82bb3)!
Share this newsletter [sign-up form](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=2ae48504b0&e=a49cb82bb3) with friends!
---
|
---
|
### _So what's next? _
* I need your signature! We're working hard to get as many signatures now through January. If you haven't already done so, please check your voter registration now by clicking [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=b48e7b8572&e=a49cb82bb3). You must be a registered voter to have your signature count. Then, visit my website, [download, print, and sign my petition](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=1220a216c6&e=a49cb82bb3) from the home page. Get others to sign too!
* **Once you have the petition(s) signed and/or you are done collecting as many signatures as you can (including your own), here's what happens next. It's a lengthy process, but let's dive in: **
* Deliver the original uncertified petition(s) to a member of our team or mail the petition(s) to us at Hoosiers for Haneefah P.O. Box 2936, Gary, IN 46403 to be received by January 5th (2022) or as soon as possible. Once we receive the petition(s), we may check them and depending on your location, overnight them back to you. If you receive your petition(s) back, here's what happens next:
* Beginning Jan. 5th (2022) through NOON February 1st (2022), you will submit the original petition(s) to your county voter registration office (search the location and office hours now) for certification on Haneefah's behalf. Make copies of the original petition(s) before you hand them in to be certified just in case. NOTE: Make sure the petition signature(s) are obtained from registered voters by their county, the bottom portion (petition carrier information) is completely filled out by you after collecting signatures, and your petition(s) has both front/back.
* Once the original petitions(s) are handed in and certified by your county voter registration office, be sure to request/make another final copy (front/back) of the _now certified_ petition(s). This is a very important step!
* Then kindly request that the county voter registration office forward the original certified petition(s) to the Indiana Elections Commission on Haneefah's behalf. Keep the copies of the certified petitions. If the county voter registration office is unable to forward the certified petitions for Haneefah, you have more options:
* Kindly request that the certified petitions be returned to you (in-person). Then overnight the original certified petition(s) to us at Hoosiers for Haneefah P.O. Box 2936, Gary, IN 46403 and we will handle it from there. We will also reimburse you for postage. **_We'd like to receive all original certified petitions by Feb. 2nd, 2022, but let's not wait until the last minute_. **
* Copies of the certified petitions can be sent to us at Hoosiers for Haneefah, P.O. Box 2936, Gary, IN 46403. We advise you to keep them for your records. The petition(s) can also be scanned to us at hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com. All certified petitions should be copied and/or scanned in prior to submission to the Indiana Elections Commission located at 302 W Washington St e204, Indianapolis, IN 46204. Contact: 317-232-3939 with questions.
* Sound confusing? Still got questions? No worries. Call or text us at 317-999-5592! This is our one shot to make a difference for the State of Indiana! Let's do this!
* Email **hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call 317-999-5592** for petition signing accommodations!
* Check out my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=a64e351fce&e=a49cb82bb3) and [donate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=a729d29083&e=a49cb82bb3) your first $9 now!

Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information.
---
|
---

Friendly reminder for TEAM GILBERT'S weekly meeting on Thursday !! [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bqzdl-iduiyhurdd-r/)
# * Volunteers Needed*
### **We Need Your Help!**
We are gearing up for the ride of a lifetime and we are going to need all hands on deck. We are currently looking for volunteers to assist us in several areas for the Gilbert for Governor campaign; like knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting a fundraiser, assisting with digital and online marketing, and scheduling. What's good about this, is you CAN WORK FROM HOME! Just give us a few hours of your time. As you may or may not know Deirdre Gilbert has decided to run as an Independent Candidate. As an independent, she must acquire signatures to get on the ballot in November. We are going to need about 200 Volunteers to assist us with this endeavor. If you want to help us with this, please send an email to info@gilbert4gov.com. We are very excited about those that have already joined us, but we are in need of so much more so that we can WIN this race. Every Thursday we will have online training and/or meetings to discuss the strategies that is needed to run this race and WIN it. Here is the link to join us every Thursday at 7PM (CST). Bring some friends along! Thank you so much for your support!https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82872448465?pwd=czVCUU82bTlxLy8wZjlPMlZuUERLUT09Meeting ID: 828 7244 8465 Passcode: 307107 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bqzdl-iduiyhurdd-y/)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: New Year, Same Scheme
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
It's been about 8 months since the FBI's dawn raid on my apartment.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183901:61lGQEE0N:m:1:3253819041:0485A51F67AB0B9233F8C9FB83E17D67:r)
---
Peter,
---
After a year of being targeted by the FBI, it seems 2022 will be no different.
---
At the end of last year, President Trump's former Chief of Staff, Mark Meadows, was held in criminal contempt of Congress just weeks after the indictment of Steve Bannon.
---
__I then learned Adam Schiff wrote a libelous email about me, suggesting I 'll be his next target. He's always wanted to take down the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump.__
---
These corrupt government goons are trying to destroy me with a mountain of legal battles and fees, and I need your urgent help fighting back.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as the Deep State tries to destroy me with endless legal battles and fees.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183901:61lGQEE0N:m:1:3253819041:0485A51F67AB0B9233F8C9FB83E17D67:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183901:61lGQEE0N:m:1:3253819041:0485A51F67AB0B9233F8C9FB83E17D67:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183902:61lGQEE0N:m:1:3253819041:0485A51F67AB0B9233F8C9FB83E17D67:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183903:61lGQEE0N:m:1:3253819041:0485A51F67AB0B9233F8C9FB83E17D67:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183904:61lGQEE0N:m:1:3253819041:0485A51F67AB0B9233F8C9FB83E17D67:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183905:61lGQEE0N:m:1:3253819041:0485A51F67AB0B9233F8C9FB83E17D67:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183906:61lGQEE0N:m:1:3253819041:0485A51F67AB0B9233F8C9FB83E17D67:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183901:61lGQEE0N:m:1:3253819041:0485A51F67AB0B9233F8C9FB83E17D67:r)**
---
As I've told Tucker Carlson, I have nothing to hide.
---
_It 's been about eight months since the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment. _
---
_If they had dirt on me, you better believe it would 've been exposed by now. They even SURVEILLED my private communications with President Trump for crying out loud! _
---
That's what's so terrifying about what's taking place.
---
**Innocent citizens like me are being targeted, harassed, and indicted by the federal government despite having committed NO CRIMES.**
---
But in the eyes of the Deep State, we're guilty of a serious crime: loyalty to a political outsider -- President Trump -- and his mission to drain the swamp.
---
As Alan Dershowitz has said, we are witnessing tactics that you'd expect from a third-world dictatorship, not the United States of America.
---
Sadly, America's days as the freest nation in the world may be coming to an end.
---
That's why I refuse to surrender this battle. It's not just my freedom that I'm fighting for. Our country's system of justice rests on the chopping block.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as the Deep State tries to destroy me with endless legal battles and fees.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183901:61lGQEE0N:m:1:3253819041:0485A51F67AB0B9233F8C9FB83E17D67:r)
---
Thank you,
---

name: Greg Casar
subject: I’ll fight for a functional power grid in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Peter,
Last year, millions of Texans sat in their freezing homes without power or heat because our heavily unregulated and disconnected electricity grid failed. Thousands of my constituents—overwhelmingly working class and communities of color lost access to the clean water they needed to drink, cook, or bathe their children.
In the middle of this crisis, I recorded an urgent message with NowThis demanding action from our statewide leadership. As temperatures begin to drop once again, I wanted to share that video with you [https://twitter.com/GregCasar/status/1365706491412553736?s=20] .
https://twitter.com/GregCasar/status/1365706491412553736?s=20 [https://twitter.com/GregCasar/status/1365706491412553736?s=20]Our Republican leadership failed us, Peter. They neglected our broken power grid while lining their pockets with campaign cash from corporations who made big profits during the crisis. They failed to take precautions for extreme weather—and then they refused to accept blame for their failures.
Even worse, our power grid is still not fixed today. Governor Abbott and right-wing officials continue to ignore the grave threats of extreme weather brought on by climate change.
When we get to Congress, we’ll strengthen federal oversight of both our power grid and natural gas sectors. We’ll push to expand transmission access into and out of ERCOT, so we’re not isolated in a future storm. We’ll fight for permanent incentives for solar and wind , so we can expand clean, reliable energy for when we need it most. And we’ll fight against price gouging during crises , so working families aren’t left footing the bill.
Texans deserve leadership that puts the interests of people before profits. That’s what I’ll do if I’m elected to represent the 35th District.
If you believe Texans deserve a functional power grid, pitch in $25 to our campaign to help get out the vote. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.03-email&amount=35]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.06-email&amount=35 ]Thank you,
-Greg
P.S. Visit our campaign store [https://store.casarforcongress.com/] to get a bumper sticker, koozie, or t-shirt in exchange for your donation!
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]
Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
Greg Casar for Congress
P.O. Box 301923
Austin, TX 78703
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bb430ad4-576f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/84424607-c06f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDQyNDYwNy1jMDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a9WBS637oC8O-tSLYYtlQbojqi1RoM-NZWoPOqp0DUA=&id=109014200 .

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Big tech censorship has gone too far.
body:
Web Version: https://view.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=0bd80decdb4399daf05de60939173ba77e02bf5b190dcf0628bba77a020f49cd86013eea8d48885b975ce3f3296e92f9b79e6dff06d29dccc2f8dbac5db23dab157fe44347471f04a342a87667a71e94
----------------------------------------

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099

Dear Fellow Conservative,

I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state.

My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me.

In other words, we’ve caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.

And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper.

That’s why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties – and we need your help to win.

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099
Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?

Let me explain...

Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O’Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results.

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099

Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for “violating the government’s rules about election integrity.”

Hopefully, I don’t need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment.

But it gets much worse...

When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him.

You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris’ vacated seat in the U.S. Senate – and he was afraid that Rogan’s tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed.

So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.

From: California Secretary of State Communications Department

To: Twitter

Date: Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM

Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post:

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099

>From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public.

Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site.

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099

That’s why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment.

But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you.

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099
Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?

My name is Harmeet Dhillon.

Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today’s left.

We’ve taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes—out of school—during the pandemic.

We’ve taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa’s vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia.

And now, we’re taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O’Handley’s freedom of speech.

But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you.

And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000.

After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians.

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099
So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?

I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation – and the future of our country.

Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms?

Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives?

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099
Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.

Sincerely,

Harmeet K. Dhillon

P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior.
https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099
That’s why I’m urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla.

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099
DONATE
https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732937a332e3bfb0672aba458b1d60650f82403e0db9795afea132d2827e9c8562d6e39bd1f0413b65bb19f134ac891927cb308ccd591e28099
Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.

The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

© The Center for American Liberty |
https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b73244591278c859bde692459e0ca02791e98e6e69bdeb10f409ba56a302a9bf25b430f927af733833435d93ec08ae1bc2c4ec5baf9a2b7b3c0b
www.libertycenter.org

PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

----------------------------------------
This email was sent by: OM
1881 N. Nash Street,
Arlington, VA, 22209 USA

Privacy Policy: https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=a1ae31037ce8b732cfe2c36ab930f6093186f1148a396da00e5157e170cd1005094fc93b7d17342e7a66d37a387bc0fd28d7f460bfd4ec9f674b76383a0394f1
Update Profile: https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=8afae0e8432a633b52e2e4bb0f7e34d68900f8af27bf4fd2b9fc3323ea5e4e763617688e893ec44499fb43ac12808d06f1f9b7d8cabe10f152dc6fda3f9d7b43fd34eb6a44b87f61
Manage Subscriptions: https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/subscription_center.aspx?qs=8afae0e8432a633b9d9f19b1b0466539f2abb631083e08ae5f01122f04a50125ce7bf242f99dfe1a563e4e2e292bbdd704fb87bfc656a635b9400749af9c55b8dfd93fdce7d82a41
Unsubscribe: https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=8afae0e8432a633b9d9f19b1b0466539f2abb631083e08ae5f01122f04a50125db1b84b036901326cba996c54a1840217f8896e2624f3999db43382270aac8042d011cea91518443

body:
Take our two minute priorities survey today. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40443391/324368499/823540626?refcode=ea.82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmYyMTIyNS1jMjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SymHN2whXmlYlUyFHpOA2dh2BkTpGGcE5egSJdQUuc8=&emci=9e83fead-096f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=1049176)
Peter — today, we aren’t asking for your money: Roy wants your input! **[Can you take two minutes to fill out our New Year Priorities Survey right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40443395/324368502/1821657221?refcode=ea.82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmYyMTIyNS1jMjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SymHN2whXmlYlUyFHpOA2dh2BkTpGGcE5egSJdQUuc8=&emci=9e83fead-096f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=1049176)** | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40443415/324368509/1821657221?refcode=ea.82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmYyMTIyNS1jMjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SymHN2whXmlYlUyFHpOA2dh2BkTpGGcE5egSJdQUuc8=&emci=9e83fead-096f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=1049176)**
---
From voting rights to education access to climate change, there are so many issues facing our country. Roy wants to hear which are the most important to you and your family at the start of this new year.
It’s critical to Roy and his team to know which issues the people believe are most urgent so they can get to work delivering for North Carolina. **[We need your response ASAP — click here to take Roy’s New Year Priorities Survey immediately!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40443417/324368527/1821657221?refcode=ea.82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmYyMTIyNS1jMjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SymHN2whXmlYlUyFHpOA2dh2BkTpGGcE5egSJdQUuc8=&emci=9e83fead-096f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=82f21225-c26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=1049176)**
Thanks so much,
Team Cooper

name: Elaine Luria
subject: I’m officially running for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40445179/324374182/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODk0MTczNy1jNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cIyyo6ZwfK5VGEmH3KbVwVAb6CDD0C83mefA0ZaLT-I=)

| | I released this statement yesterday announcing my re-election campaign, and I thought you’d like to see it, friend: On the anniversary of the January 6th insurrection, I recommit to uphold my oath to “support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies foreign and domestic.” Our nation is at a crossroads where as Americans, we must defend our democracy against forces that seek its destruction. One year ago, I was evacuated from my office by the threat of pipe bombs. While I listened to the shouts of the throngs of rioters overrunning the capitol, as they attacked both the physical seat of our government and the core foundations of our democracy, I said these words, “I don’t recognize our country today and the members of Congress who have supported this anarchy do not deserve to represent their fellow Americans.” Throughout my two decades in uniform and now in my second term in Congress, I take my oath seriously. Today I know that my continued service is not a choice, but a duty to our nation and our values as Americans. We cannot allow those who seek to destroy our country from within to prevail. We need representatives and leaders who will uphold and strengthen our laws and institutions, not side with those who try to tear them down. Abraham Lincoln said in response to potential threats to our Republic, “if it ever reach us, it must spring up amongst us; it cannot come from abroad. If destruction be our lot we must ourselves be its author and finisher.” These words continue to ring true today. The call and courage to serve is not one that I take lightly or without deliberation. I have been honored to serve the people of Coastal Virginia over the past three years. This is our community. The triumphs and the challenges we have faced encourage my team and me to work harder for those we serve. I took an oath to serve. And in this critical moment for our democracy, I intend to continue serving. Thanks for sticking with me. Your support has meant everything. Sincerely, Elaine | There's so much more to accomplish for Coastal Virginians, and I'll need you by my side to do it. If you’re with me in this fight, [**please click on this link.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40445180/324374183/-1950105558?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220107_FR_Announcement_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODk0MTczNy1jNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cIyyo6ZwfK5VGEmH3KbVwVAb6CDD0C83mefA0ZaLT-I=)

clean_body: | = | | I released this statement yesterday announcing my re-election campaign, and I thought you’d like to see it, friend: On the anniversary of the January 6th insurrection, I recommit to uphold my oath to “support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies foreign and domestic.” Our nation is at a crossroads where as Americans, we must defend our democracy against forces that seek its destruction. One year ago, I was evacuated from my office by the threat of pipe bombs. While I listened to the shouts of the throngs of rioters overrunning the capitol, as they attacked both the physical seat of our government and the core foundations of our democracy, I said these words, “I don’t recognize our country today and the members of Congress who have supported this anarchy do not deserve to represent their fellow Americans.” Throughout my two decades in uniform and now in my second term in Congress, I take my oath seriously. Today I know that my continued service is not a choice, but a duty to our nation and our values as Americans. We cannot allow those who seek to destroy our country from within to prevail. We need representatives and leaders who will uphold and strengthen our laws and institutions, not side with those who try to tear them down. Abraham Lincoln said in response to potential threats to our Republic, “if it ever reach us, it must spring up amongst us; it cannot come from abroad. If destruction be our lot we must ourselves be its author and finisher.” These words continue to ring true today. The call and courage to serve is not one that I take lightly or without deliberation. I have been honored to serve the people of Coastal Virginia over the past three years. This is our community. The triumphs and the challenges we have faced encourage my team and me to work harder for those we serve. I took an oath to serve. And in this critical moment for our democracy, I intend to continue serving. Thanks for sticking with me. Your support has meant everything. Sincerely, Elaine | There's so much more to accomplish for Coastal Virginians, and I'll need you by my side to do it. As Charlie has said, Ron DeSantis doesn’t care about people. He cares about securing the Republican nomination for president in 2024, which is why he’s spent his time in office pursuing divisive far-right policies at the expense of everyday Floridians.

DeSantis is soft on COVID and more concerned with restricting a woman’s right to choose and suppressing voting rights than he is with protecting Florida from the impending threat of climate change. **If he wins another term, things will only get worse -- which is why we MUST elect Charlie this November!**

The good news is that _Insider Elections_ calls this race a **“battleground,”** and last time around, DeSantis only won by **less than half a point**. Victory is well within reach, but we need to keep building a winning grassroots movement to get the job done!

**That’s why we’re coming to you, friend. Ron DeSantis has far-right billionaires from out of state bankrolling his campaign, and we’re counting on YOU to help us fight back. Can we count on your support right now to help Charlie flip Florida BLUE?**

I wanted to write to say thank you for everything you’re doing to help defeat Ron DeSantis. Florida can’t afford another four years of his divisive politics in the governor’s office, and I appreciate your support in this race.

Whether we have a governor who will fight climate change, protect our communities from COVID, and defend our most precious constitutional rights will depend on the outcome of this election. Governor DeSantis wants to use the governor’s office to advance an extreme, far-right agenda that he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president, and we can’t let that happen.

But while he has out-of-state billionaires writing check after check to his campaign, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to pitch in anything you can to help me fight back. **[If you can, please click here to make a donation to support my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40446686/324378659/-663416480?refcode=20220107_f_1_fl&amount=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzQ2MDkwNS1jNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g4JrS3qDl-5wZfqEG0gDnR-LggqexOU1kJTl-YyWcP4=)**

Thank you again for your support. By working together, I know we can win this race and finally start to build a Florida that works for ALL Floridians.

name: Rep. Demings
subject: things aren't looking great, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
They're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat
| | |
---
I'll be honest, friend – things aren't looking great. My Election Year membership campaign expires in just a few hours, but I'm still 1,388 members short of my goal.
Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. That's why they're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat – no matter how much it takes.
**Right now, Marco Rubio is more vulnerable than ever – but we need resources to compete with him. With time running out before tonight's membership deadline, I see that you still haven't activated your membership. Senate control is riding on what happens here, so I hope I can count on you to give right now:**

[Please, activate your Election Year membership by donating $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me win in Florida and expand our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40446889/324379479/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2094-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTQ2MDkwNS1jNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zzq645vEbRtYGMGGdD7Ne8qXGjBDSybkdTOo1LiAwmQ=)
