name: Malinowski HQ
subject: Did you read Tom’s note from yesterday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
|
---
| | **Did you see the recent news about our campaign?**
After the redistricting news, the Cook Political Report classified our race as more competitive and Kevin McCarthy’s SuperPAC announced that Tom Kean Jr. will receive major funding from the first wave of their “Trailblazers Fund”!

Tom’s been fighting to defend our democracy in Wasington and we need to fight to keep people like him in Congress. [Please, make your first contribution of 2022 and then read Tom’s note below.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40448313/324385772/-1267168964?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_220107_1_2&refcode2=9446ae13-ca6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDQ2YWUxMy1jYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QViYfl8UqolApPqCS-JloPgZYtOfkitJo9LHHFa9bgc=)

[https://act.malinowskifornj.com/a/personal-link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40448315/324385776/-1267168964?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_220107_1_2&refcode2=9446ae13-ca6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDQ2YWUxMy1jYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QViYfl8UqolApPqCS-JloPgZYtOfkitJo9LHHFa9bgc=)

**_— Read Tom’s Note Below —_**

Dear friends,

Today, on the first anniversary of the January 6th insurrection, I’ll be in the US Capitol, reflecting on my memories of that day, and resolving that those who summoned the attack can never be allowed to threaten our democracy again.

As many of you know, I immigrated to America from a communist country, and spent much of my adult life as a human rights activist and diplomat taking on dictatorships like China, Russia, and Saudi Arabia. So I have a particular perspective on what makes our country special, and on why so many people around the world dream of becoming American.

It’s not just because of words like “freedom” or “democracy.” It’s because of an idea embedded in our Constitution — that everyone, no matter how powerful, is supposed to play by the same set of rules. Every American election is an opportunity to show what that means. Unlike in many countries, our winners don’t gain the power to do whatever they please. Our losers accept defeat, knowing their rights will be respected, and they live to fight another day.

So on January 6, 2021, after a tumultuous presidential campaign, I was eager to be in the Capitol to observe what I thought would be a continuation of this tradition, a ceremony marking a peaceful transfer of power from one American leader to another. At 11:21 AM, I was sitting in the House chamber gallery, and tweeted out: “Today is a celebration of democracy. The people have voted. The only power we have as Representatives & Senators under the Constitution we swore to defend is to count the ballots. And we will.”

Just after 2 PM, the mob broke into the Capitol. We saw the Speaker evacuated from the House chamber. We were asked to grab the gas masks from under our seats.

We did not see the battle raging outside, where the massive pro-Trump mob savagely attacked police officers with flag poles, bottles, and chemical sprays. So I wasn’t as afraid as I should have been. Instead, I thought about past moments of danger in my life — a time when I was chased by riot police while observing a demonstration in Bahrain, a trip to Syria when it was being bombed by Bashar Assad, and to Libya during its revolution. I remember thinking how absurd it was to be sitting in the inner sanctum of our democracy in Washington, DC, and experiencing the same kind of adrenaline rush. How could this possibly be happening here?

I was furious at the people who had brought the attack about. Even as we fled, I told everyone I could that at all costs, we had to reclaim the chamber that night; we had to finish the job of certifying the election. Thank goodness we did.

Ever since, Republicans who want us to move on from January 6th have tried to get away with blaming the rioters alone for the attack. That’s like saying that only the hijackers were responsible for 9/11.

The real question is what could have motivated thousands of seemingly ordinary Americans to commit the deviant crime of attacking the U.S. Capitol while brutally assaulting the police officers defending it? Social media companies created the echo chamber in which Trump’s lie about the election reverberated and radicalized the rioters. But the root cause was the lie itself.

Today, most Republicans in Congress either repeat the lie, or are too cowardly to rebut it. Thanks to them, 2/3 of Republican voters believe an American election was stolen. Forty percent believe violence against the government is sometimes justified. In states across the country, these extremists are trying to install officials who would nullify any election their side loses.

On January 6, 2021, we thwarted the attack on the Capitol. On January 6, 2022, the attack on our Constitution continues.

As we defend our democracy, we must remember there is no Constitutional police in America. There is no Constitutional jail. The rules underpinning our system of government, and the peace it preserves, have always been based on our consent. Americans either agree, voluntarily, to abide by those rules, even when we lose an election — or we lose our country.

Congress should codify even stronger rules to make it harder for state legislatures, or Congress itself, to overturn a future election. But even such stronger rules will depend on the willingness of elected officials to abide by them.

That is why the most important thing we can do is insist on an absolute litmus test for anyone seeking elected office in America. They can be Republican or Democrat, conservative or progressive; they can believe whatever they want about government spending or taxes or how much the state can regulate our personal or business lives.

But no one should be entrusted with a position of responsibility in America ever again unless he or she categorically and publicly rejects Trump’s lies about the election, and the violent movement he has mobilized to nullify majority rule.

As Congresswoman Liz Cheney has said, members of her party “can either be loyal to Donald Trump or we can be loyal to the Constitution, but we cannot be both.” Those who choose the former — actively or by acquiescence — are simply not fit to serve in a Constitutional republic. Not now. Not. Ever. Again.

Thank you for all you do for our country. I’ll keep doing all I can to be worthy of your support.

Tom

---
|
---
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district.

We did not see the battle raging outside, where the massive pro-Trump mob savagely attacked police officers with flag poles, bottles, and chemical sprays. So I wasn’t as afraid as I should have been. Instead, I thought about past moments of danger in my life — a time when I was chased by riot police while observing a demonstration in Bahrain, a trip to Syria when it was being bombed by Bashar Assad, and to Libya during its revolution. I remember thinking how absurd it was to be sitting in the inner sanctum of our democracy in Washington, DC, and experiencing the same kind of adrenaline rush. How could this possibly be happening here? I was furious at the people who had brought the attack about. Even as we fled, I told everyone I could that at all costs, we had to reclaim the chamber that night; we had to finish the job of certifying the election. Thank goodness we did. Ever since, Republicans who want us to move on from January 6th have tried to get away with blaming the rioters alone for the attack. That’s like saying that only the hijackers were responsible for 9/11. The real question is what could have motivated thousands of seemingly ordinary Americans to commit the deviant crime of attacking the U.S. Capitol while brutally assaulting the police officers defending it? Social media companies created the echo chamber in which Trump’s lie about the election reverberated and radicalized the rioters. But the root cause was the lie itself. Today, most Republicans in Congress either repeat the lie, or are too cowardly to rebut it. Thanks to them, 2/3 of Republican voters believe an American election was stolen. Forty percent believe violence against the government is sometimes justified. In states across the country, these extremists are trying to install officials who would nullify any election their side loses. On January 6, 2021, we thwarted the attack on the Capitol. On January 6, 2022, the attack on our Constitution continues. As we defend our democracy, we must remember there is no Constitutional police in America. There is no Constitutional jail. The rules underpinning our system of government, and the peace it preserves, have always been based on our consent. Americans either agree, voluntarily, to abide by those rules, even when we lose an election — or we lose our country. Congress should codify even stronger rules to make it harder for state legislatures, or Congress itself, to overturn a future election. But even such stronger rules will depend on the willingness of elected officials to abide by them. That is why the most important thing we can do is insist on an absolute litmus test for anyone seeking elected office in America. They can be Republican or Democrat, conservative or progressive; they can believe whatever they want about government spending or taxes or how much the state can regulate our personal or business lives. But no one should be entrusted with a position of responsibility in America ever again unless he or she categorically and publicly rejects Trump’s lies about the election, and the violent movement he has mobilized to nullify majority rule. As Congresswoman Liz Cheney has said, members of her party “can either be loyal to Donald Trump or we can be loyal to the Constitution, but we cannot be both.” Those who choose the former — actively or by acquiescence — are simply not fit to serve in a Constitutional republic. Not now. Not. Ever. Again. Thank you for all you do for our country. I’ll keep doing all I can to be worthy of your support. Tom | Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district. = = Tom Malinowski for Congress P.O. Box 263 Somerville, NJ 08876 United States | | Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress

I want to take a moment to talk about my friend Maggie and why her race in New Hampshire is so critical. **[But before I go any further, can I quickly ask you to donate $5 or whatever you can toward Maggie's reelection campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40449241/324390163/-1281091919?refcode=e20220107_booker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyZGRkOC1jYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17ztwZRijT_sSfpHgJOrxD6T1p_QeUWYabUU9KJCNkg=)** | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40449242/324390164/-1281091919?refcode=e20220107_booker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyZGRkOC1jYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17ztwZRijT_sSfpHgJOrxD6T1p_QeUWYabUU9KJCNkg=)

When Maggie Hassan came to the U.S. Senate, she made an immediate impact. She walked in with experience, leadership, and a drive to solve problems the New Hampshire way – putting party differences aside to get things done.
And thanks to Maggie's independent leadership, we were able to save health care for millions of Americans, provide families and small businesses with much-needed relief, and invest in our nation's infrastructure.
**There's no denying that Maggie is a rising star in the U.S. Senate,** and that's why I'm going to do everything in my power to make sure she is reelected.
But she's got a tough road ahead of her. I know it, you know it, and Republicans know it. In 2016, Maggie won by 1,017 votes, the closest race on the map, and polls are showing that 2022 could be even tighter. Losing even one Senate seat means losing control of the Senate and handing the gavel back over to Mitch McConnell.
Maggie is no stranger to tough fights, but Mitch McConnell and GOP megadonors are flooding New Hampshire with millions of dollars to unseat her and flip the Senate red.
If we're going to reelect Maggie in New Hampshire and protect our Senate majority, it's going to take an army of grassroots supporters. **[That's why I'm reaching out to ask: can you rush $5 or whatever you can to Maggie Hassan's reelection campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40449243/324390165/-1281091919?refcode=e20220107_booker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyZGRkOC1jYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17ztwZRijT_sSfpHgJOrxD6T1p_QeUWYabUU9KJCNkg=)**

As seen on TV

She won a long-shot race in 2018 and has spent every day since fighting for ALL Floridians and standing up to Ron DeSantis. That’s what Florida needs — someone who will bring something NEW, beat expectations, and get things done. **This’ll be a tough race, folks. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: my great-grandmother Agnes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi, Peter. A week into the new year, I am feeling very grateful for the family that has shaped me into who I am today. My parents and the generations before them paved the way for me to serve in Congress **and now run against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) so we can do better for Iowa's working families in the Senate.**
In the photo below is one of those family members, my great-grandmother Agnes. She was born in 1906, 14 years before women would gain the right to vote. When I was 25, I walked up my street – right past her house – to my polling place, where I cast a ballot with my name on it for an Iowa State House primary. I thought about Agnes when I dropped off my ballot, and I still think about her every time I go to the polls.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40449342/324390898/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ3MDQzMy1jYjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0JsDddUwUWzyBTG9jjQ2HGoC9gtf6ghP6lGOMldnaFs=)
Those before us have rallied, protested and spoken out for what is right. It's their sacrifices and commitment that have enabled us to come so far. But even after centuries of advocacy and progress, the sad truth is that the right to vote is still under attack in this country – and you need only look as far as Sen. Grassley to see that. He filibustered the Freedom to Vote Act to ensure Republican-led voter suppression continues across the country.

**I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley because Iowans _today_ and of future generations are counting on us, here and now, to protect our democracy.**
So that's why I'm emailing you today. **[If you believe that we need to fight for our right to vote and that we need to protect our Senate majority – then I need you on my team. Please, can you donate $5 to my campaign so I have the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley? In a race like this, every dollar and every grassroots donor makes a real difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40449343/324390899/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk557-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ3MDQzMy1jYjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0JsDddUwUWzyBTG9jjQ2HGoC9gtf6ghP6lGOMldnaFs=)**

clean_body: | | | Hi, Peter. A week into the new year, I am feeling very grateful for the family that has shaped me into who I am today. My parents and the generations before them paved the way for me to serve in Congress and now run against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) so we can do better for Iowa's working families in the Senate. In the photo below is one of those family members, my great-grandmother Agnes. She was born in 1906, 14 years before women would gain the right to vote. When I was 25, I walked up my street – right past her house – to my polling place, where I cast a ballot with my name on it for an Iowa State House primary. I thought about Agnes when I dropped off my ballot, and I still think about her every time I go to the polls. = Those before us have rallied, protested and spoken out for what is right. It's their sacrifices and commitment that have enabled us to come so far. But even after centuries of advocacy and progress, the sad truth is that the right to vote is still under attack in this country – and you need only look as far as Sen. Grassley to see that. He filibustered the Freedom to Vote Act to ensure Republican-led voter suppression continues across the country. I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley because Iowans today and of future generations are counting on us, here and now, to protect our democracy. So that's why I'm emailing you today. = From the bottom of my heart, thank you for standing with me and fighting for the values we share. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Add your name to support passing strong voting rights protections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The future of our nation is on the line.
#
I want to be very clear, Peter. We cannot allow a Senate rule to stand in the way of protecting voting rights in this country. We have to strengthen federal voting rights protections any way we can, including an exception to the filibuster. The future of our nation is on the line.
**[Will you add your name to the petition now and show all of my Senate colleagues that we must take action to pass urgent voting rights legislation, even if that means an exception to the filibuster?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451209/324399132/1953774590?ms=pm_em_220107_1&refcode=pm_em_220107_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTNlY2E5OC1jZTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KWs1mfw-3mkPPfxgGmDieQZk9A0WbfFbRRMUbMHSSGM=&emci=d603bd79-326f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ae3eca98-ce6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13116610)**
There’s no way around it: if we want our democracy to stay a democracy, _**we must protect the right to vote.**_ We simply can’t let the threat of an old Senate rule like the filibuster prevent us from defending our basic civil rights.
I don’t take this kind of thing lightly – but I am deeply concerned about the future of our nation if we cannot defend Americans’ voting rights from partisan attempts to undermine democracy.
**[Peter, sign on now if you support protecting the right to vote – any way we can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451210/324399133/1953774590?ms=pm_em_220107_1&refcode=pm_em_220107_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTNlY2E5OC1jZTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KWs1mfw-3mkPPfxgGmDieQZk9A0WbfFbRRMUbMHSSGM=&emci=d603bd79-326f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ae3eca98-ce6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty

**[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451211/324399134/1953774590?ms=pm_em_220107_1&refcode=pm_em_220107_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTNlY2E5OC1jZTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KWs1mfw-3mkPPfxgGmDieQZk9A0WbfFbRRMUbMHSSGM=&emci=d603bd79-326f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ae3eca98-ce6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13116610)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: 2022 is finally here.

**Happy New Year!** I hope each of you were able to take a break and enjoy time with your loved ones over the holidays– whatever that looked like for you. For me, it meant celebrating Christmas, helping my cousin find a space for her business, avoiding catching Omicron and finalizing my plans for this campaign.

I love this time of year because I'm able to reflect on the past highs and lows and look ahead to the possibilities of the next year. **I can't help but feel so much gratitude and appreciation** to connect with supporters like you and work with people who are taking a chance on me to represent **Virginia's 8th Congressional District.** But looking ahead right now, the stakes are so much higher because I believe this campaign has a real chance.

I'm reaching out to you today because you believed in this campaign since day one. We believe healthcare is a human right and that our current government failed our education system, our small businesses, and communities of color. **We believe that fair representation is needed and that every American deserves an equal opportunity to thrive and succeed.**

While running against the established incumbent is tough, I believe it is time to usher in a new era of leadership. I’ve had the privilege of being exposed to a variety of different experiences in my life — from being a daughter of an immigrant family, to working in the innovative tech industry, to being part of a generation of young, college-educated adults who can’t afford to put a downpayment on their first home. These experiences will bring a new perspective to this role in Congress.

Now that we've officially closed the books on 2021, my team and I are ready to hit the ground running. But I need your continued support to make sure our grassroots campaign starts off strong. **[So,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451524/324401307/686715116?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGZmN2VjOS1kMDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHSM6O1igA8Ygt_5rfZRqtGcMR3fjHS9amozzzZHoWk=)_Peter_[ , you took a chance on me in 2021 — Will you take another chance on me today by being one of my first 2022 contributors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451525/324401309/686715116?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGZmN2VjOS1kMDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHSM6O1igA8Ygt_5rfZRqtGcMR3fjHS9amozzzZHoWk=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **********[**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451526/324401311/686715116?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_EL10&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGZmN2VjOS1kMDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHSM6O1igA8Ygt_5rfZRqtGcMR3fjHS9amozzzZHoWk=)**********

**Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.** **That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.** **Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.** **[__Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >>__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451537/324401336/267147644?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGZmN2VjOS1kMDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHSM6O1igA8Ygt_5rfZRqtGcMR3fjHS9amozzzZHoWk=)** **______[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451538/324401338/686715116?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGZmN2VjOS1kMDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHSM6O1igA8Ygt_5rfZRqtGcMR3fjHS9amozzzZHoWk=)**

clean_body: | | | = Happy New Year! I hope each of you were able to take a break and enjoy time with your loved ones over the holidays– whatever that looked like for you. For me, it meant celebrating Christmas, helping my cousin find a space for her business, avoiding catching Omicron and finalizing my plans for this campaign. I love this time of year because I'm able to reflect on the past highs and lows and look ahead to the possibilities of the next year. I can't help but feel so much gratitude and appreciation to connect with supporters like you and work with people who are taking a chance on me to represent Virginia's 8th Congressional District. But looking ahead right now, the stakes are so much higher because I believe this campaign has a real chance. I'm reaching out to you today because you believed in this campaign since day one. We believe healthcare is a human right and that our current government failed our education system, our small businesses, and communities of color. We believe that fair representation is needed and that every American deserves an equal opportunity to thrive and succeed. While running against the established incumbent is tough, I believe it is time to usher in a new era of leadership. I’ve had the privilege of being exposed to a variety of different experiences in my life — from being a daughter of an immigrant family, to working in the innovative tech industry, to being part of a generation of young, college-educated adults who can’t afford to put a downpayment on their first home. These experiences will bring a new perspective to this role in Congress. Now that we've officially closed the books on 2021, my team and I are ready to hit the ground running. But I need your continued support to make sure our grassroots campaign starts off strong. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ********=****** ****** ****** | | ********=******** | ********=******** ****** ****** | | ********=******** | ********=******** ****** ****** | | ********=******** Your support means everything. Thank you! She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable. That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families. Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward. = ____= | || || ** Victoria for Congress P.O. Box 7476 Arlington, VA 22207 United States | | Paid for by Victoria for Congress

body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451574/324401491/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGY2NjczOS1kMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7n6-3D-A4ef_a7oDcev9bMH-OsUea1pifIxSg9CNGI=)

I'm appalled, Peter.

At Gov. DeSantis' press conference on Tuesday, **Ben Frazier, a disabled Black man and Jacksonville community activist, was arrested, denied use of his wheelchair, and escorted out by police.**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451575/324401492/1870454853?refcode=em22_220107_desantis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGY2NjczOS1kMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7n6-3D-A4ef_a7oDcev9bMH-OsUea1pifIxSg9CNGI=)
---

Mr. Frazier's "crime"? _Calmly and peacefully speaking truth to power_ – calling out DeSantis's **complete and utter failure** to protect our communities throughout this devastating pandemic.

While our state has been in a state of crisis – COVID cases rising, ICU beds in our hospitals filling up, and folks standing in lines for _over 6 hours_ just to get tested – Gov. DeSantis has literally been _**on vacation.**_

This outrageous incident makes it clear: Gov. DeSantis will do _anything_ to avoid accountability for his actions, or more accurately, lack of action.

**Peter, enough is enough – our communities deserve _so much better._ We need leaders who actually care about the people they represent.**

**[That's why I'm running – to fight for _you_ , your family, and your community. If you can spare any amount today to help bring our people-powered campaign to victory, I'd _truly_ appreciate it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451576/324401493/1870454853?refcode=em22_220107_desantis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGY2NjczOS1kMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7n6-3D-A4ef_a7oDcev9bMH-OsUea1pifIxSg9CNGI=)**

Thank you for being part of this. Together, we can build a Florida that works for all of us.

\-- Michele

Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451694/324402301/-392698372?refcode=20220107_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDJkYTliYy1kMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uEkkHhyWiNiXo5G8PtBjKccsM-doNpBsIPHg487THwo=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40451695/324402302/-420428835?refcode=20220107_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDJkYTliYy1kMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uEkkHhyWiNiXo5G8PtBjKccsM-doNpBsIPHg487THwo=)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: This podcast reports that I am the Democratic frontrunner
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
I have some great news to share with you today: the Forward Maryland podcast has just ranked me as the frontrunner in the Democratic race for Governor.
Click here to see podcasters Bill Woodcock and Steve Hunt of Forward Maryland share how they are ranking the 2022 gubernatorial candidates. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/powerrankings2022?amount=20.22]
Here’s what podcaster Bill Woodcock had to say: “At Number One, and I believe we’re gonna be in agreement on this one, would be Maryland Comptroller Peter Franchot. [...] Peter Franchot has been a very competent Comptroller, a visionary Comptroller, and a Comptroller who has moved the office forward in the tradition of other Maryland political legends. [...] He’s very plain spoken, very truthful, [and] very authentic.”
Here’s what podcaster Steve Hunt had to say: “Franchot is definitely the Number One in my book right now.”
This latest ranking is yet another indication of the growing strength of our inclusive, people-powered movement. While our campaign consistently ranks at the top of Maryland polls and we are proud of the work we have done, there is a LOT more work ahead of us to secure the Democratic nomination for Governor on June 28th. To ensure this outcome, we need you engaged with the Franchot/Anderson-Walker Campaign.
We have an important fundraising deadline approaching and really need your help to meet our fundraising goals. This deadline is even more critical because starting on January 12, 2022, I will be barred from accepting donations while the Maryland General Assembly enters the next legislative session. This fundraising blackout period means we need to make these final days of fundraising count. Thanks to your past support we are doing well on our fundraising, but we have a little bit more to do in advance of next Wednesday’s deadline.
Can we count on you to chip in a little more to help us maintain our momentum ahead of our final fundraising deadline next week? We’re looking to raise an additional $3,000 by 11:59 PM tonight, and your contribution will help get us there.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/powerrankings2022?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/powerrankings2022?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/powerrankings2022?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/powerrankings2022?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/powerrankings2022]I can’t thank you enough for your continued support of this movement. Together, we’re going to change the way that government does business, and lift Maryland’s communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/powerrankings2022?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/29caa342-9a6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/31cc03e2-d26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWNjMDNlMi1kMjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rpHvXGhTRuPSsXfPefXV1F5Iv2gMtyF1OOCac9OtZK4=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Thank you, team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
I wanted to reach out to thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goals in 2021. While the holiday season is traditionally a tough time for political fundraising, we are on track – thanks to YOU. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40452513/324407170/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWIyODk5My1kMzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSGXlTjlS36S83-84yd13yLIN-Dc7IkMrRN6zO6F-tY=&emci=65b509e2-1e6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0ab28993-d36f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15529135) | I hope you had a peaceful and safe holiday season. I wanted to reach out to thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goals in 2021. While the holiday season is traditionally a tough time for political fundraising, we are on track – thanks to YOU. _If there’s something else on your mind, but you don’t see it listed here, please reply to this email directly._
These wins for our country were only possible because Democrats controlled the House. Democrats delivered, and I am so thankful that we were here to do it. Republicans fought these critical deliverables tooth and nail, and I shudder to think where we’d be if they controlled the House these past two years.
You made it happen – with your unwavering support. I am grateful for all of you who stuck by me during 2021, even if it meant simply giving $5 to my campaign. Each contribution, no matter how small, makes a big difference as we gear up for a pivotal election year.
THANK YOU!
– Jahana

clean_body: I wanted to reach out to thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goals in 2021. While the holiday season is traditionally a tough time for political fundraising, we are on track – thanks to YOU. | | I hope you had a peaceful and safe holiday season. I wanted to reach out to thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goals in 2021. While the holiday season is traditionally a tough time for political fundraising, we are on track – thanks to YOU. As we enter the election year, I am reflecting on what House Democrats were able to do for Americans so far – passing the Build Back Better Act and sending the bipartisan infrastructure bill to President Biden’s desk – and I am thinking about how much there is still left to do. I’ll be working hard over the next few weeks to ensure our results on these issues and more continues to move forward. | If there’s something else on your mind, but you don’t see it listed here, please reply to this email directly. These wins for our country were only possible because Democrats controlled the House. Democrats delivered, and I am so thankful that we were here to do it. Republicans fought these critical deliverables tooth and nail, and I shudder to think where we’d be if they controlled the House these past two years. You made it happen – with your unwavering support. I am grateful for all of you who stuck by me during 2021, even if it meant simply giving $5 to my campaign. Each contribution, no matter how small, makes a big difference as we gear up for a pivotal election year. THANK YOU! – Jahana P.S. If you weren’t able to contribute last month,= = * Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. * Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority.

* 5 seats to take back the house

name: Team King Siri
subject: FWD: Did you see our big update?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
We look forward to sharing more of their vision over the next few weeks.

| Hi Peter, just making sure you saw our exciting update.

**John King and Michelle Siri are sure to be Maryland’s winning ticket, and we’re giving you a chance to become one of their first founding donors.**

We look forward to sharing more of their vision over the next few weeks — but for now, we need your help in these first few days after the launch. Today, you can show your support by letting them know you believe in them. [_**Will you take a moment to pitch in your first contribution right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40453998/324413762/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220107-1b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d5b25c15-d76f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWIyNWMxNS1kNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BlVhYfY2VPfqy5XtRjmLzVJPvz8OV7RhGGFcT1b2uII=)

Thank you,

Team King Siri

\--------Forwarded message--------
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40454000/324413765/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220107-1b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d5b25c15-d76f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWIyNWMxNS1kNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BlVhYfY2VPfqy5XtRjmLzVJPvz8OV7RhGGFcT1b2uII=)
Peter,

**My name is Michelle Siri, and I am so honored to be joining this ticket with Secretary John King's campaign for governor of Maryland.**

As a first-generation Iranian-American, my mom always instilled in me the importance of never taking our rights for granted and always advocating for those around me, and it’s because of her and my own life experience that I’ve dedicated my life working towards achieving equal rights for women here in Maryland and across the country — through my law career, at Planned Parenthood, or at the Women’s Law Center. **Now, I have the chance to do it on an even bigger scale as a part of this campaign with John.**

From the moment I met John, it was clear that his authenticity, honesty, and commitment to serving others are unlike anyone I had met before. As Secretary of Education under President Obama, the President of the Education Trust, and the founder of Strong Future Maryland, he worked tirelessly to advance bold legislation that invests in our public schools, protects workers, and safeguards our environment. **Across Maryland and the country, John has created opportunities and changed lives at every level. Now, he’s ready to lead our state — and I’m humbled by the opportunity to get to work building a more equitable Maryland alongside him.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40454002/324413767/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220107-1b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d5b25c15-d76f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWIyNWMxNS1kNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BlVhYfY2VPfqy5XtRjmLzVJPvz8OV7RhGGFcT1b2uII=)
| [JOIN US ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40454003/324413769/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220107-1b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d5b25c15-d76f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWIyNWMxNS1kNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BlVhYfY2VPfqy5XtRjmLzVJPvz8OV7RhGGFcT1b2uII=)
---
I’m not a politician, Peter. I’m just a proud Marylander with 20 years of experience advocating for legislation and pushing for women’s rights on the state and national levels.

I’m grateful for the chance to introduce myself, and I look forward to sharing more of my story and vision for Maryland with you over the next few months. **We have the chance to build a Maryland that works for everyone, and it’s going to take all of us to make it happen.** [_**So can John and I count on you to show your support for our ticket and help us start the new year off strong by making a donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40454004/324413770/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220107-1b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d5b25c15-d76f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWIyNWMxNS1kNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BlVhYfY2VPfqy5XtRjmLzVJPvz8OV7RhGGFcT1b2uII=)
| [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40454005/324413771/-1613255896?refcode=BLU-KING-20220107-1b-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=d5b25c15-d76f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWIyNWMxNS1kNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BlVhYfY2VPfqy5XtRjmLzVJPvz8OV7RhGGFcT1b2uII=)
---
I am grateful for any support you can give, Peter. I am honored that John asked me to join this strong, progressive team and I know together we have the incredible opportunity to build a more equitable Maryland and a more just future for all. **Let’s get to work.**

Grateful to be a part of this movement,
Michelle Siri
Democrat for Lieutenant Governor of Maryland

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Top 4 liberal media targets of 2022
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59189793:6tyL1EENO:m:1:3253819041:1D9290EBED1EFA6A275E4CEB86137E85:r)
Peter,

The radical left-wing media is already showing who they want to destroy in 2022. I'm here to warn you NOW about their plans to destroy these TOP 4 targets:
> **#4: Republicans**
This is a given, but be prepared for it to get even worse as they start to call Republicans, terrorists or racists.
> **#3: Comedians**
The regime in charge of the media cannot allow for any deviations from the socialist narrative. Joe Rogan, Tim Dillon, and Dave Chappelle all represent a threat to the Establishment Media. As champions of free speech, the left-wing media will seek to destroy them.
> **#2: Parents**
Lenin (a Soviet era communist) said in order to bring about total domination you must control education. The radicals in the media will continue their war on parents.
> **#1: Unvaccinated**
The unvaccinated will be the excuse and scapegoat for the failures of vaccines and mandates. The rhetoric here may get very dangerous.

I am warning you, but I am also asking for you to support the Media Research Center (MRC) to expose the radical bias in the media. It's no longer the news corporations. It's also collusion with the White House and Big Tech.

[_**Can you send an urgent donation of $10, $50, $100, or any amount you can generously spare to the Media Research Center?**_

_**Donate $10 >>
Donate $35 >>
Donate $50 >>
Donate $100 >>
Donate $250 >>**_
**_Donate $500 >>_
_Donate $1,000 >>
Donate Other >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59189793:6tyL1EENO:m:1:3253819041:1D9290EBED1EFA6A275E4CEB86137E85:r)
I am the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media.

**Thanks to our efforts exposing bias in the media, 90% of Americans do not TRUST the media as a reliable source of information. **

Before MRC, voters would believe their evening news. We have shown Americans how much they are being lied to. We are teaching voters to Believe in America - Not the Media.
_**Here 's how MRC exposes the fake news media:**_

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.
* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.
* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

[_**Please help me DEFEAT the leftwing media and their lies by becoming a supporter of the Media Research Center today!**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59189793:6tyL1EENO:m:1:3253819041:1D9290EBED1EFA6A275E4CEB86137E85:r)

[_**Donate $10 >>
Donate $35 >>
Donate $50 >>
Donate $100 >>
Donate $250 >>
Donate $500 >>
Donate $1,000 >>
Donate Other >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59189793:6tyL1EENO:m:1:3253819041:1D9290EBED1EFA6A275E4CEB86137E85:r)

The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization recording the media 24/7, identifying lies, exposing false media coverage, and holding the media accountable.

Our efforts have led to reporters being terminated for fake news reporting, major news publications retracting false statements, apologies from news personalities, and more.

I am truly worried about the uptick in dangerous rhetoric from the media. They are calling Republicans and parents terrorists. They are putting a false blame onto the unvaccinated.

If we do not expose them, then their lies will influence voters which will have bad consequences.

[_**Please prayerfully consider making a generous donation of any amount by clicking here. **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59189793:6tyL1EENO:m:1:3253819041:1D9290EBED1EFA6A275E4CEB86137E85:r)

I hope my email reaches you in time. I am looking to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours to expand our operations in 2022.

Thank you for standing up for liberty,

Brent Bozell
President & Founder of MRC
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Team Gearing
subject: 3 ways to help CHARLIE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -
With only 38 days left until Texans start heading to the polls, the work we do everyday to reach voters is more important than ever. Can you take action today to help us succeed at the polls?
Here are 3 ways you can help today:

1. Chip in to help get our message out. Your donation helps us buy the campaign literature, yard signs, direct mail, and digital advertising we need to win. Every bit helps, can you chip in $10 or more right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

2. Sign up to come block walking with us! The best way to reach voters is by having conversations with them on their doorsteps. We’re out knocking doors daily to have these crucial conversations, can you join us? Sign up to volunteer here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/exMiHT4940qHQ_ffbwbq9w2]

3. Forward this email to 3 friends and ask them to join you in supporting Charlie! One of the quickest ways you can help us win this race is by forwarding this email to 3 of your friends who live in District 114, or who might be interested in donating or getting involved.

Charlie is running to build a better Texas where all our neighbors can thrive. We hope you’ll join us!

- Team Gearing

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.
Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
Charlie Gearing for Texas
10440 N. Central Expressway Suite 1400 Dallas, TX 75231

https://www.facebook.com/gearingfortexas [https://www.facebook.com/gearingfortexas] https://twitter.com/gearingfortexas [https://twitter.com/gearingfortexas] https://instagram.com/gearingfortexas [https://instagram.com/gearingfortexas] campaign@gearingfortexas.com [campaign@gearingfortexas.com]

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/beba0565-c66f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/86301c92-da6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjMwMWM5Mi1kYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjA2d0fraws8wczomaqsaNRbEzXi5cgZRj-YIuec6Mk=&id=129063427 .

body:
(You did that!)

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40455792/324423486/1300596418?refcode=220107_FR_GalesburgSuccess
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZjBkYTYwLWRkNmYtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T1o8ScXRWvJ1rf9dyqLzDBmrBZeGtAMS4fv7V79cJ1U=)
---
Peter,

If you remember, back in February of 2021, we endorsed and supported Mayor Peter Schwarztman to flip a critical office in Galesburg, IL.

With your donations and support, Barrier To Entry PAC guided him to raise $15,000 and defeat an eight-year incumbent who supported Trump. Our expertise and funds helped Peter learn the importance of campaign financing, effective organizing, and digital advertising.

We spent countless hours on the phone and Zoom with Peter and his scrappy campaign team, pulling them up the mountain with us. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40455793/324423487/1300596418?refcode=220107_FR_GalesburgSuccess
_IMG1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZjBkYTYwLWRkNmYtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T1o8ScXRWvJ1rf9dyqLzDBmrBZeGtAMS4fv7V79cJ1U=) **The best part about helping a candidate win is seeing the changes in priorities and new policies come to life.**

On Thursday, Peter announced a $70M project in Galesburg that is _**renewable**_ and will bring in more than $300,000 of tax revenue to Knox County and the city. This 50 MWac utility-scale solar development project will cover 380 acres of land and will bring together communities and land-owners to integrate clean energy projects into the local landscape. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40455794/324423488/1300596418?refcode=220107_FR_GalesburgSuccess
_IMG2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZjBkYTYwLWRkNmYtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T1o8ScXRWvJ1rf9dyqLzDBmrBZeGtAMS4fv7V79cJ1U=) We’re so excited to see Peter’s vision come to fruition and to celebrate the accomplishments that come with victories. Because when we support everyday candidates, the whole community wins.

One of the many great things about Barrier To Entry PAC is that we don’t just hand someone a check. We invest in their campaign through mentorship as well. Since Peter was taking on a strong Republican incumbent, we helped him build a strong field program which ultimately helped his win. **[In just under a year, we are starting to see the effects of our hard work and the impact we can make when we come together and support candidates who can win. We plan to do even more in 2022. If you can, chip in and help us get a head start on investing in campaigns that will create positive change across the U.S. Donate today>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40455795/324423489/-2038882143?refcode=220107_FR_GalesburgSuccess_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZjBkYTYwLWRkNmYtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T1o8ScXRWvJ1rf9dyqLzDBmrBZeGtAMS4fv7V79cJ1U=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[DONATE TODAY >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40455796/324423490/1300596418?refcode=220107_FR_GalesburgSuccess

Our expertise and funds helped Peter learn the importance of campaign financing, effective organizing, and digital advertising. We spent countless hours on the phone and Zoom with Peter and his scrappy campaign team, pulling them up the mountain with us. IMG1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZjBkYTYwLWRkNmYtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T1o8ScXRWvJ1rf9dyqLzDBmrBZeGtAMS4fv7V79cJ1U= The best part about helping a candidate win is seeing the changes in priorities and new policies come to life. This 50 MWac utility-scale solar development project will cover 380 acres of land and will bring together communities and land-owners to integrate clean energy projects into the local landscape. IMG2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZjBkYTYwLWRkNmYtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T1o8ScXRWvJ1rf9dyqLzDBmrBZeGtAMS4fv7V79cJ1U= We’re so excited to see Peter’s vision come to fruition and to celebrate the accomplishments that come with victories. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Tickets Are Almost Sold Out! Join Senator Ted Cruz and Me at a TX-38 Rally!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Less than 70 tickets remain for my rally with Senator Ted Cruz next week on Friday, January 14th! The excitement for this event has been overwhelming, and I want to make sure you don't forget to secure your tickets before it's too late! Food will be provided for the first 250 guests, a live band will be playing all night, and you'll get to hear from Ted Cruz and me about the current state of politics in our country.

[_Register for Senator Cruz and Wesley Hunt's Rally Here!_](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=c12b9927ccb3484597e440ec62337168&_e=zeYIHEoVT5X7iLI4ZgE-5hkn286zEBIlVZjQPu55MwofyJstnu4-VppvnJlBaJKIaiImE00SqIPKg8pHnlDenkXlmmEpmN8ONrDGuSwrJKF1AqnC-2r3CXlqruBrg3n4JcrF7meDrMiAOdzWX4EisLaGcYcElbOvC1BwxDF-0jhZthSTNshRBLa2Rl8SUb8S7LVcTPRkSImglfFZ8IoeoFiOQ9HA5lzAs00IHctsGt9eEPd23qyJozKaEOBmSLbkEDnwVPljwcZF4Ds5PgLDaBU_YIgAAA8Fk80jV6t5q--UUTbBDqNpgWBjXAhWouuAtZkeNOFj8N6wx8-KZcv_jPc4dIc1JKvlLrJmNcCDp0Aodv7A1Wfjs1e57SEWTjO1)

Our rally will take place at 2920 Roadhouse in Hockley, TX from 6:30 - 10:00 PM, on Friday, January 14th. Please register using the registration link [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=c12b9927ccb3484597e440ec62337168&_e=zeYIHEoVT5X7iLI4ZgE-5hkn286zEBIlVZjQPu55MwofyJstnu4-VppvnJlBaJKIaiImE00SqIPKg8pHnlDenkXlmmEpmN8ONrDGuSwrJKF1AqnC-2r3CXlqruBrg3n4JcrF7meDrMiAOdzWX4EisLaGcYcElbOvC1BwxDF-0jhfwdtoaIOxZyR1I-9I82VLnzPSvYfSVUT4rIf03whKVHtpPr2srfLa_rzrZ6klAYyg55VxQv8WdvBo7qqZUwV2o-GqME3irOxXmk_nxkAA3-jUxasHmH-NO8djr22E61pJ4arFnPVIXrYUV2sAPPU6REt3D9w2ggnVSk90WO_ynrWvKjyij7YKr-QUUc93KzqbOpjj5H123ueAjpFOELu3). Get your tickets now before they sell out!

name: Hattie Miller, Team Collier
subject: The backbone of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
A monthly gift started today is critical for long-term planning. |
#
---
Hey team, Hattie here! I've been going over our financial needs for Mike’s campaign and mapping out the best way to enact our plans to defeat Dan Patrick this year — and one area we can see immediate effects in is our monthly recurring program. Monthly donations are gifts that we can count on each month. They help us plan our initial digital advertising program and voter outreach program, and fund our email program to keep Texans in _every single county_ up to date on our campaign. They’re a powerful, game-changing, grassroots way to sustain our campaign. Now that it’s officially an election year, we need to make sure our early fundraising numbers show the strength of our campaign. [**To start the year off on the right foot, we're looking to recruit 100 more monthly supporters. Can we count on your support? Commit to a monthly contribution of just $5 today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40456207/324425355/-839969798?amount=5&recurring=1&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmFlZDU3NS1kZjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBogVRgIk3_vcQPiwKY14sFskODF9gRq70qOj1Cjh0Q=) | [START A $5 MONTHLY CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40456208/324425356/-839969798?amount=5&recurring=1&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmFlZDU3NS1kZjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBogVRgIk3_vcQPiwKY14sFskODF9gRq70qOj1Cjh0Q=)

Folks, early investments can be a make-it or break-it moment for our campaign. Early recurring donations give us a better insight into the money our grassroots campaign can count on as we begin ramping up our operation.
[**With eight weeks left until the primary, we’re at a pivotal moment in our campaign, and Mike needs to know you're still on his side. Can you commit to a recurring monthly contribution of just $5 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40456209/324425357/-839969798?amount=5&recurring=1&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmFlZDU3NS1kZjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iBogVRgIk3_vcQPiwKY14sFskODF9gRq70qOj1Cjh0Q=)

clean_body: A monthly gift started today is critical for long-term planning. | Hey team, Hattie here! I've been going over our financial needs for Mike’s campaign and mapping out the best way to enact our plans to defeat Dan Patrick this year — and one area we can see immediate effects in is our monthly recurring program. Monthly donations are gifts that we can count on each month. They help us plan our initial digital advertising program and voter outreach program, and fund our email program to keep Texans in every single county up to date on our campaign. They’re a powerful, game-changing, grassroots way to sustain our campaign. Now that it’s officially an election year, we need to make sure our early fundraising numbers show the strength of our campaign. = | = Folks, early investments can be a make-it or break-it moment for our campaign. Early recurring donations give us a better insight into the money our grassroots campaign can count on as we begin ramping up our operation. = = Thanks for your help! Hattie Miller The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: This can’t be the new normal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40456309/324425873/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDcwNjRmZi1lMDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fdg-8tu3K0afIAdoLlx20xVIimU1DabvT7Ox3DYnPVI=&emci=d67064ff-e06f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=dd7064ff-e06f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=252045)

Folks, we can’t beat around the bush. Climate change is an emergency. Here in New Mexico, we've seen the mighty Rio Grande reduced to a trickle. Colorado’s recent wintertime wildfires may have been the most damaging in their state’s history. In fact, climate change spurred extreme weather events that impacted 1 in 4 Americans’ counties last year. **We cannot accept this as the new normal. We cannot pass this burden on to our kids and grandchildren. And we cannot let our best chance to take meaningful action on climate change pass us by.** We need to pass the _Build Back Better Act_ , and we don’t have a moment to waste. I’ve fought hard to make sure this legislation includes measures so folks can affordably electrify their homes, and we can create new green jobs through a Civilian Climate Corps and incentivize clean energy projects. We can preserve our planet for future generations, but only if we act with the urgency that this moment demands. **Will you show your support for bold climate action by making a donation of any amount right now? I promise I won’t stop fighting to get meaningful climate measures across the finish line.** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40456310/324425874/1676867678?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDcwNjRmZi1lMDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fdg-8tu3K0afIAdoLlx20xVIimU1DabvT7Ox3DYnPVI=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40456311/324425875/1676867678?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDcwNjRmZi1lMDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fdg-8tu3K0afIAdoLlx20xVIimU1DabvT7Ox3DYnPVI=)

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Thank you for being in my corner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
We did it, Derek!

I am proud and grateful to have you in my corner and for everything you’ve done to power our campaign. My team put out a call, and you answered it.

Together, we hit our end-of-year goal and began the new year in a strong position. And we did it without accepting a penny from corporate PACs. Because of folks like you, we are one step closer to electing bold, honest leadership to Congress.

This year will be an important one for our campaign. With less than 6 months until the primary election, we’ve got a lot of work ahead of us to reach every PA-17 voter in Western PA and build up our all-star team to victory.

By bringing people together, we can create a government that represents all Pennsylvanians and fights for the common good. By putting people first, we can bring high-quality health care, good-paying union jobs, affordable childcare, well-funded schools, and so much more to Western PA.

Thank you again for standing up for our democracy and freedom.

I look forward to taking the fight into 2022 with you.

— Chris Deluzio

(P.S. Make a contribution today to sustain our grassroots efforts and elect Chris to Congress for PA-17
DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-jan2022?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220107thankyou_CD_op_xx_pt)

Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine.

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-jan2022?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220107thankyou_CD_op_xx]

[https://www.facebook.com/ChrisforPA]
[https://twitter.com/ChrisForPA]
[https://chrisforpa.com]

Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
Chris Deluzio for Congress
PO Box 16210
Pittsburgh, PA 15242
United States

name: Jessica Mason
subject: You dug deep for me, Team New Deal.
body:
2022 is the year that we will demand better.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40457412/324430704/-1288899752?refcode=220107_FR_newyear2022_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTdkMjBjNi1lNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZdtaWypJeSURmpIQdUnKXT2XsOFtGPBwnKoQGlfNm3s=)

Team New Deal, I hope you all had an awesome holiday season and that you’re as excited as I am to dive right into the new year.

The end of Quarter 4 is infamous for being a slow fundraising time — but you stepped up to the plate, you dug deep to pitch in what you could, and you came through for me. _**Your support truly means the world.**_

Now, after a strong finish to 2021, the mid-term election year is officially upon us, and it’s time to hit the ground running. We’ve got just 38 days to go until early voting begins, so we need to ramp up our campaign outreach if we’re going to make sure these early folks cast their ballots for our New Deal by the time February 14 rolls in.

Together, we can demand better for the working class. Affordable housing, accessible healthcare, criminal justice reform, climate action, _and more, _is all within reach. **But I can’t fight in Congress for these bold progressive causes and beyond without you alongside me every step of the way.**

**[It’s full speed ahead from here, so if you’re still with us in the fight for justice and you’re ready for a New Deal, please take a moment to pitch in $22 right away to help kick off this new year with the resources we need to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40457413/324430705/-1288899752?refcode=220107_FR_newyear2022_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTdkMjBjNi1lNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZdtaWypJeSURmpIQdUnKXT2XsOFtGPBwnKoQGlfNm3s=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[CHIP IN $22](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40457414/324430706/-1288899752?refcode=220107_FR_newyear2022_EL3&express_lane=true&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTdkMjBjNi1lNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZdtaWypJeSURmpIQdUnKXT2XsOFtGPBwnKoQGlfNm3s=)** **______[OTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40457415/324430707/-1288899752?refcode=220107_FR_newyear2022_ELothr&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTdkMjBjNi1lNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZdtaWypJeSURmpIQdUnKXT2XsOFtGPBwnKoQGlfNm3s=)** Let's give 2022 everything we've got. ****Jessica****

**Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families.** **As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind.** **TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. clean_body: 2022 is the year that we will demand better. | | | = Team New Deal, I hope you all had an awesome holiday season and that you’re as excited as I am to dive right into the new year. The end of Quarter 4 is infamous for being a slow fundraising time — but you stepped up to the plate, you dug deep to pitch in what you could, and you came through for me. Your support truly means the world. Now, after a strong finish to 2021, the mid-term election year is officially upon us, and it’s time to hit the ground running. We’ve got just 38 days to go until early voting begins, so we need to ramp up our campaign outreach if we’re going to make sure these early folks cast their ballots for our New Deal by the time February 14 rolls in. Together, we can demand better for the working class. Affordable housing, accessible healthcare, criminal justice reform, climate action, and more, is all within reach. But I can’t fight in Congress for these bold progressive causes and beyond without you alongside me every step of the way. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ____= __= Let's give 2022 everything we've got. **Jessica = ********************EXPRESS DONATE to Jessica Mason for Congress****************** ******************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** ---|---|---|--- Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families. As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind. TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. And that starts right here, with Jessica Mason. = __= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | |

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: [Breaking] Social Media bans MORE top conservatives…
body:
...and they won’t be the last.

| Friend,
---
| Last year, **Big Tech silenced President Trump** on social media... ...but this past week might go down as the **most shocking anti-conservative purge** in internet history:
* Twitter banned a _sitting Member of Congress_ , **Republican Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene** ... claiming she spread "misinformation" (without citing any examples.)

* YouTube took down an interview with **Dr. Robert Malone** , the virology expert who _invented_ mRNA technology and now warns against vaccine mandates.

* Facebook shut down a **_children 's_ book publisher** called Heroes of Liberty... for the "crime" of selling kids' books about Ronald Reagan and Amy Coney Barrett.

Big Tech has made it clear: Americans may NOT hear from **conservative political leaders.** You may NOT hear from **any experts who question Far-Left dogma.** And you **ABSOLUTELY may not teach your kids about the good American patriots** who built our nation and shaped our values. **Millions of Turning Point Action activists are standing up and fighting BACK** ... to preserve our voices, our values, and our freedoms. But time is running out to rein in Big Tech. **We 've GOT to have you join this fight too, Friend.** **[Will you help Turning Point Action mobilize millions of conservatives and save our nation... by pitching in $9 or more right away?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1s5jq7jpkae70smd56gmmi3sudpim494b9kbd3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cljm1ob4cth2bs "Will you help Turning Point Action mobilize millions of conservatives and save our nation... by pitching in $9 or more right away?")**

Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.

From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>

Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers
