name: Team Greitens
subject: ICYMI: Latest Missouri Chamber of Commerce Poll Shows Gov. Eric Greitens Holds Big Lead in Missouri Senate GOP Primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: Latest Missouri Chamber of Commerce Poll Shows Gov. Eric Greitens Holds Big Lead in Missouri Senate GOP Primary
---
| St. Louis, MO-- Recent polling data released by the Missouri Chamber of Commerce shows that former Governor & Navy SEAL Eric Greitens holds a significant lead in the GOP primary for Missouri's open US Senate seat.
According to [Missouri Scout](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oo9EZCx8314hH67QnGPyOxVvxqLepX5CVi-1YIxg8FoXdPYBX425WpMg2eroHD4pCRLobFiD--oEdILvgyEjDjFZf9pF246x4GFk1oAlf7WRsIN1dfdhhywj1-BtpquaVqtoEJoTOqA=&c=zRYN8Zyj1DJetIgNm5dqEyIf4qeA6PBvs15h0h2auj0wrmKfWrD5gQ==&ch=q-pJxjoIUgyAP8xvfvowMFjmfImDb5TbMYt-CPNhJJJ-2s_oWcAddQ==), Governor Greitens currently enjoys the highest favorability rating (51%) among any Missouri GOP candidate. In a head-to-head matchup, Governor Greitens leads the GOP field with a 12 point lead over his nearest opponent in Missouri's 2022 U.S. Senate GOP primary election.
"Governor Greitens is winning because he's the only candidate to commit to voting against Mitch McConnell as GOP leader. He's the only candidate committed to securing our elections and visited the Arizona election audit. He's the only candidate to have visited Biden's Border Crisis twice- on both the US and Mexico side of the southern border. The people of Missouri don't want another career politician RINO in Washington. They want someone who will stand up and fight and that's exactly what Eric Greitens is going to do as US Senator," said Dylan Johnson, Greitens' campaign manager.
---

Eric Greitens Holds Big Lead in Missouri Senate GOP Primary | St. Louis, MO-- Recent polling data released by the Missouri Chamber of Commerce shows that former Governor & Navy SEAL Eric Greitens holds a significant lead in the GOP primary for Missouri's open US Senate seat. According to ==, Governor Greitens currently enjoys the highest favorability rating (51%) among any Missouri GOP candidate. In a head-to-head matchup, Governor Greitens leads the GOP field with a 12 point lead over his nearest opponent in Missouri's 2022 U.S. Senate GOP primary election. "Governor Greitens is winning because he's the only candidate to commit to voting against Mitch McConnell as GOP leader. He's the only candidate committed to securing our elections and visited the Arizona election audit. He's the only candidate to have visited Biden's Border Crisis twice- on both the US and Mexico side of the southern border. The people of Missouri don't want another career politician RINO in Washington. They want someone who will stand up and fight and that's exactly what Eric Greitens is going to do as US Senator," said Dylan Johnson, Greitens' campaign manager. | | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == | | | | Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate | PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 | | | Sent by mailto:team@ericgreitens.com powered by

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Ending our first quarter strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I hope you and your loved ones enjoyed a safe and happy new year! Last week, we closed the books on our first quarterly fundraising report of this re-election campaign. I wanted to take a moment to thank this grassroots team for helping us end the quarter – and the year – on such a strong note. With your help, we reached our end-of-year goal! Peter,

I hope you and your loved ones enjoyed a safe and happy new year!

Last week, we closed the books on our first quarterly fundraising report of this re-election campaign. I wanted to take a moment to thank this grassroots team for helping us end the quarter – and the year – on such a strong note. With your help, we reached our end-of-year goal!

I am beyond grateful for the support I've received since announcing my re-election just a few months ago. Kentuckians from across the Commonwealth have stepped up to join us in our work to build a better Kentucky, and I'm honored to have you alongside me.

So, Peter: thank you again for your support. I look forward to seeing what we can accomplish together in this new year.

Thanks,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-q1-2022?refcode=em22_220105_eoyty_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220105_eoyty_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Russell for Senate HQ
subject: Let’s talk about the filibuster…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
body:
Hey Peter,
There is a big problem in Washington, and it is time that SOMEONE did something about it. We’re sure you’re aware that the Senate is at a 50-50 tie between Democrats and Republicans, but did you know that those 50 Democratic Senators represent FORTY MILLION more Americans than the 50 Republican Senators do? That means that despite the popularity of policies, like voter reform or climate action, nothing substantial can pass the Senate.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email]
This is not how democracy works. It is well past time that we do something to ensure that what is actually in the best interest of the American people can pass through Congress without partisan obstruction. We MUST reform the filibuster.
It is time to protect voting rights, abortion access, and our planet. The only way to do that is to change the unfair rules. If you’re with us, can you chip in $15 to Ken’s campaign right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email&amount=15]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email]
Our founders would not – and did not – support minority rule. It is time that this arcane rule, which is NOT in the constitution, be reformed so that it works for EVERYONE.
Are you with us? Donate whatever you can immediately! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email]
Thanks so much,
Russell For Senate HQ
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kr?refcode=220107-email]
Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today.

body:

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Our work on school construction continues
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter,

My proudest achievement as Treasurer has been leading a once-in-a-generation effort to rebuild and transform Rhode Island schools. The school construction initiative I launched has allocated funding to repair or replace 189 schools across 28 districts, serving more than 100,000 students and creating more than 28,000 jobs.

Our students are the future of our state, and every child deserves to go to a school that is warm, safe, and will prepare them for a bright future. **That's why yesterday, we announced legislation to extend and expand the school construction program in Rhode Island so we can repair and rebuild even more schools.**

The legislation we just announced is the next step toward ensuring every student in Rhode Island has access to a high-quality education that prepares them for the 21st-century workforce. This includes more investment in facilities for science, math, arts and technology and also new incentives to build more energy efficient school buildings.

As Governor, one of my top priorities will be strengthening Rhode Island's economy by improving our education system. Team, I wouldn't ask if it weren't important. **Everything we do from now through the 12th is a matter of extreme importance.** A strong showing on our first public filing means we can continue to build this campaign's forward momentum and get one step closer to sending an experienced, driven leader like Tom to Annapolis to fight for Marylanders.

Tom will often say he's from the school of "Get Sh*t Done" — and he's right. He's spent his entire career working for a more equitable, fair, and just future. From his time as a civil rights attorney prosecuting high profile cases of police brutality, to his time as the first Latino president of the Montgomery County Council fighting for affordable housing, to serving as Maryland's Labor secretary where he helped pass the nation's first living wage law, **Tom Gets Sh*t Done.**

We have an opportunity to send Tom to Annapolis to reform executive leadership in Maryland and seize a once-in-a-generation opportunity to ensure that our government _works_ for Maryland families — **but we can't seize that opportunity without the resources to get there.**

**_[This is our most important deadline yet. Will you become one of our first 2022 donors, and pitch in to make sure our campaign has the resources to win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40458944/324438012/-1884169283?refcode=bpi-em-20220107-Filing-Deadline-1-ND-B&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDY5NTAzMy1lYzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MDvdwC3SDf_-1ebe9nC8W4-N9AUPpKf7Et98x9F7sg=)_**

---
Peter,

You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. T**he increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America,** which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington.

_Their top target?_ Missouri’s soon-to-be vacated U.S. Senate seat currently held by a Republican. America, and Missouri, literally cannot afford for the Democrats to come in and take this seat. **We must band together and support a rock-solid conservative who is prepared for the job - Missouri’s own, Congressman Billy Long.**

[**I’ve already joined Billy on the campaign trail, and plan to continue, but need grassroots conservatives like you to join us.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=085470e0aa4443189e47b6159ab1651d&_e=Y_CT36-mYF8pfGjnb4LBe7KYXfAW_Txaa8hPNr82KybHEqHMyXs3X65xiYu7idx-_lMRg-4UAhL5Xvzgy3s3zCi82m-uZWd26puXGv2BhIkcxQZno-zxvlyGYWgVJMBwufz5chBm25PmrdnbbVbDr4wWlSisV68MpXZajbbpSmOvA7UcEd60ltlcNcQwXXJtmIjDrjSdhocNTwMokb-D2Ts6ZoZPXClzlICb-cwttbNuSVY-dyfgZPsynzANNo4-ZpEktVRZf6UoqGcDuZeq-NMDU1FgFGEFcTjIToqY1B616ypsnev6Nrvicym9dM0KlO3e8KhXd4l40Diqn5Av-ciCRx6xChSZ8xbT85uLtd5-97k8rzjwXXgRDNwkq-nNM_OA6Vtw8J8ojWnZ1DD7xNCNJfHUeR9V4YU6-Nh2JVF5CbFjm9LoKdjOsv0IlISIfrNfkfIO_1PXqICPjCYVDA%3D%3D)

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=085470e0aa4443189e47b6159ab1651d&_e=Y_CT36-mYF8pfGjnb4LBe7KYXfAW_Txaa8hPNr82KybHEqHMyXs3X65xiYu7idx-_lMRg-4UAhL5Xvzgy3s3zCi82m-uZWd26puXGv2BhIkcxQZno-zxvlyGYWgVJMBwufz5chBm25PmrdnbbVbDr4wWlSisV68MpXZajbbpSmOvA7UcEd60ltlcNcQwXXJtmIjDrjSdhocNTwMokb-D2Ts6ZoZPXClzlICb-cwttbNuSVY-dyfgZPsynzANNo4-3XHerXTKVPowF06vuLcfg5FmJp24eq1NHITd68wxGrUcrSbEKxa6sq9fnuBDs0wrev-XrFxkZm6nbbXPoKnC5V6rP8vAbyHOWdicuJy8UgotwufUONUNpPo3khLEG_F3um-LVZ619dd8ckwq9ebfayFqhEsz0RZ48_phXE18DrakcYSdinGT_ukOWKF8GU04uyXWqVcS987zKv0YoSNLFg%3D%3D)
Your support is vital to not only Billy Long, but the Republican Party in what’s set to be one of the _TOUGHEST_ Senate races in the country. [**Will you join me by chipping in $10 or more right now to Billy Long for Senate?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=085470e0aa4443189e47b6159ab1651d&_e=Y_CT36-mYF8pfGjnb4LBe7KYXfAW_Txaa8hPNr82KybHEqHMyXs3X65xiYu7idx-_lMRg-4UAhL5Xvzgy3s3zCi82m-uZWd26puXGv2BhIkcxQZno-zxvlyGYWgVJMBwufz5chBm25PmrdnbbVbDr4wWlSisV68MpXZajbbpSmOvA7UcEd60ltlcNcQwXXJtmIjDrjSdhocNTwMokb-D2Ts6ZoZPXClzlICb-cwttbNuSVY-dyfgZPsynzANNo4-aePd5D6q2iX9XQOG9k4w0vWkBv7geFV8FjUdEVYJZMIrioc6X3YgFHxjpqhCiW31okHPGOHfXaGgNe9b-R4ym3GlZX-uPGIW0il-tYGBJRQrtf_lokrvegAKovmpOyZJpKWlcKJ1XfuC9uonxQSNAf1V_GzYOyylgg7DOupJe8wKTQNk6Szv8zSg8Xkp_s0sa6lBeAupfACPc2gfBwnEgQ%3D%3D)

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=085470e0aa4443189e47b6159ab1651d&_e=Y_CT36-mYF8pfGjnb4LBe7KYXfAW_Txaa8hPNr82KybHEqHMyXs3X65xiYu7idx-_lMRg-4UAhL5Xvzgy3s3zCi82m-uZWd26puXGv2BhIkcxQZno-zxvlyGYWgVJMBwufz5chBm25PmrdnbbVbDr4wWlSisV68MpXZajbbpSmOvA7UcEd60ltlcNcQwXXJtmIjDrjSdhocNTwMokb-D2Ts6ZoZPXClzlICb-cwttbNuSVY-dyfgZPsynzANNo4-0axbjFywPp1KWh4Oq4R-kxl5Py1G4lOAQxAEEg_N6Y7rWCwP6KfngkYkqxAUcAVszVHecssudGXlypV9Diy0K6gt-2J1yxP4_bB8BjXhP_9iV_hKth8_UbEd4UZWSg7WnixpG3LyPfO4LCZgG6Dj3q95lYjaEg8DNm2EBXJf1o5kzu4rDvKfjlcOZRrW4WDCGV53pdwLRofQYb3S93uzzQ%3D%3D)
From day one in Washington, **Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States.** He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. **His loyalty to the American people has never wavered.**

_I’m writing to tell you this:_ **If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp.** His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, **but he’s never been of Washington.**

He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life.

_Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right?_ **Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first.** That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Peter.

This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. [**The only way we’re going to be able to keep Missouri in Republican hands is if conservatives like you join our team right now.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=085470e0aa4443189e47b6159ab1651d&_e=Y_CT36-mYF8pfGjnb4LBe7KYXfAW_Txaa8hPNr82KybHEqHMyXs3X65xiYu7idx-_lMRg-4UAhL5Xvzgy3s3zCi82m-uZWd26puXGv2BhIkcxQZno-zxvlyGYWgVJMBwufz5chBm25PmrdnbbVbDr4wWlSisV68MpXZajbbpSmOvA7UcEd60ltlcNcQwXXJtmIjDrjSdhocNTwMokb-D2Ts6ZoZPXClzlICb-cwttbNuSVY-dyfgZPsynzANNo4-feSUqQDN6DQugYR1FdL1__dMf5WaBfV0_3Uc29UKoRzAFGgFPwaW-LWjoKLs8mMrsuA9qppHtzKoznVOejvGYDzH7sjWir18iYbZtitPob3fgz812-Plg_M2_8p2C0sluP4C2a6dAjXd63nhUrTfvCpl1GcJOZKjQ6P3hbqYSe2lNRCOp9EK69bseSUemoe1YWOKb08nK4LEyNK3yVbrDQ%3D%3D)

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=085470e0aa4443189e47b6159ab1651d&_e=Y_CT36-mYF8pfGjnb4LBe7KYXfAW_Txaa8hPNr82KybHEqHMyXs3X65xiYu7idx-_lMRg-4UAhL5Xvzgy3s3zCi82m-uZWd26puXGv2BhIkcxQZno-zxvlyGYWgVJMBwufz5chBm25PmrdnbbVbDr4wWlSisV68MpXZajbbpSmOvA7UcEd60ltlcNcQwXXJtmIjDrjSdhocNTwMokb-D2Ts6ZoZPXClzlICb-cwttbNuSVY-dyfgZPsynzANNo4-nHm7zC-rBMmNtq9P746haHdgZ6hzryOhqaRqoMOehDsVvtZgxN9fr6BpRmbnfc9Bj56GIGcBlF9v8yA47UWJU59-2LVWBHhJWvcQeBRC0VC3EOskSLRqzoZtWXUOYkWt4pjfjTs7nRM5EidPNzLQNr4Vr2DonDbv-CRZCdYoU3pH0ESKhAIgIjXo3VXIyOtCf5spR5rdCuzmVZUeU3ZJgA%3D%3D)
Even President Trump is confident that we can and will take back the Senate, but that plan becomes increasingly difficult if the Democrats swoop in and buy and lie their way into one of our red-state seats. **Let me tell you, Democrats already have their eyes and pocketbooks set on Missouri.**

They aren’t wasting any time using big corporations and dark-money donors to pad their campaign accounts. [**Peter, that’s why I am counting on you to step up immediately, asking that you give generously to ensure my friend Billy Long has the resources he needs to keep Missouri RED for the Republican Party.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=085470e0aa4443189e47b6159ab1651d&_e=Y_CT36-mYF8pfGjnb4LBe7KYXfAW_Txaa8hPNr82KybHEqHMyXs3X65xiYu7idx-_lMRg-4UAhL5Xvzgy3s3zCi82m-uZWd26puXGv2BhIkcxQZno-zxvlyGYWgVJMBwufz5chBm25PmrdnbbVbDr4wWlSisV68MpXZajbbpSmOvA7UcEd60ltlcNcQwXXJtmIjDrjSdhocNTwMokb-D2Ts6ZoZPXClzlICb-cwttbNuSVY-dyfgZPsynzANNo4-I3BT3xDKObt5K0Q_zC0isFJhFyysCvihvIjMZtiynSlWzsPNdRsX-CcuvstqXNZBtReB9pN5Uc3ljrSV5L1TPbZ_A739bL_2kmMfk4SzybR3rpjCDiNS8g1ZJyjNHBihTzl8n6ijCW1Qh3emMVoB8bihg1AE633Kn3uva6qLBLGBK4x7ELfO3ZGBgjej8dgrDRBwMRjRjlpHr7hOypfISw%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Friends — I hope you’re enjoying the new year. I wanted to try and catch you before things get too busy. During the new year folks talk a lot about resolutions and goals. And while it may be a new year, our goal hasn’t changed: _defending the Senate and trying to flip a few Republican held seats in order to expand our majority._ In 2021, Democrats passed the _American Rescue Plan_ which increased the Child Tax Credit during the worst public health crisis in decades and we passed the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ to repair our crumbling infrastructure and fight climate change. And in 2022, our sights are set even higher. But we won’t be able to accomplish all that we have planned if we don’t have the majority. That’s why I’m reaching out today. My friends at Defend the Senate could use our help to get off to a strong start in the new year and if there’s anything you can spare I know they would appreciate it. [_**So what do you say********? Will you make a contribution of $10 or more to protect our Senate majority this year? clean_body: | = Friends — I hope you’re enjoying the new year. I wanted to try and catch you before things get too busy. During the new year folks talk a lot about resolutions and goals. And while it may be a new year, our goal hasn’t changed: defending the Senate and trying to flip a few Republican held seats in order to expand our majority. In 2021, Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan which increased the Child Tax Credit during the worst public health crisis in decades and we passed the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act to repair our crumbling infrastructure and fight climate change. And in 2022, our sights are set even higher. But we won’t be able to accomplish all that we have planned if we don’t have the majority. That’s why I’m reaching out today. My friends at Defend the Senate could use our help to get off to a strong start in the new year and if there’s anything you can spare I know they would appreciate it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We have a long road ahead of us this year friends. But if we come together now I know there’s nothing that can get in our way. Thank you for all you do, James Carville Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. SMP 700 13th St NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: They blacklisted me--are you next?
body:
It was only a matter of time before Twitter's Big Tech fascists came for me.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu1ngd1urmjc8fqli37tmks77aurakb7bduudslo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thgmgoj2cb3ckombdlgsmp6cdbmmlhb8sr3ceqbaddkscqj9or2m1jbcddmmqoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5jcgrreoj66hib6ob7m2qmash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2gnl3tuub07alqjlvmft27sqff9ba7c49lr7jq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs) [**TAKE ACTION: Join Marjorie Taylor Greene’s Blacklisted Battalion NOW!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ctrlv0hdc2qp44mqln2ujbcpm764cm3ura70lo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs)
Patriot, It was only a matter of time before Twitter's Big Tech fascists came for me. My name is Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene and I’ve officially been blacklisted in Washington. I’ll cut straight to the chase – I need your immediate help to fight back against the forces that seek to silence conservative voices like yours and mine. **That’s because, under the cover of the New Year’s weekend, Twitter took the opportunity to PERMANENTLY BAN me from their platform, just as they did to President Trump!** My crime? I DARED to challenge the narrative of the COVID tyrants about deaths related to their so-called “safe and effective vaccine.” Big Tech can’t stop the truth. Nor can the Communist Democrats and their friends in the Fake News Media. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu5c8uuk4toh1gtl4ms1uq8q9nenb1ukmpgkl7mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs) **I won’t back down, I won’t stop fighting, and I will always SPEAK THE TRUT****H!** ** ** **But I need to know – are you with me?** [**If you want to fight with me to save America, I need you to join my Blacklisted Battalion RIGHT AWAY!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zth8lb844cpk58d2vgg5r6nakt173njl9kg5ustg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs) [**JOIN THE BLACKLISTED BATTALION**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6b5cupl7tgmcsfof2ig77u07enbbuickimvch1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs) The champagne socialists in Silicon Valley will stop at nothing to silence conservatives like you and me. I've already been one of their favorite targets. Before I was even elected to Congress, they kicked me off social media for posing with one of those “scary” AR-15s... In January 2021, they suspended me for objecting to the 2020 election results... And when I filed articles of impeachment against Sleepy Joe Biden the day after he took office, the D.C. Swamp has been after me ever since. I’ve been repeatedly censored by Big Tech, attacked by the Fake News Media, and condemned by Communist Democrats and RINOs alike. **In fact, I’m the FIRST Member of Congress to be BANNED from Twitter.** And NOW, it’s only a matter of time before they try to throw me off every digital platform...
But no matter how many times they’ve tried to take me down, I keep getting back up because I know I’ve got a country to save, and millions of patriotic Americans like you have my six. **That’s why I’m organizing this Blacklisted Battalion – and I need YOU to join me in fighting back against the Big Tech fascists and Communist Democrats today. ** [**Help me save our country by joining my Blacklisted Battalion NOW!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z24rei18lb1qahc47dj62vn7r1rcbsfpg1iufma8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs) [**JOIN THE BLACKLISTED BATTALION**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2d0b1utjsocrmf0rcm3um0ip8nhs1ghjoaivoro_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs) Once you’ve enlisted, I’ll do everything in my power to keep you updated about what’s REALLY going on in Congress, while I’m fighting to stop Sleepy Joe, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the radical left from destroying America. I hate to say it, but email is now the best and most reliable way for patriots like you and me to stay connected during this era of “cancel culture” craziness. **But even if I have to handwrite a letter to every member of my Blacklisted Battalion, I’m willing to do it, because REAL America needs to know about the schemes the radical Left is inflicting upon our country.** That’s the level I’m willing to go to save America. And since you’re reading this, I know you’re willing to do the same... **Will you take a stand against the Big Tech fascists and Communist Democrats from destroying the country we know and love?** [**I hope so, because I NEED you to join my Blacklisted Battalion IMMEDIATELY!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1v5psqrrajlajjblsiqdcjodrlo1l6fsofpab00_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs) [**JOIN THE BLACKLISTED BATTALION**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjltc2o2kdkhrlv1fi1moc59u09pinq3gtbfi14o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs) Please don’t delay and think “I can get to this later.” Like I mentioned, it’s only a matter of time before Big Tech tries to boot me from EVERY digital platform. If you want to fight with me to save our great nation from the radical Left, you and I must band together NOW before it’s too late. It will only take you 30 seconds to become a member of my beloved Blacklisted Battalion... Can I count on you? **For Freedom,** **Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene** P.S. If Twitter’s censors can blacklist a sitting president and a duly-elected congresswoman, what do you think they can do to you? That’s why it’s critically important that conservatives like you and me stick together - because they can’t stop us from speaking the truth! [**Help me drive Twitter’s censors CRAZY and keep fighting for our conservative values in Congress by joining my Blacklisted Battalion NOW!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7l206d4h470qgge3kehmsd5argftfvmsu6nk5co_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs) [**JOIN THE FIGHT NOW**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl7c3b8489fbjgpm6md9i3pbescn4q35qnn9fuug_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zncn0bu96tfbcf70hs6iblgc7d6nkg2qb2e6i210_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge4o34c9h2bs)
---

Friend, today is my daughter Bridie’s 40th birthday, so her campaign manager let me send out an email! | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40460178/324442927/-870670775?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220107birthday_JF_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGIyMGI2NC1lZjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtfwnfteC9IVf1b5WptY_Sn5GcMYFgTZ4NG_k2MCBiY=)
---
People often say that I must be so proud of our six kids for all they are doing. It isn’t pride that I have, rather true joy that they are living such full and unique lives. While each has substantial accomplishments, that was not my goal as their mom. My goal was to raise _decent people_ \- a phrase I learned from our old Irish neighbor.
In this email, I want to talk about Bridie as she celebrates the big 4-0 today.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40460179/324442930/-870670775?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220107birthday_JF_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGIyMGI2NC1lZjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtfwnfteC9IVf1b5WptY_Sn5GcMYFgTZ4NG_k2MCBiY=)
---
When Bridie first told me she was going to run for Congress against Elise Stefanik, I admit I was nervous. I knew Elise was formidable because she has raised so much money in Washington and doesn’t seem to have a moral compass. Stefanik continually puts her political career ahead of the wellbeing of the country - or so it seems to me.
_**But the more I thought about it, the more I realized that Bridie has been taking on challenges for the right reasons all her life.**_
When she was told in the 4th grade that girls were not allowed to play football, she kept pressing until she was allowed to play. If memory serves, she was better than most of the boys when she got the chance to compete.
As an elite athlete, Bridie worked through BOCES, Saratoga High and then Adirondack Community College while skating around the world representing our country.
In dealing with one of the hardest things anyone could ever face, she publicly told her story of being abused. And then she did even more.
**She spent seven years working to pass the Child Victims Act, that enables crime victims to hold predators accountable, in New York.**
I am so pleased that Bridie has continued to choose a course in life that puts others first.
I know she will make us all proud as our next Congresswoman.
Happy birthday, Bridie!
[**Will you help me celebrate Bridie’s 40th birthday by chipping in $40 to her campaign to replace Elise Stefanik?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40460180/324442932/-870670775?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220107birthday_JF_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGIyMGI2NC1lZjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtfwnfteC9IVf1b5WptY_Sn5GcMYFgTZ4NG_k2MCBiY=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Katzenmeyer?=
subject: ICYMI: News and Updates From Team Katzenmeyer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Katzenmeyer for Wisconsin
body:
Here's your weekly roundup of important stories you may have missed both locally and nationally! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jessicaforwis/icymi-news-and-updates-from-team-katzenmeyer?e=42a933bda9)
---
| |
---
| **Hello!**

Here's your weekly roundup of important stories you may have missed both locally and nationally!
---
| |
## [**Remembering the One-Year Anniversary of the Jan. 6th Insurrection**](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=54b2534016&e=42a933bda9)
---
| [ ](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=001de741f6&e=42a933bda9)
---
| Just over a year ago, on January 6th 2021, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to overturn the 2020 election, resulting in multiple deaths and hundreds injured. Five officers lost their lives, one during the attack and four by suicide afterward. We must never forget that this attack was fueled by President Trump and Republicans who continued to push the Big Lie and would rather see our country destroyed than lose a fair election. Early on Thursday, [President Biden said Donald Trump "has created and spread a web of lies about the 2020 election."](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=7b68416980&e=42a933bda9) We must remember the attack on our democracy did not end on January 6th. We still must be just as vigilant as ever.
---
|
---
|
## [**Liberal Radio Coming to Waukesha**](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=93924aefec&e=42a933bda9)
---
| [ ](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=2ba2af982b&e=42a933bda9)
---
| Mike Crute, former News Talk Radio (1510 AM) owner has purchased WAUK 540 AM to start a liberal talk radio station locally in Waukesha. His radio station can reach as far south as Chicago and as far north as Green Bay. This new station will not have as many restrictions as 1510 AM did allowing him more room for success with this type of radio content. As discussed in the following article from Urban Milwaukee, even though the location seems a little odd to host a liberal talk radio, Waukesha is home to the 3rd most democrats in the state of Wisconsin (just behind Milwaukee and Madison). This station will reach far beyond Waukesha to appeal to liberals across the state. Crute has called his station “The Sha” and hopes the term/nickname takes off.
---
|
---
|
## [**Senate Will Vote on Filibuster**](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=1158442ec8&e=42a933bda9)
---
| [ ](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=4f5cfd5ca9&e=42a933bda9)
---
| Chuck Schumer - Senate Majority Leader - announced that the senate will vote on changes to the senate’s legislative filibuster rules by Jan 17th. However, Schumer was met with opposition from two democratic senators, Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema. He also expects opposition from Republican senators regarding this but hopes that the senate will vote to “protect the foundation of our democracy: free and fair elections.”
---
|
---
| If you have stories you'd like us to share next week, email us at info@jessicaforwis.com.

Have a great rest of your week and keep up the good fight!

Sincerely,
**Team Katzenmeyer**
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=b58c4748a5&e=42a933bda9 "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| **Follow us for updates!**
---

name: Roger Marshall
subject: quick request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/17ddd1670a515c98/1d8e7997c416c004c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
# **Friend — Our team is about to have our first strategy meeting of 2022. Ahead of then I wanted to make a quick request of our top supporters. **

---
One of the things we’ll be talking about in this meeting is our first digital ad buys of the year. These ads will fuel our early efforts to expose how badly Joe Biden and the Democrats have _failed_ the American people. **Will you chip in just $5 to support the effort? $5 sponsors five digital ads, and if every person who reads this steps up, think about how many voters we’ll be able to reach. **
---
[**CHIP IN $5 »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/17ddd1670a515c98/6f46ba77a8fd04f5c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
Biden and the Democrats are already spending _millions_ per day to keep and expand their power. The future of our country depends on Republicans fighting back and winning. **$5 means we can run five more digital ads that expose the nightmare their liberal agenda has created. **
When I sit down with the team soon, I hope I’ll able to tell them this email grew our ad budget considerably. **[Please chip in now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/17ddd1670a515c98/7e31199bf10e922cc3d6b838967d376c/37973) **

subject: Our Unprecedented Financial Position
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
With the legislative session having officially kicked off this past Tuesday, there's plenty making the news... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/our-unprecedented-financial-position?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Our Unprecedented Financial Position_**
---
|
---
_Chairman Kyle Hupfer recently spoke with All INdiana Politics about the automatic taxpayer refund coming to Hoosiers. _
| With the legislative session having officially kicked off this past Tuesday, there's plenty making the news. But one thing I find myself paying attention to the most is all the talk about the _unprecedented_ financial position the state is in thanks to the fiscally conservative leadership of Governor Holcomb and our Republican-led General Assembly.

As you know, Governor Holcomb [announced](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=35c148f9f3&e=1acd9bb3d6) last month that 4.3 million taxpayers would be receiving a $125 refund after they file their 2021 taxes, putting more than $545 million back in the pockets of hardworking Hoosiers. And just this past Tuesday, he [announced](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ff3223796d&e=1acd9bb3d6) that he would be seeking to change legislation to ensure 900,000 more Hoosiers would receive that same refund.

With a fiscal environment like this, it’s no wonder people are moving to Indiana in droves. In its most recent study, UHaul [found](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6895d770c8&e=1acd9bb3d6) that Indiana ranked sixth nationally for inbound migration, up from 12th last year. It’s clear that Indiana is becoming the place to live, work, and stay.

Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend.

Best,

Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| _**Announcing the 2022 Next Level Agenda**_
---
|
---
_Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch (L) and Governor Eric Holcomb (R) discuss the 2022 Next Level Agenda._
|
---
_Gov. Holcomb elaborates on his 2022 Next Level Agenda._
| **Governor Holcomb** was joined by **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** for the announcement of his 2022**** Next Level Agenda this past Monday. "We’ve got a lot of momentum, we want to make sure we’re doing everything we can to keep that momentum going forward," **Gov. Holcomb** stated. The 2022 Next Level Indiana Agenda includes the following five pillars:
1. Economic development
2. Education, training, and workforce development
3. Public health and wellness development
4. Community development
5. Good government service

---
| | "The 2022 Next Level Agenda builds a foundation for a healthier state. These priorities will cultivate a more competitive environment to attract new economic development opportunities, establish better access to public health resources and help connect Hoosiers to better employment and training opportunities. Our efforts will advance Indiana’s reputation as a state Hoosiers want to live, work, play, study and stay.”
\- **Gov. Eric Holcomb**
---
| _**Joining Public Servants' Prayer for Annual Statehouse Prayer**_
---
|
---
_Governor Holcomb offers a prayer Tuesday morning._
| **Governor Holcomb** joined Public Servants' Prayer for the 18th Annual Statehouse Prayer Service this past Tuesday for the opening day of the 2022 legislative session.
---
|
---
| **_ICYMI: Hupfer Statement on 2022 Next Level Agenda_** Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer offered this statement following Governor Eric Holcomb's announcement of his 2022 Next Level Agenda.
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Remembering Carl Brizzi**_
---
|
---
| "Carl Brizzi had an unrivaled passion for justice, public safety, and the City of Indianapolis. His sudden passing is a tremendous loss to all that knew him. His legacy will be long-living through the numerous young lawyers that he mentored, trained, and gave opportunities to. I offer my condolences to his wife Kim, their children, and all of those who called Carl a friend." \- **Chairman Kyle Hupfer **
---
|
---
| **_2022 Session Begins_** This past Tuesday, state legislators returned to the statehouse for the start of the 2022 legislative session. This is a "short," non-budget session that will last approximately 10 weeks.

If you need to contact your legislators to let them know what issues are important to you this session, click the button below.

---
|
---
| _**Next Week: 2022 State of the State**_
---
|
---
| On Tuesday, January 11, 2022, **Governor Holcomb** will deliver his sixth State of the State address to the General Assembly. You won't want to miss this year's address as he lays out his plans to continue taking Indiana to the Next Level!
---
|

| _**2022 Congress of Counites**_
---
|
---
| Registration is **open** for the Indiana Republican Party's 2022 Congress of Counties!

This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates, and grassroots activists is scheduled for Friday, February 25 through Saturday, February 26, 2022, at the historic [French Lick Resort](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3cac4555f8&e=1acd9bb3d6) in French Lick, Ind.

**Thankfully** , general admission for the event was **not** impacted by **Bidenflation** and remains at [$100 per person](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a116512c58&e=1acd9bb3d6).** **

You'll want to experience the 2022 Congress of Counties to kick off the election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics to help you and your county party **win** and keep Indiana on the **right** track. The full schedule will be released in the coming weeks with...stay tuned!

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This is good news. But we can’t take anything for granted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Peter,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184365:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184365:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)**

We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. _**[Can we count on you to act now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184365:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)**_

If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish.

[**Chip in $3 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184366:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)
[**HELP TEAM HERSCHEL BUILD EVEN MORE MOMENTUM**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184365:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)
Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the _MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION._

We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. **[Keep in mind that the future of the nation hangs in the balance because the Georgia Senate race will determine if Republicans can win the majority and get America back on the right track.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184365:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)**

[**Chip in $3 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184366:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)
[**Chip in $11 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184367:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)
[**Chip in $34 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184368:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)
[**Chip in $75 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184369:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)
Thank you for your support,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59184365:JqNEEEEoN:m:1:3253819041:828C9DB527D941590F30D5B4C256BF44:r)

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Peter, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? Friend,

Kelly and Pres. Trump were talking about the disaster Lisa Murkowski has been for Alaska in 2021. No Senator has done more damage for their state than Murkowski:

* She was the tie-breaking vote to confirm the Interior Secretary, Haaland, who has blocked all oil and gas development in ANWR and on federal lands
* Haaland is pushing to close off 60 million additional acres of Alaska federal public lands to hunting next year and refusing to honor U.S. Supreme Court decisions upholding Alaska’s right to manage its navigable waters.
* Murkowski confirmed the Secretary of Agriculture, who has blocked all access to the Tongass National Forest for logging and tourism
* Murkowski was the tie-breaking vote to confirm Dept. of Justice leader Vanita Gupta, an anti-police activist who has testified in support of defunding police departments
* Murkowski previously championed the appointment of US federal court judge Sharon Gleason who this year, killed the Willow oil project and ruled that federal agencies, not the state, have game management authority in Alaska.

Murkowski’s actions speak louder than words: She’s all about her popularity with DC insiders. She doesn’t care about the people of her state, let alone what’s best for the nation.

Kelly and Pres. Trump are inviting you to invest in America by turning Alaska’s Senate Seat into a reliable America First, constitutionalist, pro-energy, pro-jobs vote! You can help us defeat the Disaster from Alaska by ENTERING TO WIN to meet Kelly and Pres. Trump in BEAUTIFUL Palm Beach, Florida at Mar-a-Lago.

This might be your FINAL CHANCE to enter... DON’T WAIT!**

clean_body: | | | | Kelly for Alaska & Pres. Trump want your help. | Friend, Kelly and Pres. Trump were talking about the disaster Lisa Murkowski has been for Alaska in 2021. No Senator has done more damage for their state than Murkowski: She was the tie-breaking vote to confirm the Interior Secretary, Haaland, who has blocked all oil and gas development in ANWR and on federal lands Haaland is pushing to close off 60 million additional acres of Alaska federal public lands to hunting next year and refusing to honor U.S. Supreme Court decisions upholding Alaska’s right to manage its navigable waters. Murkowski confirmed the Secretary of Agriculture, who has blocked all access to the Tongass National Forest for logging and tourism Murkowski was the tie-breaking vote to confirm Dept. of Justice leader Vanita Gupta, an anti-police activist who has testified in support of defunding police departments Murkowski previously championed the appointment of US federal court judge Sharon Gleason who this year, killed the Willow oil project and ruled that federal agencies, not the state, have game management authority in Alaska. Murkowski’s actions speak louder than words: She’s all about her popularity with DC insiders. She doesn’t care about the people of her state, let alone what’s best for the nation. Kelly and Pres. Trump are inviting you to invest in America by turning Alaska’s Senate Seat into a reliable America First, constitutionalist, pro-energy, pro-jobs vote! You can help us defeat the Disaster from Alaska by ENTERING TO WIN to meet Kelly and Pres. Trump in BEAUTIFUL Palm Beach, Florida at Mar-a-Lago. This might be your FINAL CHANCE to enter... DON’T WAIT! MEMBER ID:**2022127-45 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT ENTRY STATUS: INCOMPLETE** ** With less than a month left till the BIGGEST event of the year. We hope you will step up and enter. Thank you, Team Tshibaka P.S. If you win: We’ll cover your flight, lodging, campaign event ticket, and a photo with President Trump! | | | | ==

name: Team Kilmer
subject: How we safeguard our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Yesterday's infamous anniversary of the deadly January 6 insurrection is a reminder we can't take our democracy for granted. Donald Trump's presidency and the insurrection were a wake-up call that exposed the cracks in our democratic institutions.

No one is above the law -- including the president. Elected officials shouldn't be able to use their public office for personal profit or be able to interfere in independent investigations. And they _definitely_ shouldn't be allowed to solicit help from foreign countries to interfere in our elections.

That's why Derek and the House passed the Protecting Our Democracy Act last month. If signed into law, it will safeguard our democracy for **generations** by restoring the guardrails of our democratic systems.

[**Now, we need the Senate to take up this critical pro-democracy legislation. Will you sign our petition to tell the Senate to take up the Protecting Our Democracy Act for a vote?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4wsLxFHVwv5NF9USlgRatpjVnMTOQx3qz-ONcus3P_s=/DfdL6Vc91RiQ16AsTugw5r8T-OMb1yWslyprvyMytaI=?ms=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})
[SIGN ON](https://act.myngp.com/el/4wsLxFHVwv5NF9USlgRatpjVnMTOQx3qz-ONcus3P_s=/DfdL6Vc91RiQ16AsTugw5r8T-OMb1yWslyprvyMytaI=?ms=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})
Our democracy is worth fighting for, Peter. Derek and House Democrats are forwarding legislation that will strengthen our democratic systems to prevent future corruption.

The Protecting Our Democracy Act will reinforce our democracy by restoring checks and balances and strengthening accountability and transparency. It includes the Honest Ads Act, bipartisan legislation Derek introduced, which will protect our elections from foreign interference by preventing bad actors from purchasing online ads with dark money.

[**The January 6 insurrection might have failed, but the attacks on our democracy didn 't end that day. We have to keep pushing for reform and accountability. Add your name to call on the Senate to take up the Protecting Our Democracy Act for a vote >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4wsLxFHVwv5NF9USlgRatpjVnMTOQx3qz-ONcus3P_s=/DfdL6Vc91RiQ16AsTugw5r8T-OMb1yWslyprvyMytaI=?ms=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/4wsLxFHVwv5NF9USlgRatpjVnMTOQx3qz-ONcus3P_s=/q3sFVyJUJ4FsjKoHpeJRyROcY4BF8Z3wd76T4CPChvs=?refcode=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220107_POD_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

subject: Go anywhere but the White House...
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=db3e0683b9&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| |
---
| Friend, The illegitimate Biden regime is on a quest to destroy our country and turn us into a Communist nation. They have destroyed our southern border, causing the worst invasion in the history of our**** country. They have imposed unconstitutional vaccine mandates on hundreds of millions of citizens, despite natural immunity, low risk, and most importantly, freedom of choice. The economy is in ruins, inflation is the worst it has been in a generation, supply chains are backed up and store shelves are empty. Americans can not afford gas to drive themselves to work. The withdrawal from Afghanistan was the most humiliating moment in American history and left 13 of our bravest Service Members senselessly killed in combat.

Because of these reasons, and many more, I say LET’S GO BRANDON! [If you agree with me, get your own Let’s Go Brandon T-Shirt here!>>>](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=495ffbf6d8&e=598f6aa24c) [****](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=06eb929d0e&e=598f6aa24c) Let’s Go Brandon has become a national movement and a rallying cry of Americans demanding change. The people have had enough with this failed administration, and this year we are going to take our country back and take Congress back in the midterms. [****](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=19328ac60b&e=598f6aa24c) Thank you,
David Curry

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Let’s take our state back.
body:
Nevada needs leaders who will take committed action and put common sense policies into place that will protect us - not destroy us.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00107AoG9oH-m5eQEjcJl76eeburUVdjszqZzrkoQmfjUfGUrolKL22bEo44eTPqjJNl8aZlG8bor2uZ93c1D0QU6Wqt6t5HY78sRLK-TgRptkI7OZTAj7kDNJDHYy9D4NC1LFDaQ2XXLp5d5RkbU89jwyKn7xPoxi0uc_WBof8TuZzx-q89RWS_rbbP2JoeMrqKu2Ee64iO0Chzryo-s1trQ==&c=O_KjCJFVwlGkmXBMv5eaiI2Ti3H2vbMaqTH-WxJv1R-ZkkXWpTlS9g==&ch=vQgjYKzim2rAqB9HZx_q0K2WfeFr5XhcxIU4aLBPyB8mhxbFF7_MGw==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
Nevada needs leaders who will take committed action and put common sense policies into place that will protect us - not destroy us.
[Let's make that change of direction become a reality this year...](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00107AoG9oH-m5eQEjcJl76eeburUVdjszqZzrkoQmfjUfGUrolKL22bEo44eTPqjJNl8aZlG8bor2uZ93c1D0QU6Wqt6t5HY78sRLK-TgRptkI7OZTAj7kDNJDHYy9D4NC1LFDaQ2XXLp5d5RkbU89jwyKn7xPoxi0uc_WBof8TuZzx-q89RWS_rbbP2JoeMrqKu2Ee64iO0Chzryo-s1trQ==&c=O_KjCJFVwlGkmXBMv5eaiI2Ti3H2vbMaqTH-WxJv1R-ZkkXWpTlS9g==&ch=vQgjYKzim2rAqB9HZx_q0K2WfeFr5XhcxIU4aLBPyB8mhxbFF7_MGw==)
In fact, let's take our state back entirely from the Single Party Democrat rule that has only led us towards economic crises, crime spikes, and more destructive, upside down legislation.
You see, I set a new policy when I became Sheriff that OUR rights were the priority. And when I'm elected as Governor, that's going to be the new standard across this whole great state.
Let's take Nevada back from Sisolak and Single Party Democrat rule. [Are you with me?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00107AoG9oH-m5eQEjcJl76eeburUVdjszqZzrkoQmfjUfGUrolKL22bEo44eTPqjJNl8aZlG8bor2uZ93c1D0QU6Wqt6t5HY78sRLK-TgRptkI7OZTAj7kDNJDHYy9D4NC1LFDaQ2XXLp5d5RkbU89jwyKn7xPoxi0uc_WBof8TuZzx-q89RWS_rbbP2JoeMrqKu2Ee64iO0Chzryo-s1trQ==&c=O_KjCJFVwlGkmXBMv5eaiI2Ti3H2vbMaqTH-WxJv1R-ZkkXWpTlS9g==&ch=vQgjYKzim2rAqB9HZx_q0K2WfeFr5XhcxIU4aLBPyB8mhxbFF7_MGw==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00107AoG9oH-m5eQEjcJl76eeburUVdjszqZzrkoQmfjUfGUrolKL22bEo44eTPqjJNl8aZlG8bor2uZ93c1D0QU6Wqt6t5HY78sRLK-TgRptkI7OZTAj7kDNJDHYy9D4NC1LFDaQ2XXLp5d5RkbU89jwyKn7xPoxi0uc_WBof8TuZzx-q89RWS_rbbP2JoeMrqKu2Ee64iO0Chzryo-s1trQ==&c=O_KjCJFVwlGkmXBMv5eaiI2Ti3H2vbMaqTH-WxJv1R-ZkkXWpTlS9g==&ch=vQgjYKzim2rAqB9HZx_q0K2WfeFr5XhcxIU4aLBPyB8mhxbFF7_MGw==)

| | | [JOIN THE EFFORT TODAY!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00107AoG9oH-m5eQEjcJl76eeburUVdjszqZzrkoQmfjUfGUrolKL22bEo44eTPqjJNl8aZlG8bor2uZ93c1D0QU6Wqt6t5HY78sRLK-TgRptkI7OZTAj7kDNJDHYy9D4NC1LFDaQ2XXLp5d5RkbU89jwyKn7xPoxi0uc_WBof8TuZzx-q89RWS_rbbP2JoeMrqKu2Ee64iO0Chzryo-s1trQ==&c=O_KjCJFVwlGkmXBMv5eaiI2Ti3H2vbMaqTH-WxJv1R-ZkkXWpTlS9g==&ch=vQgjYKzim2rAqB9HZx_q0K2WfeFr5XhcxIU4aLBPyB8mhxbFF7_MGw==)
---
| We can't surrender to the left-wing, liberal push to Defund our Police, spike our tax dollars, ignore parents, jeopardize faith in our elections, or any of the other radical, extreme policies that they want to push on our state.
[Let's protect our communities instead by taking Nevada back!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00107AoG9oH-m5eQEjcJl76eeburUVdjszqZzrkoQmfjUfGUrolKL22bEo44eTPqjJNl8aZlG8bor2uZ93c1D0QU6Wqt6t5HY78sRLK-TgRptkI7OZTAj7kDNJDHYy9D4NC1LFDaQ2XXLp5d5RkbU89jwyKn7xPoxi0uc_WBof8TuZzx-q89RWS_rbbP2JoeMrqKu2Ee64iO0Chzryo-s1trQ==&c=O_KjCJFVwlGkmXBMv5eaiI2Ti3H2vbMaqTH-WxJv1R-ZkkXWpTlS9g==&ch=vQgjYKzim2rAqB9HZx_q0K2WfeFr5XhcxIU4aLBPyB8mhxbFF7_MGw==)
After serving in law enforcement for over 30 years, I'm up to the task... But I need to know who's on my team and ready to take back our state. If that describes you, then can I count on an urgent, one-time contribution before the weekend?
---
| | | [YOUR SUPPORT = NO MORE 1 PARTY RULE!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00107AoG9oH-m5eQEjcJl76eeburUVdjszqZzrkoQmfjUfGUrolKL22bEo44eTPqjJNl8aZlG8bor2uZ93c1D0QU6Wqt6t5HY78sRLK-TgRptkI7OZTAj7kDNJDHYy9D4NC1LFDaQ2XXLp5d5RkbU89jwyKn7xPoxi0uc_WBof8TuZzx-q89RWS_rbbP2JoeMrqKu2Ee64iO0Chzryo-s1trQ==&c=O_KjCJFVwlGkmXBMv5eaiI2Ti3H2vbMaqTH-WxJv1R-ZkkXWpTlS9g==&ch=vQgjYKzim2rAqB9HZx_q0K2WfeFr5XhcxIU4aLBPyB8mhxbFF7_MGw==)

If that describes you, then can I count on an urgent, one-time contribution before the weekend? | | | == | Thank you for continuing to back my campaign to take our state back, Sheriff Joe Lombardo | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. Box 371176, Las Vegas, NV 89137 | | Sent by mailto:info@joelombardofornv.com

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40460877/324448018/1847777238?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODNmZTE2OC1mNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ein0Fk7P4CxASk3aDwVXjGbzryZPTONjbbAQnH80m44=&emci=a7646914-546e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=583fe168-f46f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=10997957) Folks, some of the most beautiful public lands in the country are in Nevada. From Lake Mead to Pony Express, Nevada’s state and national parks boast incredible natural landscapes, valuable wildlife preserves, and activities for everyone to enjoy. Protecting these valuable public areas has always been a priority for Susie in Congress. But we want to know: [where do you stand on protecting Nevada’s public lands?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40460878/324448030/1847777238?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODNmZTE2OC1mNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ein0Fk7P4CxASk3aDwVXjGbzryZPTONjbbAQnH80m44=&emci=a7646914-546e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=583fe168-f46f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=10997957) | | | [Take the survey: Do you support protecting public lands? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40460879/324448037/1847777238?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODNmZTE2OC1mNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ein0Fk7P4CxASk3aDwVXjGbzryZPTONjbbAQnH80m44=&emci=a7646914-546e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=583fe168-f46f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=10997957)

Susie has worked tirelessly in Congress to preserve Nevada’s valuable public lands. But state and national parks throughout the state depend on dedicated conservation efforts that slowed to a crawl under Republican leadership.
**Our current Democratic leadership is working tirelessly to undo years’ worth of damage, but we have to continue to support them.**
We need to know that our public lands have support if we want to keep up the fight to protect them. [So please, take a moment to complete our survey to let Congress know we have to protect our public lands.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40460880/324448044/1847777238?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODNmZTE2OC1mNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ein0Fk7P4CxASk3aDwVXjGbzryZPTONjbbAQnH80m44=&emci=a7646914-546e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=583fe168-f46f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=10997957)

name: Conservative Direct
subject: Biden Calls Trump And Supporters ‘Twisted’ And ‘Un-American,’ Then Says He’ll Unite America
body:
Joe Biden Trump and his supporters for having a "twisted" view of January 6th and suggested they are "un-American" for trying to suppress -- Joe Biden unleashed a fiery speech on the anniversary of the Capitol riot in which he blasted former President Trump and his supporters for having a “twisted” view of events from that day and suggested they are “un-American” for trying to suppress votes. He concluded by claiming he would unite America. Biden used the phrase “former President” 16 times during his speech and immediately went on the attack against Trump by accusing him of having “rallied the mob to attack” that day. He proceeded to slam Trump for continuing to spread election lies “because his bruised ego matters more to him than our democracy or our Constitution.” Biden accused supporters of the former President of allegedly pushing a message that the true insurrection was on Election Day and that the fight for democracy took place on January 6th. “That the riot that took place on January 6 is a true expression of the will of the people. Can you think of a more twisted way to look at this country, to look at America?” Biden asked.  RELATED: Kamala Harris Equates January 6 to Pearl Harbor, 9/11 – Here’s Why That is Insane Biden Insults Trump Supports, Says He Wants to Unite America Biden shifted his speech to push Democrat attempts to nationalize elections and expand vote-by-mail access. Support Conservative Voices! Sign up to receive the latest political news, insight, and commentary delivered directly to your inbox. “Right now, in state after state, new laws are being written not to protect the vote, but to deny it. Not only to suppress the vote, but to subvert it,” Biden said. He made that claim after boasting that a record 150 million Americans voted in the 2020 election, even as a pandemic was raging at the time. If Republicans are trying to suppress votes, they’ve been doing a terrible job. “The former president and his supporters have decided the only way for them to win is to suppress your vote and subvert our elections. It’s wrong,” the President continued. “It’s undemocratic. And frankly, it’s un-American.” The President at one point accused Trump and his supporters of having “held a dagger at the throat of America and American democracy” and denied they had gone to the Capitol as patriots. Even as he insults those who support the President and are concerned about election integrity, Biden concluded by suggesting he would unite America. “I will defend this nation, not allow no one to place a dagger at the throat of democracy,” he said. “We will make sure the will of the people is heard, that the battle prevails, not violence, that authority of this nation will always be peacefully transferred.” Biden added, “I believe the power of the presidency and the purpose is to unite this nation. Not divide it, to lift us up, not tear us apart. It’s about us, not about me.” If that’s your belief, you’re not doing it right. RELATED: Democrat Bill Calls To Erect Memorial In Remembrance Of January 6 Riot Trump Fires Back Donald Trump issued a statement indicating that, contrary to Biden’s claims to seek unity, he is actually attacking him and his supporters as a means to further divide America. Trump accused Biden of using “my name today to try to further divide America.” “This political theater is all just a distraction for the fact Biden has completely and totally failed,” he added in a statement interspersed with further unproven claims of election fraud. “The Democrats want to own this day of January 6th so they can stoke fears and divide America,” he said. “I say, let them have it because America sees through their lies and polarizations.” Senator Lindsey Graham (R-SC) eviscerated Biden over his speech attacking Trump and his supporters rather than trying to unite America. “What brazen politicization of January 6 by President Biden,” Graham tweeted. “President Biden and Vice President Harris’s speeches today were an effort to resurrect a failed presidency more than marking the anniversary of a dark day in American history,” he added. |
---

clean_body: Joe Biden Trump and his supporters for having a "twisted" view of January 6th and suggested they are "un-American" for trying to suppress -- Joe Biden unleashed a fiery speech on the anniversary of the Capitol riot in which he blasted former President Trump and his supporters for having a “twisted” view of events from that day and suggested they are “un-American” for trying to suppress votes. He concluded by claiming he would unite America. Biden used the phrase “former President” 16 times during his speech and immediately went on the attack against Trump by accusing him of having “rallied the mob to attack” that day. He proceeded to slam Trump for continuing to spread election lies “because his bruised ego matters more to him than our democracy or our Constitution.” Biden accused supporters of the former President of allegedly pushing a message that the true insurrection was on Election Day and that the fight for democracy took place on January 6th. “That the riot that took place on January 6 is a true expression of the will of the people. Can you think of a more twisted way to look at this country, to look at America?” Biden asked.  RELATED: Kamala Harris Equates January 6 to Pearl Harbor, 9/11 – Here’s Why That is Insane Biden Insults Trump Supports, Says He Wants to Unite America Biden shifted his speech to push Democrat attempts to nationalize elections and expand vote-by-mail access. Support Conservative Voices! Sign up to receive the latest political news, insight, and commentary delivered directly to your inbox. “Right now, in state after state, new laws are being written not to protect the vote, but to deny it. Not only to suppress the vote, but to subvert it,” Biden said. He made that claim after boasting that a record 150 million Americans voted in the 2020 election, even as a pandemic was raging at the time. If Republicans are trying to suppress votes, they’ve been doing a terrible job. “The former president and his supporters have decided the only way for them to win is to suppress your vote and subvert our elections. It’s wrong,” the President continued. “It’s undemocratic. And frankly, it’s un-American.” The President at one point accused Trump and his supporters of having “held a dagger at the throat of America and American democracy” and denied they had gone to the Capitol as patriots. Even as he insults those who support the President and are concerned about election integrity, Biden concluded by suggesting he would unite America. “I will defend this nation, not allow no one to place a dagger at the throat of democracy,” he said. “We will make sure the will of the people is heard, that the battle prevails, not violence, that authority of this nation will always be peacefully transferred.” Biden added, “I believe the power of the presidency and the purpose is to unite this nation. Not divide it, to lift us up, not tear us apart. It’s about us, not about me.” If that’s your belief, you’re not doing it right. RELATED: Democrat Bill Calls To Erect Memorial In Remembrance Of January 6 Riot Trump Fires Back Donald Trump issued a statement indicating that, contrary to Biden’s claims to seek unity, he is actually attacking him and his supporters as a means to further divide America. Trump accused Biden of using “my name today to try to further divide America.” “This political theater is all just a distraction for the fact Biden has completely and totally failed,” he added in a statement interspersed with further unproven claims of election fraud. “The Democrats want to own this day of January 6th so they can stoke fears and divide America,” he said. “I say, let them have it because America sees through their lies and polarizations.” Senator Lindsey Graham (R-SC) eviscerated Biden over his speech attacking Trump and his supporters rather than trying to unite America. “What brazen politicization of January 6 by President Biden,” Graham tweeted. “President Biden and Vice President Harris’s speeches today were an effort to resurrect a failed presidency more than marking the anniversary of a dark day in American history,” he added. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dig Deeper... Fellow Conservative,

You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. T**he increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America,** which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington.

_Their top target?_ Missouri’s soon-to-be vacated U.S. Senate seat currently held by a Republican. | Peter,
Did you know that Marjorie Taylor Greene was banned from Twitter? She shared VAERS data exposing the dramatic increase in negative effects of the Covid-19 vaccine. Hours later, she was suspended from Facebook as well.
Joe Rogan, a popular American podcaster, discussed Covid-19 with expert Dr. Malone on his podcast. Within hours, YouTube banned his episode because the pair did not hold to the mainstream narrative on vaccinations.
You and I cannot let the censors win, Peter.

body:
| A great start to the New Year!
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Gw03jnMX1ByuBkquPs02ReaClHDclcCdzHCL2oPZqdM)

## **❄️ GET READY TO**** _SLEIGH_****IN 2022! ☃️**
_Whether you live in a blizzard zone or near a beach, NDTC’s free trainings are here to make you warm and fuzzy._ It’s never too late to get started on your New Year’s resolution, so check out this week’s awesome trainings!

* * *

[**Identifying Strong Candidates for Political Office**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..s-oeHb8i_SecVwytOznXDNQtY9m53_F8FjxKGdsBB0A)
**Monday, January 10 at 1pm ET.** Running for office not for you? Well, you probably know folks in your community who would make great leaders! Join this training to help identify the qualities of someone who would be a fabulous candidate. RSVP now to learn how you can find strong candidates, recognize common traits of strong political candidates, and understand the timeframe of this process.
| [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..s-oeHb8i_SecVwytOznXDNQtY9m53_F8FjxKGdsBB0A)
---

* * *

[**Recruiting Candidates for Political Office**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..WgZFsJ-aO6ZjFf_t0b_kL303maTqV23KpY-ffzbRWfI)
**Tuesday, January 11 at 1pm ET.**
While Monday’s training focuses on identifying strong candidates, Tuesday’s will help you get them in the race.
RSVP now to learn from our experts on how you can persuade individuals to run for office!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..WgZFsJ-aO6ZjFf_t0b_kL303maTqV23KpY-ffzbRWfI)
---

* * *

[**Building a Candidate Support Plan**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bM4vbmni9H-rkvF5Q6KC7lYAm4vpOGWRc5rBnEHf65A)
**Wednesday, January 12 at 1pm ET.**
Once you get candidates to run for office, you’re going to need a plan to support them through election day.
On Wednesday, join us to learn the benefits of having a Candidate Support Plan, the components of a strong plan, and how to execute it!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..bM4vbmni9H-rkvF5Q6KC7lYAm4vpOGWRc5rBnEHf65A)
---

* * *

[**So You Want to Run for Office?**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTAxMDcyMl90bGRyJl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.d-J-yaC0XMDs-0JAdWjcIkVt8om5oeeZ9to7aR3ejOI)
**Thursday, January 13 at 1pm ET.**
Last chance this month! 2022 is a midterm election year and we’re here to help figure out if running for office is right for you.
In this training, you’ll learn about the process of running for office, what you should research for your race, and even practice sharing the news with friends and family!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTAxMDcyMl90bGRyJl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9.d-J-yaC0XMDs-0JAdWjcIkVt8om5oeeZ9to7aR3ejOI)
---

* * *

[**Running in a Red District**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ZFQyWkPxV3Q95IM_xOmJzy-x-UMry4leMRzYcsP_xIw)
**Thursday, January 13 at 8pm ET.**
Back by popular demand: Running for office in a red district may seem difficult, but it’s possible with the right strategy.
Join us on Thursday to learn more about understanding the context of direct voter contact in a red district — but don’t wait, this training filled up FAST earlier this month!

[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ZFQyWkPxV3Q95IM_xOmJzy-x-UMry4leMRzYcsP_xIw)

clean_body: | A great start to the New Year! ❄️ GET READY TO SLEIGHIN 2022! ☃️ Whether you live in a blizzard zone or near a beach, NDTC’s free trainings are here to make you warm and fuzzy. It’s never too late to get started on your New Year’s resolution, so check out this week’s awesome trainings! Monday, January 10 at 1pm ET. Running for office not for you? Well, you probably know folks in your community who would make great leaders! Join this training to help identify the qualities of someone who would be a fabulous candidate. RSVP now to learn how you can find strong candidates, recognize common traits of strong political candidates, and understand the timeframe of this process. | Tuesday, January 11 at 1pm ET. While Monday’s training focuses on identifying strong candidates, Tuesday’s will help you get them in the race. RSVP now to learn from our experts on how you can persuade individuals to run for office! Wednesday, January 12 at 1pm ET. Once you get candidates to run for office, you’re going to need a plan to support them through election day. On Wednesday, join us to learn the benefits of having a Candidate Support Plan, the components of a strong plan, and how to execute it! Thursday, January 13 at 1pm ET. Last chance this month! 2022 is a midterm election year and we’re here to help figure out if running for office is right for you. In this training, you’ll learn about the process of running for office, what you should research for your race, and even practice sharing the news with friends and family! Thursday, January 13 at 8pm ET. Back by popular demand: Running for office in a red district may seem difficult, but it’s possible with the right strategy. Join us on Thursday to learn more about understanding the context of direct voter contact in a red district — but don’t wait, this training filled up FAST earlier this month! | This message was sent to: | Connect with us on social media!** | | | ---|---|--- | ---|--- Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats.org, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th Street NW, Suite 925, Washington, DC 20006

name: Nan
subject: Be one of the first to support our amazing ticket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Help us put an end to an era of corruption in Columbus.

Team,
I was so excited to announce Cheryl Stephens as my running mate earlier this week. She is the exact person I need by my side in this fight.
There is so much energy surrounding this campaign these days! And we can keep up this momentum through Election Day with your help.
**[Chip in $5 today to become a 2022 Founding Donor to the Nan/Cheryl ticket fighting to end Mike DeWine’s era of corruption in Columbus.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461513/324452128/-564456906?refcode=nw_em_220107_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzMzNzU4Ny1mNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnX6gJyOgavCBgcfzYNB5K0PSptR1s1rdJK6tDoNekM=)**
I’ve known Cheryl for many years, and I gravitate to her because she’s a lot like me.
We’ve both served as mayors. We both have strong moral compasses that always point in the direction of people here in Ohio. We’re both fighters — she’s spent so much of her professional career fighting for better housing and making it easier for people to own homes.
To put it another way — she and I are the polar opposite of Mike DeWine, and if you think that’s the kind of leadership we need in Columbus, **I’m urging you to become a 2022 Founding Donor to our ticket right now.**
Cheryl and I are stronger now that we are running together, and our partnership is made stronger the more people who get involved and donate.
**[Be one of the first to donate to the Nan Whaley/Cheryl Stephens ticket in Ohio. Chip in $5 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461514/324452129/-564456906?refcode=nw_em_220107_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzMzNzU4Ny1mNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnX6gJyOgavCBgcfzYNB5K0PSptR1s1rdJK6tDoNekM=)**
Onward,

Nan

body:
Just like any resolution we recommend starting simple | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8sxdqpv_jKK5sO8S5aYI68LBK49CkGXxVd-_PouaYNG7TBYjZmWK-VwJfyE7iYEXp7pe25rm4DeqvwjJefuYuYo_ywois0b4VMVuJyuJp0Alo4s7gjSGxMkcGPQ5A88Lw42ODVgiJ7BAGW5Btrj1FofUpjMhZ7Lw0As5JxcHUFZ4xYEeMBek7MDL7YufZHYQHiMgLBFJNO33n3QB8eyuX7fwYTRnYMoBXvHcbnWwpYkoXS4MTXU8sdaTxCiXY-PzogcDoJDUuVZUd7incqJXXrlc/3ii/OtoozstWQ2WSnQgkTRih2A/h0/IPwBxd59Jt91Zx7GEMPlMoZ4H6p3vx091C71tnP5b-Q) Dear team, This year is going to be a big year for this campaign, for IL-7, for the direction of our democracy. We have a lot of work to do! As you might imagine, my new year's resolution is to throw everything I have at fighting for my community, and winning the primary on June 28th. **And you can join me in my new year’s resolution this year. How? By committing to just one volunteer shift.** That’s all. Commit to spending two hours, in January, fighting with us for a better future.
