clean_body: Just like any resolution we recommend starting simple | | | Dear team, This year is going to be a big year for this campaign, for IL-7, for the direction of our democracy. We have a lot of work to do! As you might imagine, my new year's resolution is to throw everything I have at fighting for my community, and winning the primary on June 28th. And you can join me in my new year’s resolution this year. How? By committing to just one volunteer shift. That’s all. Commit to spending two hours, in January, fighting with us for a better future. Petition season starts next week, on January 13th. 7 weeks for us to show our strength. We need all of your help! If you live in the district or nearby, and feel comfortable participating in Covid-safe, socially distanced in-person activities join us for: If you live anywhere else in the country, or you would prefer to help us from home, sign up to join a virtual phone bank: We know we can win this election. We just have to knock more doors, make more phone calls, and talk to more voters than any primary challenger ever has. It sounds like a lot, but with you all by my side, nothing can stop us. Our movement is strongest when we fight together. So let’s start with 1 shift, and change the future together. I’ll see you there, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
In one week, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona. He knows how important this state is, and he knows how important our race is.
#

Friends —
In one week, Donald Trump is coming back to Arizona. He knows how important this state is, and he knows how important our race is.
That’s why last time he was here, he said “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
And the truth is, if we don’t have the resources we need to win this race, he might get his wish. If he can help flip this seat in 2022, it might make him more likely to run (and win) in 2024.
Sorry to put that thought in your head, but it’s true.
That’s why we’re asking if you can make your first $3 contribution before Trump arrives. Because when he does, it’s going to generate a lot of attention and a lot of people on the far-right will be even more fired up to beat Mark.
So we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to help Mark Kelly defend this seat? It all adds up when everyone is chipping in. That’s how we win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220107-1-7&t=1&refcode2=1902_6688874_YX1ykP&akid=1902%2E6688874%2EYX1ykP)

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Malcolm has a message for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Malcolm goes to bat every day for Pennsylvania’s working families
#

Team —
Malcolm has a message for you, to make it crystal clear who he’s fighting for in this race:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461680/324452937/-358086307?refcode2=87e91bbe-f86f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&refcode=em220107-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2U5MWJiZS1mODZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTYzm-xbo_QMjxYvwiJYTZK9f7JJhOTZk1IIzIbZI7g=)
As a member of the State Assembly, Malcolm goes to bat every day for Pennsylvania’s working families.
That’s because he knows what it’s like to work a minimum wage job, face a mountain of student loan debt, and struggle tooth and nail for stable housing.
And as Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator, he'll be the vote Democrats need to end the filibuster, secure our democracy, take bold action against climate change, and much more.
But he's not taking a cent from big money or corporate PACs, so we rely on donations from real working people like you to fund our work.
[So if you can today, will you make a $3 contribution to help bring a big coalition of folks together to elect Malcolm and take our fight for working people to the United States Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461681/324452938/-358086307?refcode2=87e91bbe-f86f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&refcode=em220107-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2U5MWJiZS1mODZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTYzm-xbo_QMjxYvwiJYTZK9f7JJhOTZk1IIzIbZI7g=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461682/324452939/-358086307?refcode2=87e91bbe-f86f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&refcode=em220107-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2U5MWJiZS1mODZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTYzm-xbo_QMjxYvwiJYTZK9f7JJhOTZk1IIzIbZI7g=)**
Thank you,
Team Malcolm

name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/078c78e14b74473cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, Happy New Year and Go Dawgs! I hope each of you enjoyed time with your family and loved ones. We're recharged and sprinting towards the Republican primary in May. It wouldn't be possible without each of you. Here are some updates.
---
---
# **_Endorsements Of The Week_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/bd4c1839c08daff6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
62 more local leaders have endorsed our campaign! These mayors, county commissioners, and city councilmen are leaders in their communities, and it's an honor to have their support. I've delivered results with them as Agriculture Commissioner, and look forward to keeping it up in the U.S. Senate.
---
---
# **_Grassroots Poll Victory!_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/51197434ba29702ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
We ended 2021 with a grassroots poll victory in Chatham County! Our message is resonating across the state. Georgia Republicans know what's on the line in 2022, and they know we must put forward a candidate who can WIN.
---
---
# **_Cobb County Republican Women_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/7d115be6e608bf44c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
B.I.G. thank you to those who joined us last night in Ringgold! Great crowd of around 60 supporters. Thank you also to our host committee and every Team ’22 member who helped make it a success. Stay tuned for updates on when we'll be in your area.
---
---
# **_Tomorrow_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/b4704ca96363bbebc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Hope you'll join us at the Cherokee County GOP's monthly breakfast tomorrow! I'm looking forward to sharing our message and taking some questions. [**Claim your ticket here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/baaa655e55ed407ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/5290ca44dc9dd843c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/dc3f73f7beaf6b1ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/0c61e1434134d08bc3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! 2022 is officially here, and the need for resources has never been more urgent. **[Hope you'll consider supporting our effort to defeat Raphael Warnock and take back the U.S. Senate here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/c05b59ce6fbca85bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)** Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/17436f5c65d7b077c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/0bba6f983e9ba64dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/b87070c8070d92bbc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/34b5b01bc00eef2e/a9a8772be2ad9ca1c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=34b5b01bc00eef2e&d=f9e40fc8c566eb3fc3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=34b5b01bc00eef2e).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same
[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=8abd02c3b85e4cd48a4fc9b62df8bfe2&_t=zvmCwdnPuxG_kDBoITCI0XHoxOdSneMP1tSs1rKaVdjeTNs952_4GlwZxIk6uBq4XlYPvKp57DdRNTbirjMoufO95eK6MCMnPV61mr4VOF12fJEGb1oXMH0oDeKtnJ6CCE1EAdTdY71vMdzgDhL5u-WNkNZoyS5jUBn2GlqmFd79EIH_QNXuFXW6RFp1EKHrakekQ6Ji6lYQ6FNUUde9PR62PyIhOQW7ZzY1dIaHbTA%3D)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. >From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. name: Morgan Harper
subject: Did you see this email from Team Morganize?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
I wanted to personally make sure you saw our email on voter outreach.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220107-503-footer-ak&t=2&akid=503%2E90090%2E_FOoMr)
Hey — it’s Morgan. I’m checking in because I wanted to make sure you saw this important email from Team Morganize.
Though we've closed the books on our last quarter of 2021, we're now officially fundraising for the first quarter of 2022. The primary is less than four months away, and we need to reach as many voters as we can _as soon as possible_. That’s what’s going to make or break this race for us.
So please, check out the email below and [**if you can afford it, donate $5 right now to help us reach 5 voters.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19870?t=3&akid=503%2E90090%2E_FOoMr)
Thank you,
Morgan
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Morganize [contact@e.morganharper.org]
Date: Dec 29, 2021
Subject: Help us reach one more voter in Ohio
_
**Just $1 can help us reach one more voter in Ohio.** That’s how much it costs us to reach one more Ohio voter through our campaign’s voter outreach program.
[**_Can you sponsor 5 or more voters before we close out our books on December 31 by donating $5 or more right now?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19870?t=4&akid=503%2E90090%2E_FOoMr)
It’s going to take a lot of grassroots power to beat our corporate-backed establishment opponents. That means we’re going to have to knock on a lot more doors, call and text a lot more voters, and send out more mailers.
We can’t just fall back on our name recognition or on millionaire donors to make our movement strong. We’re building a people-powered movement for Ohio’s working families from the ground up.
**Early and sustained voter outreach is key and we’ve got to do everything we can to make sure Ohioans everywhere know Morgan’s name.**
[**_Can you help us out by rushing a donation of $5 or anything you can right now so we can hit the ground running in 2022 and reach as many voters as possible?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19870?t=5&akid=503%2E90090%2E_FOoMr)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19876?refcode=em20220107-503&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=503%2E90090%2E_FOoMr)**
Onwards,
Team Morganize
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19870?t=25&akid=503%2E90090%2E_FOoMr)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220107-503-footer&t=26&refcode2=503_90090__FOoMr&akid=503%2E90090%2E_FOoMr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=503%2E90090%2E_FOoMr)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: I am proud to be endorsed by my friend, Ken Cuccinelli!
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

I am proud to announce today my friend and fellow conservative, Ken Cuccinelli's endorsement of my campaign for Virginia's 10th Congressional District. It is my honor to be endorsed by such a strong voice in our party.

**"I've known Jeanine Lawson for almost 20 years, which is why I know she is a principled conservative we can trust to stand up for our values in Washington and defend the constitution from government overreach - whether that overreach comes from Democrats or Republicans. She is THE pro-life, pro-family candidate I want to represent me & my family as residents of the 10th Congressional District. Jeanine is a conservative who has proven she can win in deep blue northern Virginia, and I am proud to endorse her candidacy for the 10th Congressional District."**

Ken joined my team because he knows I am building an operation to defeat Jennifer Wexton and send Nancy Pelosi packing next November. But we need YOUR help to get there. I will fight for YOUR VOICE in Congress and stand up for our values. While Jennifer Wexton stands with Nancy Pelosi, I will stand with the people of the 10th District. I will work to cut taxes, defend the United States Constitution, and tirelessly serve my fellow Americans.
---
| [Donate $5 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=0c674159ee&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $5 Today")

Jeanine Lawson

name: Retired Green Beret Jay Collins
subject: Joe Biden does not know the cost of American Freedom
body:
There are too many folks in Washington, D.C. who don’t know the true cost of protecting American freedom. Joe Biden being
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
American Patriot, There are too many folks in Washington, D.C. who don’t know the true cost of protecting American freedom. Joe Biden being the main perpetrator. [**STOP JOE BIDEN**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhrs96rod4mnqr6jfcuqip3l1qg4or0jj1eq749o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clgeeob2c1h2bs) While I was in combat in the middle east, Joe Biden was sitting in the Senate and White House riding the political coattails of Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton. This president is no leader. He does not understand the cost of freedom. Well, American Patriot, I know the true cost. I lost my leg to protect this country. And after, I returned to active duty. name: Tobias Read
subject: The situation
body:
Yesterday one of my opponents, Nick Kristof, was declared ineligible to run for Governor due to constitutional residency requirements.
---
| | Dear Peter, You might’ve already heard that yesterday one of my opponents, Nick Kristof, was declared ineligible to run for Governor due to constitutional residency requirements. Unfortunately, he is choosing to shamelessly peddle conspiracies about dedicated career public servants in the state he wants to lead. We need a new brand of leadership in Oregon, and this isn’t it. **[Your contribution is essential to that, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461818/324454043/990444423?refcode=em010722&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDU0ZjZhZS1mYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dno6hQy3CEEe1DmkuwcbizepGLV2Mjoec0qu2wOaLaE=)** The Secretary of State issued the ruling and Kristof has every right to challenge it. However, attacking the process with conspiracies is beyond the pale. I can think of another out of touch New Yorker who does the same thing. Despite the shifting fortunes of my opponents, I’m staying focused on the issues that matter to Oregonians. Oregon needs a change. We need proactive, principled leadership to overcome the challenges of today and to face the trials of the future. Our kids, our families, our environment, and our workforce are counting on the next Governor of Oregon to have their back. Oregon can’t afford more of the same. **[Join our team today and help us move Oregon forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461819/324454055/990444423?refcode=em010722&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDU0ZjZhZS1mYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dno6hQy3CEEe1DmkuwcbizepGLV2Mjoec0qu2wOaLaE=)** Thank you,

---

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461830/324454165/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220107dawn_dm_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTY2ZjFjMS1mYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9fQ4X815sc60ta7gPB-wR4MUDJjwH_prm8PX2A-9bjg=)

Hi, team — this is Dawn, Wes's wife. **Our campaign is coming up on the very first filing deadline of this race on Wednesday, January 12.[So, I’m about to ask you to pitch in to help my husband become Maryland’s next Governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461831/324454166/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220107dawn_dm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTY2ZjFjMS1mYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9fQ4X815sc60ta7gPB-wR4MUDJjwH_prm8PX2A-9bjg=)** But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important to us. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461832/324454167/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220107dawn_dm_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTY2ZjFjMS1mYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9fQ4X815sc60ta7gPB-wR4MUDJjwH_prm8PX2A-9bjg=)
---
I know Wes better than anyone — trust me when I say he does not like asking hard-working folks like you for money. He knows what it’s like to struggle. He knows how much every cent in your pocket means for your family.
**But I also know that no one will work harder for your family as Governor than my husband, Wes.**
I watched him become an Army officer and lead soldiers into combat in Afghanistan.
I watched him build a business to help underserved Baltimore students go to college.
I watched him serve as the CEO of a national nonprofit organization, distributing over $600 million to families living in poverty.
_Just imagine what he could do for our state as Governor, friend._
**[Today, I’m asking you to put your faith in my husband and help us reach our fundraising goal before Wednesday’s critical deadline by pitching in $10 or whatever you can. Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40461833/324454168/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220107dawn_dm_60da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTY2ZjFjMS1mYTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9fQ4X815sc60ta7gPB-wR4MUDJjwH_prm8PX2A-9bjg=)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Throughout our 14-year marriage, Wes has always stressed the importance of taking care of people.
It is a value he picked up while serving as a military officer — where he learned to never leave a fellow soldier behind — and he’s carried it with him as a small business owner, anti-poverty CEO, and father.
But sadly, too many people in Maryland are being left behind by crippling inequality and a lack of opportunity.
Wes is running for Governor to change that. His commitment, compassion, leadership, and his heart for the people are what push him every day.
But this campaign won’t have the fighting chance it deserves to win if we are outspent and outraised. After January 12, our campaign finance report will go public for everyone to see, and we need to make sure it shows the strength of our movement behind Wes.

| We've seen what one year under total Democrat control can do to our country.
Inflation is skyrocketing. Energy prices are at an all time high. There is an unprecedented crisis at our southern border. And Joe Biden is implementing unconstitutional vaccine mandates with zero accountability.
This is our one opportunity to stop Biden's socialist agenda in its tracks. We can't let it pass up.
I'm going to devote all of my resources - your donations - to seizing this opportunity to fire Nancy Pelosi and take back the House.
Here's how we do it:

---
## Engagement = INCREDIBLE
---
From December 7, 2021 through today **our online presence has been astonishing!** Over **1000 people per day** visited[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1493.1.8b90afa3656ecfb5bdd0dbba2d2af9df)and we reached over **2 million people** on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1494.1.5d610e21305cfea7438c5defe89f5dda), **2 million** on [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1495.1.a45affe641fde6d46a0a01feed7ac9d9) and **1.5 million** on [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1496.1.982f7458860f0ad2f346fe81277e4c0b). One video that went viral, was when I confronted the _corrupt_ Tulsa City Council over the illegal mask mandate. Watch here: [Lahmeyer vs. Tulsa City Council](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1497.1.c7513f0b2a77a8824a54dd8e6736f760) In comparison to others running for the US Senate in Oklahoma (including James Lankford) _the numbers are not even close_. Not only do we have tremendous momentum online we have now crossed **over 6000 individual[donors](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1498.1.912010518458434c45de24da24adf75c)**. We are starting 2022 _STRONG_. Get ready for some BIG events to be rolled out here soon as we take things up a notch. Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1499.1.9ccbd6b9a1a66059f1d8290f39f5faab), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1500.1.5a0665458176dd46b0da080488c51a85), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1501.1.3f180af01433428a3caec66a06f5d09e), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1502.1.9cf0b1839fbb563c611b5c9851012090), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1503.1.39f97f6fbabe6963da133c2411b9dafc)). Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet & greet in 2022 that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet & greet or a fundraiser please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
---
---
## COVID19 Religious Exemptions:
---
|
---
Former Vice President Joe Biden declared WAR on the Freedoms we have as Americans.
In September he issued a "mandate" requiring companies with more than 100 employees to force the COVID19 Vaccine upon them.
That is why I decided to fight back with the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition that over 100,000 people have signed at www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate
I also included a COVID19 Religious Exemption Form that is totally FREE to download. I have signed OVER 50,000 of those exemptions as the Pastor of Sheridan.Church in Tulsa, OK and thousands of people have been able to keep their jobs without getting the jab.
The Religious Exemptions **WORK**.
If your Pastor will not sign the Religious Exemption Form for you, then I will. In order for my signature to carry any weight though I would have to be your pastor and you would need to be a member of Sheridan.Church Online (this does not mean you must leave your home church). Here is a link to view how to become an online member of Sheridan.Church today: [https://www.sheridan.church/join-the-online-family](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1504.1.87e280bc7aeb5cb4e58ef4fa1124cced)
Once you have become an online member I will contact you and sign a Religious Exemption Form. As the Pastor of Sheridan.Church, I stand behind your religious conviction to not take the COVID19 vaccine.
I write this email though because now the Biden Administration is in discussions about forcing companies under 100 employees to comply with their illegal vaccine mandate.
**WE MUST FIGHT BACK!**
As a Pastor I am able to help you out as an individual but as a US Senator, I will be able to help out our nation collectively.
I need your help in this fight for Medical Freedom:
Share the [NO VACCINE MANDATE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1505.1.35f2316b702bac0a2914f101155cd77f) petition link w/5 people right now and inform them they can download the COVID19 Religious Form to fight back!
Text them this link to sign the petition and download the exemption: [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1506.1.d2bd2badc6338ab98d5ccfea1b8292f7)
| | [ Click Here To Fight Against Vaccine Mandates ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2440954.1507.1.21fae017a8256f1a9a49fa69cb28846b)

| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
AZ-04 congressional candidate Tanya Contreras Wheeless continues to hit the campaign trail hard. Recharged from the holidays, Team Tanya has a packed January ahead. Starting with the Maricopa Country Republican Committee Mandatory Meeting on Saturday, Tanya is taking every chance she can get to get out and meet residents of the East Valley.

**Come Meet Tanya**
Stop by our table at the Maricopa County Republican Committee Meeting on Saturday. Tanya will be there starting at 7 AM and we will be passing out campaign swag. Look forward to seeing you there!

Phoenix, AZ 85022

Redistricting just made VA-02 _a lot_ more competitive – going from an R+1 district to an R+3. That means our new district favors Republicans _even more_ than before.
But I’m not letting this intimidate me – I’m going to stay focused on the issues that matter. Tackling climate change while creating desirable jobs for Coastal Virginians. Getting this pandemic under control and boosting our economy. Protecting and expanding voting rights for all Americans.
Folks, I know I have what it takes to win as long as I have your support. And right now, I need you more than ever.
[**Will you rush a donation – whatever amount makes sense for you – to my re-election fund today? From: **Special Election Alert via VADEMS** <info@vademocrats.org>
Date: Wed, Jan 5, 2022
Subject: less than 1 week
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Derek — the special election in HD-89 takes place in less than one week. We’ve been working round the clock to elect Jackie Glass and we need all of the help we can get if we want to keep the seat out of the hands of the Virginia GOP.

Fellow Conservative,

You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. T**he increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America,** which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington.

_Their top target?_ Missouri’s soon-to-be vacated U.S. Senate seat currently held by a Republican. America, and Missouri, literally cannot afford for the Democrats to come in and take this seat. **We must band together and support a rock-solid conservative who is prepared for the job - Missouri’s own, Congressman Billy Long.**

[**I’ve already joined Billy on the campaign trail, and plan to continue, but need grassroots conservatives like you to join us.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=157b354b339f406e87ce739874fe6962&_e=IP_E6K7Ocgj9sWsdepex9NtIvfQVpaYoJt6U-BivxlnB7PgCmE_O2WYEdFwhCZgkPdwGM8kAOjlYUIt-w7G7uogyZAub3_8Kwgph-GF5kt2LK7qSUsj5FCSeIdMHigL8kn4mxoy19ZScJNnbqd6gZsSWq6MjaeXwXpzoEcEr6xVbOCvmajaXCOi9aP8xPvt01LAd_4_IJG8vSvXf30tT5M3n1hn3oOP5tA35oNWUKZo9Fr49ZmrPEQynI_2sUf-xCp3KfcmstJVjwuR7EdOjYx31EOsXfezRY0yBkAObyCBm7j_E02hk4BKN7fetoWLRZmuryUYaW0VgAFI4B-a50BmoEvX3hnWYVVxAz-nIUu4KVzHngbxAVRpOXt2Kbd8L3PTQ_qgBsS0ZokY16_1dupMdzWrrX4gV0jA5kexSeN7OddYIZQ3i9vyOHW0qoZ9jRj_JbsB5BFU6fzeYwwcU9-8p1_77jYL6_NagVhKC4ds%3D)

Your support is vital to not only Billy Long, but the Republican Party in what’s set to be one of the _TOUGHEST_ Senate races in the country. [**Will you join me by chipping in $10 or more right now to Billy Long for Senate?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=157b354b339f406e87ce739874fe6962&_e=IP_E6K7Ocgj9sWsdepex9NtIvfQVpaYoJt6U-BivxlnB7PgCmE_O2WYEdFwhCZgkPdwGM8kAOjlYUIt-w7G7uogyZAub3_8Kwgph-GF5kt2LK7qSUsj5FCSeIdMHigL8kn4mxoy19ZScJNnbqd6gZsSWq6MjaeXwXpzoEcEr6xVbOCvmajaXCOi9aP8xPvt01LAd_4_IJG8vSvXf30tT5M3n1hn3oOP5tA35oNWUKZo9Fr49ZmrPEQynI_2sUf-xCp3KfcmstJVjwuR7EdOjY0r5jzcCBCix4zYIbAbS1hHGD9ME0GWJN6oLRefWxZlyTl-CY7_o_GhNcduSs2S4UCJc6wXQmOxIrL8U0HDgr6pxm--BtknhRbGZ65FSmhLXMORAbF_vnFt3jYd16GsESIW-xv13KZX0HNyGcUNeX1E18w0llsFuLUuPhOSOXYj1k-S6naanpO8GfILGIJSdzJdIVvhm-0bOZp0gXe-z24c%3D)

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=157b354b339f406e87ce739874fe6962&_e=IP_E6K7Ocgj9sWsdepex9NtIvfQVpaYoJt6U-BivxlnB7PgCmE_O2WYEdFwhCZgkPdwGM8kAOjlYUIt-w7G7uogyZAub3_8Kwgph-GF5kt2LK7qSUsj5FCSeIdMHigL8kn4mxoy19ZScJNnbqd6gZsSWq6MjaeXwXpzoEcEr6xVbOCvmajaXCOi9aP8xPvt01LAd_4_IJG8vSvXf30tT5M3n1hn3oOP5tA35oNWUKZo9Fr49ZmrPEQynI_2sUf-xCp3KfcmstJVjwuR7EdOjY0x4jwW1yuek8NBWTRalyzAhUmfguWmvhEGTENSucNeaUGogpX7JXIUoe38p7Ly1oOTxJdI9VZENrW_nZFa9TYh2PPoS1VZsV5OgSm0AhOb049BMLnJaWpSsKCYXIf85hhQdhwO9Eriw2COEjAgtWUtx3PDfikbegnbAY0JWeIVtZGhyCYR6p0fuP_i3bz5ZEBulDvRRwvysfNm0ds_UAjM%3D)
From day one in Washington, **Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States.** He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. **His loyalty to the American people has never wavered.**

_I’m writing to tell you this:_ **If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp.** His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, **but he’s never been of Washington.**

He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life.

_Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right?_ **Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first.** That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Fellow Conservative.

This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. [**The only way we’re going to be able to keep Missouri in Republican hands is if conservatives like you join our team right now.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=157b354b339f406e87ce739874fe6962&_e=IP_E6K7Ocgj9sWsdepex9NtIvfQVpaYoJt6U-BivxlnB7PgCmE_O2WYEdFwhCZgkPdwGM8kAOjlYUIt-w7G7uogyZAub3_8Kwgph-GF5kt2LK7qSUsj5FCSeIdMHigL8kn4mxoy19ZScJNnbqd6gZsSWq6MjaeXwXpzoEcEr6xVbOCvmajaXCOi9aP8xPvt01LAd_4_IJG8vSvXf30tT5M3n1hn3oOP5tA35oNWUKZo9Fr49ZmrPEQynI_2sUf-xCp3KfcmstJVjwuR7EdOjY0pBEneAQv2xKP5MAo9zghSDcVofwPrDV4g3LoJAOn29oMuvEAtYGad3wN0YRSrqbOC4okTusmvs6A_oD-A_FF3nSKJOdvs7bkRyN15nkTvBhf1kgLXcZw5ovQH0r3qc0JjAd7_rxcWVtUgNVODX-XObnLiGUlg-eYWPIRNyfsofxjEjRXOxttR6m_noqTV4O8gAYgxIU_H1FE4FqhikQP8%3D)

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=157b354b339f406e87ce739874fe6962&_e=IP_E6K7Ocgj9sWsdepex9NtIvfQVpaYoJt6U-BivxlnB7PgCmE_O2WYEdFwhCZgkPdwGM8kAOjlYUIt-w7G7uogyZAub3_8Kwgph-GF5kt2LK7qSUsj5FCSeIdMHigL8kn4mxoy19ZScJNnbqd6gZsSWq6MjaeXwXpzoEcEr6xVbOCvmajaXCOi9aP8xPvt01LAd_4_IJG8vSvXf30tT5M3n1hn3oOP5tA35oNWUKZo9Fr49ZmrPEQynI_2sUf-xCp3KfcmstJVjwuR7EdOjY1flMXTPUfT7amcXxc1vWfAOJ72qMOqoPuRnJJ2_YjR_E4WhpR92HgY2UORUwj-xWyHdKuAycdkK3RyNUJ0kPid7sfPxRN4jEMD8gOndnLeFumKP9A9eD6t2ibU41Rm5YSE5tXdPBKvG0eSZdv-yeakI3wLkIF57-tWQks3vlw1TJ7l5ArQHfOEmtkpiUy1OfwBo87j80Jlk8PusRVkZZmM%3D)
Even President Trump is confident that we can and will take back the Senate, but that plan becomes increasingly difficult if the Democrats swoop in and buy and lie their way into one of our red-state seats. **Let me tell you, Democrats already have their eyes and pocketbooks set on Missouri.**

They aren’t wasting any time using big corporations and dark-money donors to pad their campaign accounts. [**Fellow Conservative, that’s why I am counting on you to step up immediately, asking that you give generously to ensure my friend Billy Long has the resources he needs to keep Missouri RED for the Republican Party.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=157b354b339f406e87ce739874fe6962&_e=IP_E6K7Ocgj9sWsdepex9NtIvfQVpaYoJt6U-BivxlnB7PgCmE_O2WYEdFwhCZgkPdwGM8kAOjlYUIt-w7G7uogyZAub3_8Kwgph-GF5kt2LK7qSUsj5FCSeIdMHigL8kn4mxoy19ZScJNnbqd6gZsSWq6MjaeXwXpzoEcEr6xVbOCvmajaXCOi9aP8xPvt01LAd_4_IJG8vSvXf30tT5M3n1hn3oOP5tA35oNWUKZo9Fr49ZmrPEQynI_2sUf-xCp3KfcmstJVjwuR7EdOjY5sBMxqJDb-qd1tcWQqfcMl9jZNEHgR8wsx-z2Pal1bICsV1lQU-k-b9GV1dL9SRQONMqBoBwfJD8CNnk33cyYm6D-ZIpM9y2slCOu3ciPp0f9n-BEF93bwny_S3bgejTtgy7uw041KpQ6RKDZqQv1Az53mdhaisBHXxHeyOGy6An9txxeeSkWyy-KfdOQ4Jc1bVqi0XaaHeI3sxutmFTgQ%3D)

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=157b354b339f406e87ce739874fe6962&_t=bdAiXG62VLsWwgj68TGVGOo-Knb6uTy4Udc4KOtQkLS0ycY6D0vMw7ywebxXHujvo6fV9mg6zKv92gTnXCoC21pulDGE1RAiQd3Q9XFxFWrBd0BwKvHKpDfekXdRwxeL5_EGxu-0atoKz1EHLknS_ES2SoYttRQVsjZI_206jy4%3D).
clean_body: This email contains the truth, Fellow Conservative. | No longer want to receive emails from Billy Long for Senate? You may . Fellow Conservative, You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. The increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America, which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington. Their top target? Missouri’s soon-to-be vacated U.S. Senate seat currently held by a Republican. America, and Missouri, literally cannot afford for the Democrats to come in and take this seat. We must band together and support a rock-solid conservative who is prepared for the job - Missouri’s own, Congressman Billy Long. Your support is vital to not only Billy Long, but the Republican Party in what’s set to be one of the TOUGHEST Senate races in the country. From day one in Washington, Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States. He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. His loyalty to the American people has never wavered. I’m writing to tell you this: If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp. His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, but he’s never been of Washington. He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life. Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right? Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first. That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Fellow Conservative. This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. Even President Trump is confident that we can and will take back the Senate, but that plan becomes increasingly difficult if the Democrats swoop in and buy and lie their way into one of our red-state seats. Let me tell you, Democrats already have their eyes and pocketbooks set on Missouri. They aren’t wasting any time using big corporations and dark-money donors to pad their campaign accounts. Thank you, Kellyanne Conway Former Counselor to President Donald J. Trump | | PAID FOR BY BILLY LONG FOR SENATE

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Important day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_roundup_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- I know yesterday was an important day for many of us, as our republic still lives in the shadow of the events that unfolded at the Capitol just one year ago. Due to the imminent arrival of Sofia's and my first child, I am home in Illinois -- but I certainly was on the floor of the House chamber in sprit alongside Vice President Dick Cheney and Rep. Liz Cheney yesterday. My continued focus one year later is the truth, and nothing but the truth. That shouldn't be controversial. When it comes to ensuring a day like January 6th, 2021 never happens again, I don't care who the facts help or hurt in November. For me, it's about the survival of the republic, not the next election. Yesterday, I shared my perspective on many media outlets, but was especially pleased to take this message directly to Fox News viewers.
* * *
[](https://www.country1st.com/standing_for_truth_on_january_6th?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_roundup_nd&n=2) [](https://www.country1st.com/standing_for_truth_on_january_6th?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_roundup_nd&n=3) | [](https://www.country1st.com/standing_for_truth_on_january_6th?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_roundup_nd&n=4 "Watch Adam's Fox News Interview") [Watch Adam's Fox News Interview](https://www.country1st.com/standing_for_truth_on_january_6th?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_roundup_nd&n=4)
---
* * *
One more note for those of you who use Instagram: Maria Shriver and I will be chatting on Instagram Live at 2pm Eastern / 1pm Central / 12 pm Mountain / 11am Pacific. Tune in to [her account](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2OaodzxxZHDQEJgcgcbCuMxElIexvQNbBGqHRa2hsSj&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_roundup_nd&n=5) at that time, and watch our live conversation and feel free to chime in. Maria has been a great cheerleader for our work, and I'm looking forward to spending time with her today.
[https://www.instagram.com/mariashriver/](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2OaodzxxZHDQEJgcgcbCuMxElIexvQNbBGqHRa2hsSj&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_roundup_nd&n=6)
And while you're at it, make sure you're following [me](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y9g0kLsH4VpfCKyumRl1ydECbDNaUnrJwyCmDjCAbxWM&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_roundup_nd&n=7) and [Country First](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73yxEkyAQzJrimyRVxZyePHfjehlVCqtfHMYvhy1A-g-B3&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_roundup_nd&n=8) on Instagram, too!
Have a great weekend,
Adam

name: Larry Klayman
subject: Help this Marine Veteran who was BETRAYED by his own Country!
body:
After spending 10 years in the United States Marine Corps, fighting for our nation, Jesus Rivera has been betrayed by his own co
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z51ftvhljv8bujvo2e8rlplefskpjp8s7t3acrn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge9oj1cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sljcpr30tjgeeo6eopjm9hr6dtncdi71cj4eqor1c3nc5gb3cbh69o60ohk6qrrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5jcgrreob6ejjjbdhnm2qmash5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq78d45lsp8epc3hba8iclqhrrvbboac9lvhtc40_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge9oj1cph2bs)
Patriot,

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdns5n2aou3j8ua5jntprab4vv8id7e99enr2gl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge9oj1cph2bs) After spending 10 years in the United States Marine Corps, fighting for our nation, Jesus Rivera has been betrayed by his own country at the hands of the Biden Regime and the Gestapo tactics of the FBI and it’s Department of Justice.

I’m Larry Klayman, founder of Judicial Watch and currently the founder and chairman of Freedom Watch, a non-profit government watchdog that investigates and prosecutes government corruption and abuse!

On a January morning, up to 20 heavily armed agents raided this Marine’s home, effectively ransacking his home, falsely and unconstitutionally arresting and interrogating him without legal counsel present, and seizing his personal property which he needs for his livelihood to earn a living for his family.

Mr. Rivera’s loving wife watched and pleaded with the armed agents to see a warrant as her husband was placed in handcuffs.

What was Mr. Rivera’s alleged crime that resulted in such an intimidating show of force by the FBI and law enforcement?

He was one of the hundreds of thousands of protesters in Washington on January 6th. The patriotic Marine was there to witness the final speech of his president before leaving office.

Mr. Rivera committed no crime, engaged in violence, and I have filed a class action lawsuit for constitutional violations on his behalf to make this right, and so others aren’t terrorized into submission.

[**Join me in fighting for the Marine veteran by backing this class action lawsuit.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2n8si1d17e7tnmofb7snajdrefdd26ladkqkjpo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge9oj1cph2bs)

| [**SUPPORT FREEDOM WATCH'S IMPORTANT WORK**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8b8glq4hl8sc58pgbpc1llcqut4to35gl5qfr48_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge9oj1cph2bs)
---

The FBI, it’s Director Robert Wray and specifically the special agents that we’re personally suing in this case, are using their positions of power **to intimidate patriots around the nation to stay put, stay quiet and stay out of politics!**

They’re using tactics reminiscent of Adolf Hilter’s Third Riech! Read the words of the FBI Director named as a defendant in the case, Christopher Wray:

_We know who you are if you're out there, and FBI agents are coming to find you

Wray and his FBI has been pressuring spouses, siblings, children and former romantic partners who spotted their loved ones at the Capitol to rat them out and turn them in.

This tyrannical heavy handed intimidation is reminiscent of the Nazis having fellow Germans turn in German Jews during the Holocaust!_
We not only need to get justice for Mr. Rivera and other pro-Trump peaceful protesters like him, a combat Marine with 10 years of honorable service, **we need to send a message to Biden’s personal goon squad that we won’t be silenced!**

[**Help me do that now by supporting Freedom Watch’s work with your most generous tax deductible contribution today.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqi41advttt6q944vmh3u3g1lgbutqpesbs58ubg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clge9oj1cph2bs)

Thank you from the bottom of hearts for your support.

For Freedom,

Larry Klayman
Founder and General Counsel
Freedom Watch, Inc.

name: Rainee Taylor, Evergreen Action
subject: The most important resolution you can make
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The Build Back Better Act is a commitment to protecting public health, creating new jobs, and lowering energy bills with cheap, clean electricity.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4252?t=3&akid=12932%2E53494%2ERY1fOa) Friend, This time of year, there's a lot of talk about making resolutions. Whether it's trying to improve our health, pursue a new career, or save money, everyone wants 2022 to be a year of positive change. But right now, we need to make big, lasting changes on a national scale, too! The Build Back Better Act is a commitment to protecting public health, creating new jobs, and lowering energy bills with cheap, clean electricity. And failure is not an option. **So here's the most important resolution you (and the country!) can make in 2022: Committing to getting the climate investments in the Build Back Better Act over the finish line!** [**_Read our latest blog post about why Biden and Schumer must deliver on climate by passing the Build Back Better Act—then, share it with your community to remind folks why we must stay resolute in our climate demands._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4252?t=4&akid=12932%2E53494%2ERY1fOa) | [READ THE POST](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4252?t=5&akid=12932%2E53494%2ERY1fOa)
---
Make no mistake: Our resolve has never been stronger. The climate investments in the Build Back Better Act are our last, best chance for national policy that deals with the crisis at the necessary scope and scale.
If we want a liveable future with healthier communities, millions of new good-paying clean energy jobs, and lower energy bills, we need the Build Back Better Act. We'll say it again: Failure is not an option.
[**_Check out our latest post today, and resolve to join us in doing whatever it takes to get this bill passed early in 2022._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4252?t=6&akid=12932%2E53494%2ERY1fOa)
New year, new me new clean energy future,
Rainee Taylor
Digital Advisor, Evergreen Action
[READ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4252?t=7&akid=12932%2E53494%2ERY1fOa)
---

body:
Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40462745/324457755/-825069922?refcode=20211211_MF_allofus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU1NmJlYi1mZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6ScynEElx0lBIbH3BuxHqJyPh69xhPaEBpvoN36R_8=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40462746/324457756/-1217423743?refcode=20220107_mf_threat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU1NmJlYi1mZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6ScynEElx0lBIbH3BuxHqJyPh69xhPaEBpvoN36R_8=) Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene. The truth is, she’s right, but not in the way that she thinks. I’m not a “threat” to cause a disturbance at a political rally. And I’d never dream of harassing her or anyone else for that matter. _**But our movement -- the one we’re building together -- is most definitely a threat to her political career and that of those who practice her kind of politics.**_ **We’re a “threat” because we still believe that leaders from both parties can work together to oppose bigotry, conspiracy theories, and hatred. ** **We’re a “threat” because we are focused on delivering roads, bridges, health care, and competence for the American people. ** **And we’re a “threat” because we are ready to turn the page on the corrupt leadership styles of Donald Trump, Matt Gaetz, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, and more. ** **[But I need your help to deliver on this “threat.” So today, I’m asking you to donate $20.22 or more to help me defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40462747/324457757/-1217423743?refcode=20220107_mf_threat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU1NmJlYi1mZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6ScynEElx0lBIbH3BuxHqJyPh69xhPaEBpvoN36R_8=) ** | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40462748/324457758/-825069922?refcode=20220107_mf_threat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU1NmJlYi1mZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6ScynEElx0lBIbH3BuxHqJyPh69xhPaEBpvoN36R_8=)**
---
At 18 years old, I swore an oath to defend the Constitution - and I traveled across the globe defending our democracy.
I’m ready to bring that same passion for public service to the halls of Congress. But I need your help to make it happen.
Thanks for your support,
Marcus Flowers

Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. **This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40462749/324457759/-825069922?refcode=20220107_mf_threat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU1NmJlYi1mZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6ScynEElx0lBIbH3BuxHqJyPh69xhPaEBpvoN36R_8=)

clean_body: Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene. = = Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene. The truth is, she’s right, but not in the way that she thinks. I’m not a “threat” to cause a disturbance at a political rally. And I’d never dream of harassing her or anyone else for that matter. But our movement -- the one we’re building together -- is most definitely a threat to her political career and that of those who practice her kind of politics. We’re a “threat” because we still believe that leaders from both parties can work together to oppose bigotry, conspiracy theories, and hatred. We’re a “threat” because we are focused on delivering roads, bridges, health care, and competence for the American people. And we’re a “threat” because we are ready to turn the page on the corrupt leadership styles of Donald Trump, Matt Gaetz, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, and more. = | = At 18 years old, I swore an oath to defend the Constitution - and I traveled across the globe defending our democracy. I’m ready to bring that same passion for public service to the halls of Congress. But I need your help to make it happen. Thanks for your support, Marcus Flowers Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible. | = **** **** ****** ** ** **** Paid for by Marcus for Georgia Marcus for Georgia PO Box 532 Rome, GA 30162 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ********=**

name: Shuwaski Young
subject: Once-in-a-generation crossroads
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHUWASKI YOUNG FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/young-launch-day?refcode=113021 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/young-launch-day?refcode=113021]
Friend, I hope you and your family are having healthy, happy holidays.

We are finally in our on-year and we couldn’t be more excited to continue our path to victory in 2022.

For Mississippi's 3rd District, our sense of community is on the ballot. Over the past two years, the pandemic has made us confront what it means to be a part of a community. Each of us plays a role in our collective health, just as each of us plays a role in defending the rights, voices, and collective economic and social wellbeing of our neighbors. We’ve learned there’s far more that unites us than that divides us.

Now that we’re in the on-year, we’ll either continue to grow together and unite around policies for the collective good – or we’ll let fabricated divisions around partisanship and conspiracies grow deeper. And that choice comes to a head on election day.

I choose to come together. And as your Congressman, that’s what will guide me every day. But to get there, it’s going to take a lot of us committed to that choice.

The beginning of election year is one of the most important fundraising periods of the entire race. Our allies and opponents both are watching to see how we fare.

So, I’m asking two things: First, join me and kick off the on-year and continue our path to victory by making a $25 contribution to my campaign. Then, help grow our momentum by asking 5 of your friends to do the same. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/young-launch-day?refcode=010722&amount=25]
secure.actblue.com/donate/young-launch-day?refcode=122721&amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/young-launch-day?refcode=122721&amount=25]

We’re at a once-in-a-generation crossroads, friend. Help me make 2022 the year we heal divisions and return to the path of collective progress.

Happy holidays and a prosperous new year,

Shuwaski
[images/spacer.gif]
secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?refcode=113021 [secure.actblue.com/donate/shuwaskiyoung?refcode=113021]

Ron Johnson is officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, and he’s expected to make a formal announcement on Monday. It’s going to be all hands on deck to defeat him.

This guy has spent his time in Washington spreading COVID misinformation, promoting conspiracy theories, covering up for the January 6 insurrectionists, and blocking relief for working families while enriching his wealthy campaign donors. He’s got to go.

But here’s the hard truth: Wisconsin has been a tipping point state in recent elections, and beating a two-term incumbent won’t be easy. Ron Johnson already has Donald Trump’s endorsement in this race and the full support of Mitch McConnell’s dark money network. Outside groups are expected to pour millions in to protect him, and we need to make sure we’ve got the resources to respond.

The latest polling shows Sarah is TWO points ahead of Ron Johnson in a head-to-head match-up. She’s the only Democrat who can beat him in a general election, but we need your help to run a winning campaign.

The latest polling shows Sarah is TWO points ahead of Ron Johnson in a head-to-head match-up. She’s the only Democrat who can beat him in a general election, but we need your help to run a winning campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for everything! More to come very soon. — Team Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest poll of the race. With your help, we can flip this seat blue. name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- INDems Statement On One-Year Anniversary of January 6 Insurrection Against the United States of America - ** _“Today marks a grim milestone for our country – one year since the insurrection in the U.S. Capitol by radicalized supporters of former President Donald Trump. Over this past year, Indiana Republicans have remained silent about the horrific events that happened that day, and their silence is deafening. Hoosiers should watch the videos themselves and make their own judgments about what happened that day. Here’s what I saw. People attacking police officers. Congressman Greg Pence voting to overturn the election results after a mob came to the building where he works to attempt to kill his brother. Our house of democracy – regardless of your political allegiance – being desecrated and destroyed. _ _In the history of our country, an attack of this magnitude – and at that place – would be an attack on all of us. The insurrectionists would be pushed away, discredited, and disavowed by those in power. Our political parties would return to the work of helping Americans and their daily challenges. Tragically, the modern Republican Party has broken from tradition, with the sole reason being the appeasement of a former president. By pledging allegiance to him they get the whole bag: lies, misinformation, conspiracy theories, and political violence. As a result, this bad behavior and rhetoric becomes more common, more ‘accepted’, and harder to reverse. _ _On this day, it might help to recite a verse from the Gospel of John that says, ‘And ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall set you free.’ Our party’s hope today is that in seeking truth, the insurrectionists are brought to justice, complicit Republicans are held to account, and America can begin a healing process on the values that bind us together instead of the issues that tear us apart.”**\- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party**_

**\- The 2022 Session: Culture Wars, Not Saving Lives, Are Priority for INGOP - ** This week began the 2022 Culture War session at the Indiana General Assembly. The Republican supermajority made clear they will put their partisanship ahead of everything - including the state’s business community, state law enforcement, and families across our state. Republicans are expected to make discrediting the COVID-19 vaccine their top priority from the state’s governing body. They plan to do this by forcing through [House Bill 1001](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40463201/324459959/636249516?FFF.01.07.22=FFF.01.07.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjNjOTZmZi0wMDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xcE9D7vCzronhysqtJXI9j3Pg1QkaUOPv3fIgE52m4=&emci=8b0e4d48-ef6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=023c96ff-0070-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4925535) on the House floor starting this Monday. The GOP’s effort to taint the life-saving vaccine comes as hospitals are on the [brink of collapse](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40463207/324459963/-1446305800?FFF.01.07.22=FFF.01.07.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjNjOTZmZi0wMDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xcE9D7vCzronhysqtJXI9j3Pg1QkaUOPv3fIgE52m4=&emci=8b0e4d48-ef6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=023c96ff-0070-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4925535) due to the worst surge of the entire pandemic. Vaccination rates in the Hoosier State are [one of the worst in the nation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40463215/324459972/-1816346989?FFF.01.07.22=FFF.01.07.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjNjOTZmZi0wMDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xcE9D7vCzronhysqtJXI9j3Pg1QkaUOPv3fIgE52m4=&emci=8b0e4d48-ef6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=023c96ff-0070-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4925535) and hospitalizations are [at levels not seen in over a year](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40463221/324459980/-103369981?FFF.01.07.22=FFF.01.07.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjNjOTZmZi0wMDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xcE9D7vCzronhysqtJXI9j3Pg1QkaUOPv3fIgE52m4=&emci=8b0e4d48-ef6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=023c96ff-0070-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4925535). Because of the GOP’s extreme partisanship, Indiana is the [most dangerous state](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40463224/324459984/-567819394?FFF.01.07.22=FFF.01.07.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjNjOTZmZi0wMDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xcE9D7vCzronhysqtJXI9j3Pg1QkaUOPv3fIgE52m4=&emci=8b0e4d48-ef6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=023c96ff-0070-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4925535) to call home during COVID-19. The Republicans’ partisan agenda does not stop with COVID-19 as the rest of the 2022 legislative session will be about fulfilling a national strategy cooked up by the overall Republican Party from Washington, D.C. This agenda includes criminalizing women’s access to reproductive health care (in all cases), installing so-called “[constitutional carry](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40463227/324459987/-1882272328?FFF.01.07.22=FFF.01.07.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjNjOTZmZi0wMDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xcE9D7vCzronhysqtJXI9j3Pg1QkaUOPv3fIgE52m4=&emci=8b0e4d48-ef6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=023c96ff-0070-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4925535)” (opposed by the Indiana State Police), villainizing some of Indiana’s youth and their desire to play sports, and making school board elections partisan — right when people want less politics in schools. Democrats urge YOU to tell your friends, neighbors, and communities that what they’re seeing is an Indiana Republican Party that’s become a party solely of culture wars and misinformation. They’ll put their agenda ahead of their family’s future.
**\- We Want You: Run for Office in 2022 - ** New year, new vibe: Democrats are calling on leaders to step up and join us in the effort to elect hard working leaders up and down the ticket. That means we need real public servants to run for office. This week (January 5) marked the beginning period when Hoosiers can formally file their candidacy for office. Democrats are looking to build its bench from the ground up, and whether you’re running for precinct committee person, state delegate, or state office - we want you to help us create a better future for Indiana, our communities, and our families. Go to the Indiana Democratic Party’s [website for more information](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40463230/324459990/-1757003383?FFF.01.07.22=FFF.01.07.22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjNjOTZmZi0wMDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xcE9D7vCzronhysqtJXI9j3Pg1QkaUOPv3fIgE52m4=&emci=8b0e4d48-ef6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=023c96ff-0070-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4925535). We look forward to having you be the difference maker for your community.

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- INDems Statement On One-Year Anniversary of January 6 Insurrection Against the United States of America - “Today marks a grim milestone for our country – one year since the insurrection in the U.S. Capitol by radicalized supporters of former President Donald Trump. Over this past year, Indiana Republicans have remained silent about the horrific events that happened that day, and their silence is deafening. Hoosiers should watch the videos themselves and make their own judgments about what happened that day. Here’s what I saw. People attacking police officers. Congressman Greg Pence voting to overturn the election results after a mob came to the building where he works to attempt to kill his brother. Our house of democracy – regardless of your political allegiance – being desecrated and destroyed. In the history of our country, an attack of this magnitude – and at that place – would be an attack on all of us. The insurrectionists would be pushed away, discredited, and disavowed by those in power. Our political parties would return to the work of helping Americans and their daily challenges. Tragically, the modern Republican Party has broken from tradition, with the sole reason being the appeasement of a former president. By pledging allegiance to him they get the whole bag: lies, misinformation, conspiracy theories, and political violence. As a result, this bad behavior and rhetoric becomes more common, more ‘accepted’, and harder to reverse. On this day, it might help to recite a verse from the Gospel of John that says, ‘And ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall set you free.’ Our party’s hope today is that in seeking truth, the insurrectionists are brought to justice, complicit Republicans are held to account, and America can begin a healing process on the values that bind us together instead of the issues that tear us apart.”\- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party \- The 2022 Session: Culture Wars, Not Saving Lives, Are Priority for INGOP - This week began the 2022 Culture War session at the Indiana General Assembly. The Republican supermajority made clear they will put their partisanship ahead of everything - including the state’s business community, state law enforcement, and families across our state. Republicans are expected to make discrediting the COVID-19 vaccine their top priority from the state’s governing body. They plan to do this by forcing through on the House floor starting this Monday. The GOP’s effort to taint the life-saving vaccine comes as hospitals are on the due to the worst surge of the entire pandemic. Vaccination rates in the Hoosier State are and hospitalizations are . Because of the GOP’s extreme partisanship, Indiana is the to call home during COVID-19. The Republicans’ partisan agenda does not stop with COVID-19 as the rest of the 2022 legislative session will be about fulfilling a national strategy cooked up by the overall Republican Party from Washington, D.C. This agenda includes criminalizing women’s access to reproductive health care (in all cases), installing so-called “” (opposed by the Indiana State Police), villainizing some of Indiana’s youth and their desire to play sports, and making school board elections partisan — right when people want less politics in schools. Democrats urge YOU to tell your friends, neighbors, and communities that what they’re seeing is an Indiana Republican Party that’s become a party solely of culture wars and misinformation. They’ll put their agenda ahead of their family’s future. \- We Want You: Run for Office in 2022 - New year, new vibe: Democrats are calling on leaders to step up and join us in the effort to elect hard working leaders up and down the ticket. That means we need real public servants to run for office. This week (January 5) marked the beginning period when Hoosiers can formally file their candidacy for office. Democrats are looking to build its bench from the ground up, and whether you’re running for precinct committee person, state delegate, or state office - we want you to help us create a better future for Indiana, our communities, and our families. name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: I've Made A Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
People keep asking what my plans are for the next election. Well, I've made a decision.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?38kbw--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38kbw-1s8b5-4qqlpo7/)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I’m 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That’s why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I’m traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I’m staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38kbw-1s8b6-4qqlpo8/ "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
My time working as President Trump’s Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I’ve actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That’s made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **

That’s why I am hoping you will **[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38kbw-1s8b7-4qqlpo9/ "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.")** The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38kbw-1s8b8-4qqlpo0/)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38kbw-1s8b9-4qqlpo1/)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

Team, Rachel Maddow is sounding the alarm.
2022 has officially begun, and it's going to be an uphill battle for Democrats across the country, but especially Maggie Hassan.
New Hampshire is the GOP's number one target, and Maggie is one of the most vulnerable Democrats. With the Senate split 50-50, **this race could be the tipping point for our Democratic Senate majority.**
Mitch McConnell and dark money groups have already spent over $7 million on attack ads in New Hampshire, more than they've spent against any other Senate Democrat. These attacks are starting to break through. **A recent poll shows Maggie tied with a far-right Trump Republican.**
It won’t be easy to hold our narrow majority. We can turn the polls around and pull ahead, but we need a surge of grassroots support to do it.
If we lose momentum, it could cost us the Senate majority, so we have to ask: **[Team, can you rush $5 or more to win in New Hampshire and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40463329/324460423/-1281091919?refcode=e20220107_maddow&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTI2ZDJkZS0wMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-MiLMnI9GdNI7BjoEUXOS9c7sECxtcjBFT2GcGRG54=)**

Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene may be permanently suspended from Twitter, but that doesn’t mean we’re going to forget her crazy tweets anytime soon.

Team Holly has compiled a roundup of some of Marge’s most infamous Twitter moments to remind us why we’re running.

**Marge’s Worst Hits: **
* Tweeted multiple times that there was mass voter fraud in the 2020 election. A claim that has been debunked time and again.
* Compared mask mandates to the Holocaust.
* Supported and encouraged the events that led to the January 6th insurrection.
* Went on a transphobic rant about a Congresswoman's daughter.
* Tweeted misinformation about COVID-19 and vaccinations countless times.
* Tweeted out the personal phone numbers of many of her colleagues in Congress after frustrations during the infrastructure vote.
* Claimed fixing roads led to socialism.
* Tweeted several times about a “National Divorce.”
* Finally, she tweeted misinformation about COVID-19 graphs in an attempt to disprove scientific fact – leading to her permanent suspension.

**If Marjorie Taylor Greene is too dangerous to have a Twitter account, she’s certainly too dangerous to be in Congress. **

Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter. Now let’s permanently remove her from Congress. **[Rush a $12 donation today to help Holly unseat the Queen of QAnon.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40463593/324461640/-804235033?refcode=em0107&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzQ2NDIxOS0wNDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-jdmBi62erVmPwQVny8O0lbcneIhFF_EmLIT7LhbaH0=)**

Thanks for your support,
Team Holly
****

clean_body: | | Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene may be permanently suspended from Twitter, but that doesn’t mean we’re going to forget her crazy tweets anytime soon. Team Holly has compiled a roundup of some of Marge’s most infamous Twitter moments to remind us why we’re running. Marge’s Worst Hits: Tweeted multiple times that there was mass voter fraud in the 2020 election. A claim that has been debunked time and again. Compared mask mandates to the Holocaust. Supported and encouraged the events that led to the January 6th insurrection. Went on a transphobic rant about a Congresswoman's daughter. Tweeted misinformation about COVID-19 and vaccinations countless times. Tweeted out the personal phone numbers of many of her colleagues in Congress after frustrations during the infrastructure vote. Claimed fixing roads led to socialism. Tweeted several times about a “National Divorce.” Finally, she tweeted misinformation about COVID-19 graphs in an attempt to disprove scientific fact – leading to her permanent suspension. If Marjorie Taylor Greene is too dangerous to have a Twitter account, she’s certainly too dangerous to be in Congress. Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter. Now let’s permanently remove her from Congress. = Thanks for your support, Team Holly ** | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Tim Ryan
subject: the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40463618/324461830/-2057546413?refcode=20220107_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM3YmQ1OC0wNDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bnsqss5D0e1goPLE_K5cqkoaDf87U8cDKFisA9YUAWI=) Folks -- I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 to my campaign. But first, a few facts about this race:
1. **Ohio’s open Senate seat could decide if we’re able to hold our slim Democratic Senate majority.** With a 50/50 split, we can’t afford to lose a single battleground race like this one.
2. **National Republicans are already pouring millions of dollars into this race.** One right-wing billionaire alone dropped $10 million into a super PAC.
3. **I have multiple Republican opponents** \-- not one of them is looking out for the working class. We need to elect a Senator who will fight to cut workers in on the deal, not leave them behind.
4. **We’re facing a fall fundraising slump,** and we need to post strong fundraising numbers. Our opponents will jump at the chance to outraise us.

[**We need to raise $50,000 by the end of the month.
