clean_body: | | | = Folks -- I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 to my campaign. But first, a few facts about this race: 1. Ohio’s open Senate seat could decide if we’re able to hold our slim Democratic Senate majority. With a 50/50 split, we can’t afford to lose a single battleground race like this one. 2. National Republicans are already pouring millions of dollars into this race. One right-wing billionaire alone dropped $10 million into a super PAC. 3. I have multiple Republican opponents \-- not one of them is looking out for the working class. We need to elect a Senator who will fight to cut workers in on the deal, not leave them behind. 4. We’re facing a fall fundraising slump, and we need to post strong fundraising numbers. Our opponents will jump at the chance to outraise us. = = Together, I know we can pull this off. \-- Tim Ryan | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

We know you've been busy these past couple of weeks so we wanted to make sure you saw the big news that happened over the holidays.

**Congressional maps were finalized and they show that CA-27 (our new district number!) will be one of the Democrats' best chances in the entire country at flipping a district from red to blue.

And, as Republicans like Mike Garcia are out there still parroting Trump's Big Lie, constantly attacking voting and reproductive rights, and outrageously fanning flames of COVID-19 conspiracy theories,**it is clear that who we elect matters.**

In 2020, the margin of victory in this district was just **333 votes** and, with the new maps, our odds are even better.

While Democrats in districts across the country face an uphill battle, our district has a historic opportunity to flip this seat, and help hold Democratic control of the House. We can do it, but it will take all of us showing up and getting to work right now. It's an election year and we have no time to lose.

body:
We wanted you to be one of the first to know that the tentative agenda... |
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_JUST RELEASED:
Tentative 2022 Congress of Counties Agenda_**.
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1bb2a5fe13&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Hoosier Republican,**

We wanted you to be one of the first to know that the tentative agenda for the 2022 Congress of Counites has just been released! This ultimate, two-day training event for Republicans is just 50 days away, and you **won’t** want to miss it.

You’ll have the opportunity to attend breakout sessions led by some of the most knowledgeable insiders on a variety of topics, including:
* Campaign fundraising
* Understanding social media
* Candidate recruitment and launching a campaign
* Campaign finance and reporting
* Data analytics
* County officer training
* And so much more

We have a great two days lined up for you that include hospitality suites, a networking lounge, vendors, and plenty of opportunities to interact with your fellow Republicans.

If you’re a candidate, grassroots activist, party officer, volunteer, or are just looking to get more involved, the **2022 Congress of Counties** is the event for **you**.

Thanks,
The Indiana Republican Party

---
|
---
| [RESERVE YOUR SPOT NOW!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e855543b4b&e=1acd9bb3d6 "RESERVE YOUR SPOT NOW!")
---
| [CHECK OUT THE AGENDA NOW!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e2500e9e13&e=1acd9bb3d6 "CHECK OUT THE AGENDA NOW!")
---
|
---
| **_Hotel Room Block_** The room block at the French Lick Resort is **open**! To reserve your room at a special rate call the French Lick Resort directly at [1-888-936-9360.](tel:1-855-435-4167) You **must** inform the booking agent that you are with the Indiana Republican Party Congress of Counties when making your reservation in order to receive the special rate. Our group code is 0222IRP. **The deadline to book your room is Friday, February 4, 2022.**

| | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=250be99111&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| Peter,

We wanted to make sure you saw Susan’s message on yesterday’s anniversary of the Capitol insurrection. Susan works every day to defend the future of our democracy against those trying to undermine it. [_**If you are able, consider making a contribution today to ensure we have the resources to keep Susan in Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40464172/324464302/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220107-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQzOGQwNi0wNjcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Z-8ujdSM6oawlcXjqQSGQn9Qs5WwYDIJ6ZJBdAZsGs=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40464173/324464303/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220107-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGQzOGQwNi0wNjcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Z-8ujdSM6oawlcXjqQSGQn9Qs5WwYDIJ6ZJBdAZsGs=)
---
\----------Forwarded message---------- Peter,

One year ago today, on January 6th, 2021, a mob of right-wing domestic terrorists stormed the United States Capitol in a Donald Trump-inspired attempt to overturn the results of our free and fair election. I was in the House Gallery that day. From that spot, I heard gunshots outside the House Chamber. I crouched below the balcony walls alongside Rep. Jason Crow (D-CO) as we hid from the rioters. I made what I thought could be my final call to my children.

On that day, both Democrats and Republicans were terrified. We had no idea what was happening outside the doors of the Chamber, relying on updates from social media and loved ones for information as we slipped on our gas masks, evacuated the building, and sought refuge in a nearby safe room.

**Frankly, seeing Republican lawmakers (some of the same Republicans I saw that day in fear for their lives) now deny the reality of what happened on January 6th —some referring to it as a "normal tourist visit"— only rubs salt in the wound.**

The fear my colleagues and I felt that day, both for our personal safety and for the future of our democracy, left an indelible impact. I am tremendously grateful for the law enforcement officers who ensured our security. Now, it is up to us, the American people, to ensure the events of January 6th are not forgotten and never repeated.

I hope and trust that you will stand with me, as you have always done, to ensure the story of that dark day is told. Tonight, you can watch me on CNN with Anderson Cooper at 8:30 pm ET, along with some of my friends who were also there that day, to reflect on this solemn occasion.

Thank you. As we enter 2022, I wish for you, your family, and our country a year of peace and prosperity.

Sincerely,

Susan

subject: Great News!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Thank You!

** Newsletter-January Vol. 2, #1
------------------------------------------------------------

** 7 January 22
------------------------------------------------------------

** Thank You!
------------------------------------------------------------
Happy New Year!

We began the new year celebrating the kindness and generosity of so many who supported and donated to the campaign. In six weeks, over $16,000 was contributed! You helped the campaign to become the third highest fundraiser in District 4 in the last 35 years! We offer a heart-felt "Thank You." While we still have a long way to go, we're off to a great start!

It's Time To Volunteer
Exactly 10 months from today, November 7, we'll know the general election results.

Whether you're local or across the nation, there is much that needs to get done-in person or virtual.

The campaign will be holding a series of virtual volunteer interest gatherings. Each will be around 30-45 minutes. Please attend and invite others to restore their Constitutional power. Remember, those who govern do so at the consent of the governed (that's us) in America. It's time to make a real difference. Keep in mind, you are not committing to volunteering, you are simply getting information to decide if you want to volunteer and how much you'd like to volunteer. Who can you invite?

Zoom Volunteer Interest Opportunities
Saturday, Jan 8 Tuesday, Jan 11
4-5p 7-8p
The Zoom Link Is The Same For Both Dates
https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=2350ecdc84&e=12a37459a2
Please do not post the zoom link on social media.

Meet & Greets
The campaign has been hosting virtual and in-person Meet & Greets with Jeff. Who do you know that shares our concern for the Country? Consider inviting them to meet Jeff and learn how they can make difference.
Email Us For More Info (mailto:Info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com?subject=Meet%20%26%20Greets)

Donate Here (https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=58e8d6191a&e=12a37459a2) and Thank You For Your Amazing Support!

Remember, Jeff is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Please share this newsletter with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff
Jeff Warner For Congress Website (https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=bd6590ab59&e=12a37459a2)

============================================================
© 2021 Jeff Warner For Congress, All rights reserved.
Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress

Our mailing address is:
P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

** info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com (mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=6240e81502)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=6240e81502)
.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: FWD - Update (re: the filibuster)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This week, Senate Democrats made an important announcement.
#
Peter, we wanted to make sure that you didn’t miss Pramila’s update from earlier this week. Senate Democrats announced that they will hold a vote to change the filibuster in order to pass sweeping voting rights legislation.
Now we need to make sure they do it, so we can secure voting rights and preserve our democracy. But it’s also about ending the filibuster so we can pass more of our popular policies — from abortion protections and the Equality Act to a $15 minimum wage. **[If you’re in this fight with Pramila to end the filibuster, pass voting rights legislation, and win progressive policies, chip in $3 to our fight right now.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9352?refcode=em20220107-941&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=941%2E420207%2E-IrgCI)**
**[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9352?refcode=em20220107-941&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=941%2E420207%2E-IrgCI)**
\- Team Jayapal
\-----Forwarded Message-----
Sent: January 4, 2022
Sender: Pramila Jayapal
Subject: Update (re: the filibuster)
Peter,
Senate Democrats just announced a vote to change the filibuster before Martin Luther King Jr. Day in order to pass a critical voting rights bill. That’s big news.
We need Senate Democrats to finally bypass the filibuster so we can protect voting rights, free and fair elections, and our democracy. But it’s clear that we also need an end to the filibuster so we can pass popular legislation on protecting abortion rights, LGBTQ+ equality, policing reform, raising the minimum wage, gun safety, climate action, health care, and so much more.
After voters delivered us the House, Senate, and White House, Democrats have a rare opportunity to deliver for the people in a big way. We can’t afford to squander it. I’ve long been advocating for an end to the filibuster — and there’s too much on the line for our agenda to simply be stalled in the Senate.
[**Peter, can you support my fight to end the filibuster with a $3 contribution today? I won’t stop working to protect our democracy, codify _Roe v. Wade_ , and pass other desperately-needed progressive reforms.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9352?refcode=em20220107-941&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=941%2E420207%2E-IrgCI)
**[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9352?refcode=em20220107-941&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=941%2E420207%2E-IrgCI)**
**It’s simple: we either protect the filibuster or our democracy, Peter.** We must respond to the more than 400 Republican attacks on voting rights and our elections by getting rid of the filibuster. That’s how we take power away from Mitch McConnell, protect voting rights, and preserve our democracy. But ending the filibuster is also how we respond to Republican attacks on LGBTQ+ folks, abortion rights, and the environment. This is why getting rid of the filibuster is so important and so urgent.
**It’s time to nix the filibuster and deliver for the people.**
[**Let’s not allow Republicans to stop voting rights, abortion rights, the fight for equality, and critical action to combat climate change. Chip in today to fuel my fight to end the filibuster and protect our democracy.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9352?refcode=em20220107-941&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=941%2E420207%2E-IrgCI)
We can only make this change together, and we need to be all-in on this fight.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220107-941-footer&t=24&refcode2=941_420207_-IrgCI&akid=941%2E420207%2E-IrgCI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=941%2E420207%2E-IrgCI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=941%2E420207%2E-IrgCI)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Petition via Shontel Brown for Congress
subject: A Terrorist Attack on the Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Our democracy needs you.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40464453/324465415/1378773197?refcode=EM_PET_220107VRA_N_PET_90DO_5_G_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2YwNzkyNi0wODcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_mSInpo3sbczp1iHG2o98g0Nyv_3EKzyc0TLYla4jaU=) Peter — **did you see this? For once, we may agree with Ted Cruz!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40464454/324465416/1378773197?refcode=EM_PET_220107VRA_N_PET_90DO_5_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2YwNzkyNi0wODcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_mSInpo3sbczp1iHG2o98g0Nyv_3EKzyc0TLYla4jaU=) Telling it like it is, **Ted Cruz described January 6 as “a violent terrorist attack on the Capitol.”** Of course, now Ted’s walking back his statement, but he was right. January 6 was a violent terrorist attack against the Capitol and democracy itself, and **the threat to our democracy continues.**

In 2021, 19 states passed 34 laws restricting access to the ballot box. Republicans know **the only way they can stay in power is by destroying our democracy** and restricting voting. That’s why _the Senate must protect the right to vote by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act._

[**_We need 50 grassroots supporters to stand up for protecting our right to vote and tell the Senate to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act by signing our petition now! ➡_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40464455/324465417/627500040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2YwNzkyNi0wODcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_mSInpo3sbczp1iHG2o98g0Nyv_3EKzyc0TLYla4jaU=&emci=24e57180-f86f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=77f07926-0870-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=23746811) [Sign Our Petition
Pass the John Lewis VRA!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40464456/324465418/627500040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2YwNzkyNi0wODcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_mSInpo3sbczp1iHG2o98g0Nyv_3EKzyc0TLYla4jaU=&emci=24e57180-f86f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=77f07926-0870-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=23746811) We can’t afford to wait. Our democracy is under threat by Republicans who only care about staying in power, not working for the people. The time to act is now!

Let’s do this,

Shontel Brown for Congress |
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Last year's fundraising broke a state record! Friend, We have some record breaking news. We raised more funds in a non-election year than any previous Republican Attorney General candidate in Arizona. I am both grateful and deeply humbled by the faith that conservative Arizonans have placed in me. Running for office requires a lot of resources to get our message out across our great state, but thanks to your help and support, we are starting off 2022 on a very strong footing. **But now is not the time to get complacent.** Our massive fundraising haul makes Democrats nervous, and now that we are in the election year it is time to send a message that Arizona is not blue, will never be blue, and is a bright red state that will send a red wave crashing throughout the southwest. **So, in addition to our record fundraising, we want to run the largest grassroots operation of any Attorney General candidate in Arizona history.** I trust Arizonans to show their grit and independence by rolling up their sleeves, putting on their boots and getting the job done. **[Will you join our grassroots army by signing up to volunteer today and help us get our message out to voters across Arizona?](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=bec7a0eeff5740188c4c324d4b6d6c59&_e=1TYKGjjF1hsJMMFNoWDKXAa6C7cvpmPhpvU-tSvNPEAdplVe3FkbTJD8Ic_6ynXT7yD9mWCDAf7YjIgew1Oy8krWrLDhxG9dTVKhwb0jovKTXyQy-8zGl22litdHPgASy7yWYzluug22tjhH6zn5frTNPfJz2PDwLkjq92YFNuEhU3Hrqc2NO2oTBn0_FosQ3_Ql0ob5EzNsJetnhF4KXgvImkg25u0rav6vT53tybeOk1n1Zk0op5o6PfquVrCER_4sZWDq3viH_DsBl8gbUYn-COwf453pTRs1GX-HoaAw92SiDJ0sxrPYTh-Fzg9tVvs1foK_76HMsx_uwmeI2uCPl2VubOw3eSEG1dlXm_LUvwOZdSn2Q1gkzk5Efn1Z7XVoicC8QjkUYLJqf8XbFH4uFaf8hmohXLx8ukbypdc52FvFD0D87K40zywAHtZJ)** Democrats know that if I am elected they will be held accountable for their failures, unconstitutional actions, and their refusal to enforce our laws. That’s why they’re ready to spend millions of dollars to flip Arizona **BLUE**. We need to **double down** on our campaign successes so we can spread our message far and wide. clean_body: Last year's fundraising broke a state record! Friend, We have some record breaking news. We raised more funds in a non-election year than any previous Republican Attorney General candidate in Arizona. I am both grateful and deeply humbled by the faith that conservative Arizonans have placed in me. Running for office requires a lot of resources to get our message out across our great state, but thanks to your help and support, we are starting off 2022 on a very strong footing. But now is not the time to get complacent. Our massive fundraising haul makes Democrats nervous, and now that we are in the election year it is time to send a message that Arizona is not blue, will never be blue, and is a bright red state that will send a red wave crashing throughout the southwest. So, in addition to our record fundraising, we want to run the largest grassroots operation of any Attorney General candidate in Arizona history. I trust Arizonans to show their grit and independence by rolling up their sleeves, putting on their boots and getting the job done. Democrats know that if I am elected they will be held accountable for their failures, unconstitutional actions, and their refusal to enforce our laws. That’s why they’re ready to spend millions of dollars to flip Arizona BLUE. We need to double down on our campaign successes so we can spread our message far and wide. I know I can count on you now that 2022 has arrived. Thank you again for a great year in 2021, Friend. I’m so appreciative for your support and humbled by the trust you have put in me to be your conservative voice for Attorney General. Sincerely, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

clean_body: We want to keep you in the loop! | | | To support relief efforts for those affected by the Boulder County fires at the end of last year, please. Peter, a lot is happening on the ground and we don’t want you to miss it! Here’s a quick update from our campaign team: The competitiveness of our district is making headlines... again. The Hill, one of the nation’s largest political publications, just included CO-08 in a list of “interesting races to watch in 2022”. They wrote that our race “will likely serve as a barometer of the national political atmosphere.” In simpler terms: all eyes are on us. = **= Team Caraveo is getting bigger by the day! As Dr. Caraveo gears up to run in one of the most competitive races in the country, she has a long list of endorsers on her team. This includes nearly 40 local leaders, Elect Democratic Women, 314 Action, and EMILY’s List. = They all joined Team Caraveo because they know that Dr. Caraveo has the life experience, skills, and drive to serve the needs of our community. Another extremist Republican just joined the race. Joining the ranks of anti-choice and anti-vaxx Lori Saine and promoter of Trump’s “Big Lie” Jan Kulmann, another extremist Republican just jumped in the race for CO-08. In his launch statement, he called Joe Biden a “radical liberal” and explicitly stated he’s running to fight for Big Oil and Big Gas. We now have SIX Republicans in the race. And we know we can count on Trump and his MAGA crew to write big checks to defeat Dr. Caraveo. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Vamos, Team Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. But she can’t do it alone. = | = = Learn more at: Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you would like to receive fewer emails, please .** If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.**

Friend,
It's a new year, and with it -- a new congressional district. This new map confirms what we've suspected all along: **our new congressional district will set the political stage of this state.**
That's why it's so important that we have the resources to prepare for whatever the GOP throws our way. **Now, here's the troubling part -- under the new lines, President Biden would have carried the district by just _0.1 percentage points, or 395 votes._**
Electing Kirsten is a must. She is the most qualified and experienced candidate, who will go to work and fight every day for the values we all hold dear.
Republicans will be spending millions to take back control of the House. And we won't lie, this year could be a tough one for Democrats.
[**That's why we're asking if you can help defend Democrats’ slim majority in the House and contribute to Kirsten's grassroots campaign today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40464768/324466684/558373307?refcode=X_010721_NewYearNewDistrict&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OThhN2U2MS0wOTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6VpX9EHXWFdTMM_Q0RNMzczywyp7QPinW1yXJ50LPoI=)

body:
Statement by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
| | [View this email in your browser](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxdkM2OgyAUhZ9GdzWKiHbhYjqmTdpkks4sOjMbcgtYaQCtYE3n6Yfan0UTINzzwbk5l5eIFYixUJYoRihO4jzJ0wwnEYgkBsYLSFhd46QIcDxKE_HWgOJH1w-6i1irw6ZkcZalgIEwqHPgyX6PSEbSOccY7YuiDlXZONfZIH0L0NIvC2cBWvSSQWQGpsRghQaprn4eg-6UrC_-dvZbGFinzODdKUiXjeTepvpc_26HanEqAkQGp6kWXA7ag8nmLtp26JnwomGKPj0nxHwJ8mA8fKSe4cw1tOuFlVwYR2856ZFOSanXu9ZwS11LudAt68FZegQzQH-hhIIx8ix666tHj9Y4b3TrP-Pg_uZf2_Fn5TE1SnIPXsTXcGFf8m6USklLcj_-w2NG4T1NGeSLAKHpH0LTeNEGL74_yGa3qWbreEVmFcnweKXo3Z_u0onn07tLdB8aCvLqH0FqrHw)

\- January 7, 2022 -
Statement by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
What we witnessed yesterday was the last gasps of a corrupt and discredited left-wing political and media establishment that has, for decades, driven our country into the ground—shipping away our jobs, surrendering our strength, sacrificing our sovereignty, attacking our history and values, and trying to turn America into a country that our people can barely recognize. These radical leftists in Washington care NOTHING for American Democracy. All they care about is control over you, and wealth and riches for themselves. But they are failing. No one believes them anymore. And the day is quicky coming when they will be overwhelmingly voted out of power. Joe Biden’s voice is now the voice of desperation and despair. His handlers gave him that speech to read yesterday because they know the unprecedented failures of his presidency and the left-wing extremism of the Pelosi-Schumer Congress have destroyed the Democrat Party. Part of their panic is motivated by the realization that, just like the Russia Collusion Hoax, they cannot sustain the preposterous fabrications about January 6 much longer. The truth is coming out. But for them, the worst part of it all is the knowledge that the American People are seeing right through their phony media event—which despicably compared a Pelosi-led security failure at the Capitol to the darkest days in American history and the deaths of 3,000 Americans. The people see right through that sham. They see a cynical politician who ran for office promising unity who is now doing the most divisive thing possible—slandering his political opponents as domestic terrorists, just like insecure dictators do in communist countries. The American People also see that January 6 has become the Democrats’ excuse and pretext for the most chilling assault on the civil liberties of American citizens in generations. It is being used to justify outrageous attacks on free speech, widespread censorship, de-platforming, calls for increased domestic surveillance, appalling abuse of political prisoners, labeling opponents of COVID lockdowns and mandates as national security threats, and even ordering the FBI to target parents who object to the radical indoctrination of their children in school. And this week, January 6 is also the Democrats’ excuse for trying to pass a radical Federal takeover of state election law. They are trying to BAN voter ID and other basic measures that can ensure the sacred integrity of the vote. The reason the Democrats are doing all of this is not because they believe they will win a fair and honest election. It’s because they know they will overwhelmingly LOSE one. Remember, I am not the one trying to undermine American Democracy—I am the one trying to SAVE American Democracy. Today, I am more confident than ever in the strength and common sense of the American People. They are counting the days until we will no longer have to be constantly lectured, lied to, and dictated to by corrupt politicians and their media partners. When we will no longer have to put up with this broken establishment’s hoaxes and its manufactured media narratives—And as Biden and his radical handlers know, that day is coming fast. Because in the months and years ahead, the American People are going to speak up, take action, and VOTE in massive numbers, and we are going to TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY. From the very beginning, all that Americans have wanted is great jobs, safe neighborhoods, strong borders, good schools, a proud nation, and a government that LISTENS to the American People. That is what our movement has always been about—and that is what we are focused on to this day. Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats have failed on every front. But do not lose hope. America WILL be Great Again.

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpfp758mrgjcu7d6ub55a6fbk31od3d594ijbd10_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clie2or4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4hu8h5ucripjdtj20lufq9jlgana4lmqoodkdv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clie2or4cth2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z90mord2ngp34n6ld5p94i4bmlj6j1o2ahbpj8g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clie2or4cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed. Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service.
---

1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
| | [ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNkUtv4yAUhX-NsyMiGON64UU7bhcTtbPpqO3KInCJ6ZjHAJ408-sLVvqQEELfPVzOPci-IWqHN7onmBC8w-2upfm03V3hrlWqbkUju65TFcUS4h-npLN8lq8pLMZvhTObqaeEtQfJrohkStYNqzmlEojEmFHBmNjM_ZSSj1V9XZG7vCKIJcD2pG0AWZoUxv8B4gaCFhy9Om0TUouVgeuo7RFlkdEpAWSpAXOAECftq_qOG7fYVNVDgyvClmRGA1IvJhMwXM_jpC48uiUIyNyI0fK8Llxw47k-2lz5CGFUwRmUJkBlaOTU-H3ssXi9WP3o4WyC1UYRJhiFP4f49UaCUBz5mJmYMxztrGXx-Hayv5W8fYkrnLTMMQ2HX948_sd_6Sb00p_0POvI2vwHxzLSGns2PWt17qv2piJkvUfImjDZ05vnB7Z_2g_o_rb7iQbW0FOpkh95T2cPn9JLl-0aVaHt8A7JpK4T) |

Supporter: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJxdkE1PhDAQhn9NuUFg-Oj2wMEV9-BGvWyitwb6sVRbqFAk66-3JetHTCaT5pnpOzMvr0uQWRqpGlKANEtxhgv_SrJdSrCUOWYlJ4RIVKRczG-j5OPQav7qpsXYhI0m6uuWSLwDYNDt5K4rZEmqXBQFJxzyjHEZ6bp3zs4ov0Fw8LGua_Jfx-MwAOWHxRlqBFeLQXkjTKs07SWCKvB5XCYmPDeMDq2PK2etsa06D77yfQiV02hi14s46MajpH9H0rn9EK0Rk2I_GuPgxOC8RGh0gjJ7mebfGU5MYSM7e8a0h3TQinuCc9yBPO0J3mCvuD-16Z6sOX2m70U01dyuSms1V9j7eA4nbdb5pbWSlxrhPQLY_gFsLsGx2L88VsfnYxM_3JH7uKnKYg1VuPXZXaz4ab2qJJtVgeLmC1Jxl58) Notification Status: Signed Up
Donald J. Trump January 7th, 2022
What we witnessed yesterday was the last gasps of a corrupt and discredited left-wing political and media establishment that has, for decades, driven our country into the ground—shipping away our jobs, surrendering our strength, sacrificing our sovereignty, attacking our history and values, and trying to turn America into a country that our people can barely recognize.

These radical leftists in Washington care NOTHING for American Democracy. All they care about is control over you, and wealth and riches for themselves.

But they are failing. No one believes them anymore. And the day is quicky coming when they will be overwhelmingly voted out of power.

Joe Biden’s voice is now the voice of desperation and despair.

His handlers gave him that speech to read yesterday because they know the unprecedented failures of his presidency and the left-wing extremism of the Pelosi-Schumer Congress have destroyed the Democrat Party.

Part of their panic is motivated by the realization that, just like the Russia Collusion Hoax, they cannot sustain the preposterous fabrications about January 6 much longer. The truth is coming out.

But for them, the worst part of it all is the knowledge that the American People are seeing right through their phony media event—which despicably compared a Pelosi-led security failure at the Capitol to the darkest days in American history and the deaths of 3,000 Americans.

The people see right through that sham. They see a cynical politician who ran for office promising unity who is now doing the most divisive thing possible—slandering his political opponents as domestic terrorists, just like insecure dictators do in communist countries.

The American People also see that January 6 has become the Democrats’ excuse and pretext for the most chilling assault on the civil liberties of American citizens in generations. It is being used to justify outrageous attacks on free speech, widespread censorship, de-platforming, calls for increased domestic surveillance, appalling abuse of political prisoners, labeling opponents of COVID lockdowns and mandates as national security threats, and even ordering the FBI to target parents who object to the radical indoctrination of their children in school. And this week, January 6 is also the Democrats’ excuse for trying to pass a radical Federal takeover of state election law. They are trying to BAN voter ID and other basic measures that can ensure the sacred integrity of the vote.

The reason the Democrats are doing all of this is not because they believe they will win a fair and honest election. It’s because they know they will overwhelmingly LOSE one.

Remember, I am not the one trying to undermine American Democracy—I am the one trying to SAVE American Democracy.

Today, I am more confident than ever in the strength and common sense of the American People. They are counting the days until we will no longer have to be constantly lectured, lied to, and dictated to by corrupt politicians and their media partners. When we will no longer have to put up with this broken establishment’s hoaxes and its manufactured media narratives—And as Biden and his radical handlers know, that day is coming fast. Because in the months and years ahead, the American People are going to speak up, take action, and VOTE in massive numbers, and we are going to TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY.

From the very beginning, all that Americans have wanted is great jobs, safe neighborhoods, strong borders, good schools, a proud nation, and a government that LISTENS to the American People. That is what our movement has always been about—and that is what we are focused on to this day.

Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats have failed on every front. But do not lose hope. America WILL be Great Again.

Trump January 7th, 2022 What we witnessed yesterday was the last gasps of a corrupt and discredited left-wing political and media establishment that has, for decades, driven our country into the ground—shipping away our jobs, surrendering our strength, sacrificing our sovereignty, attacking our history and values, and trying to turn America into a country that our people can barely recognize. These radical leftists in Washington care NOTHING for American Democracy. All they care about is control over you, and wealth and riches for themselves. But they are failing. No one believes them anymore. And the day is quicky coming when they will be overwhelmingly voted out of power. Joe Biden’s voice is now the voice of desperation and despair. His handlers gave him that speech to read yesterday because they know the unprecedented failures of his presidency and the left-wing extremism of the Pelosi-Schumer Congress have destroyed the Democrat Party. Part of their panic is motivated by the realization that, just like the Russia Collusion Hoax, they cannot sustain the preposterous fabrications about January 6 much longer. The truth is coming out. But for them, the worst part of it all is the knowledge that the American People are seeing right through their phony media event—which despicably compared a Pelosi-led security failure at the Capitol to the darkest days in American history and the deaths of 3,000 Americans. The people see right through that sham. They see a cynical politician who ran for office promising unity who is now doing the most divisive thing possible—slandering his political opponents as domestic terrorists, just like insecure dictators do in communist countries. The American People also see that January 6 has become the Democrats’ excuse and pretext for the most chilling assault on the civil liberties of American citizens in generations. It is being used to justify outrageous attacks on free speech, widespread censorship, de-platforming, calls for increased domestic surveillance, appalling abuse of political prisoners, labeling opponents of COVID lockdowns and mandates as national security threats, and even ordering the FBI to target parents who object to the radical indoctrination of their children in school. And this week, January 6 is also the Democrats’ excuse for trying to pass a radical Federal takeover of state election law. They are trying to BAN voter ID and other basic measures that can ensure the sacred integrity of the vote. The reason the Democrats are doing all of this is not because they believe they will win a fair and honest election. It’s because they know they will overwhelmingly LOSE one. Remember, I am not the one trying to undermine American Democracy—I am the one trying to SAVE American Democracy. Today, I am more confident than ever in the strength and common sense of the American People. They are counting the days until we will no longer have to be constantly lectured, lied to, and dictated to by corrupt politicians and their media partners. When we will no longer have to put up with this broken establishment’s hoaxes and its manufactured media narratives—And as Biden and his radical handlers know, that day is coming fast. Because in the months and years ahead, the American People are going to speak up, take action, and VOTE in massive numbers, and we are going to TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY. From the very beginning, all that Americans have wanted is great jobs, safe neighborhoods, strong borders, good schools, a proud nation, and a government that LISTENS to the American People. That is what our movement has always been about—and that is what we are focused on to this day. Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats have failed on every front. But do not lose hope. Except for Sinema and Manchin, Senate Democrats are united in the fight to protect voting rights. By contrast, McConnell wants the GOP to have free rein to pass voter suppression measures, continue gerrymandering, and even seize control of what should be nonpartisan election administration functions. He’s using Sinema to claim “bipartisan” support and disguise his real objective — undermining our democracy. This is Sinema conceding power to Republicans at the behest of her corporate donors. The only we way we can actually protect our elections from GOP-led attacks — and abortion access, and so much more — is getting rid of the Jim Crow filibuster. body:
I hear overwhelmingly from folks here in the district that voting rights are a top priority for them.

| Peter,

One year ago this week, our nation watched in horror as violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol as part of a protest against what they considered to be a stolen election.

Since then, emboldened by this attack and the refusal of Republican lawmakers to publicly confirm that Joe Biden won the 2020 presidential election, state legislatures around the country have been attempting to limit voting rights.

**Make no mistake: the right to vote is the most fundamental right in our nation.** I hear overwhelmingly from folks here in the district that voting rights are a top priority for them, and I couldn’t agree more. But our current member of Congress, Don Bacon, voted against the John Lewis Voting Rights and Advancement Act, which would restore and expand critical provisions of the 1965 Voting Rights Act and ensure that Black Americans in the 21st century are afforded the protections guaranteed by the original legislation.

clean_body: I hear overwhelmingly from folks here in the district that voting rights are a top priority for them. | Peter, One year ago this week, our nation watched in horror as violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol as part of a protest against what they considered to be a stolen election. Since then, emboldened by this attack and the refusal of Republican lawmakers to publicly confirm that Joe Biden won the 2020 presidential election, state legislatures around the country have been attempting to limit voting rights. Make no mistake: the right to vote is the most fundamental right in our nation. I hear overwhelmingly from folks here in the district that voting rights are a top priority for them, and I couldn’t agree more. But our current member of Congress, Don Bacon, voted against the John Lewis Voting Rights and Advancement Act, which would restore and expand critical provisions of the 1965 Voting Rights Act and ensure that Black Americans in the 21st century are afforded the protections guaranteed by the original legislation. We must send a strong message to Don Bacon and Republicans across the country that Nebraska is ready for a representative who will make voting rights a priority.= | | | = | = | = | = | = With appreciation for your support, = * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

Friend,
---
After a year of being targeted by the FBI, it seems 2022 will be no different.
---
At the end of last year, President Trump’s former Chief of Staff, Mark Meadows, was held in criminal contempt of Congress just weeks after the indictment of Steve Bannon.
---

---
These corrupt government goons are trying to destroy me with a mountain of legal battles and fees, and I need your urgent help fighting back.

**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z157idkkerk8n2cvckhq526ld8ijpgge6vjn49o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clieapb6clh2bs)**

---
As I’ve told Tucker Carlson, I have nothing to hide.
---
_It’s been about eight months since the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment._
---
_If they had dirt on me, you better believe it would’ve been exposed by now. They even SURVEILLED my private communications with President Trump for crying out loud!_
---
That’s what’s so terrifying about what’s taking place.
---
**Innocent citizens like me are being targeted, harassed, and indicted by the federal government despite having committed NO CRIMES.**
---
But in the eyes of the Deep State, we’re guilty of a serious crime: loyalty to a political outsider — President Trump — and his mission to drain the swamp.
---
As Alan Dershowitz has said, we are witnessing tactics that you’d expect from a third-world dictatorship, not the United States of America.
---
Sadly, America’s days as the freest nation in the world may be coming to an end.
---
That’s why I refuse to surrender this battle. It’s not just my freedom that I’m fighting for. Our country’s system of justice rests on the chopping block.

Thank you,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: Shawn Hyland Suspends Congressional Race and Endorses Chris Smith
body:
Press Release | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5e2e0dd2ed0d/major-campaign-announcement-8717377?e=5167ed8367)
---
|
---
|
---
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASEContact: joanna@theresolute.groupBerkeley, N.J. — On Friday, January 7th, surrounded by his closest supporters and Congressman Chris Smith of New Jersey’s 4th Congressional District, Shawn Hyland announced the suspension of his campaign and officially endorsed Smith.“ _A Better America_ has always been the battle cry of my campaign—that our nation would renew our spirit of civility, stand by our convictions, and dedicate ourselves to the common good,” said Hyland, “Congressman Smith has a record that embodies those values. I’m concluding my campaign for Congress, but continuing my fight for a better America alongside Chris Smith, who I’m proud to endorse.”This announcement comes after New Jersey’s Congressional Redistricting Committee released maps that moved Hyland from District 3 to District 4 with Smith. “I announced my campaign in October because I didn’t believe incumbent Congressman Andy Kim of the far-left Progressive Caucus was the right representative for us. I ran this campaign from day one committed to be that conservative, principled option for New Jerseyans that we were rarely seeing on the ballot.”“Americans are growing tired of divisive rhetoric and radical politics,” Hyland noted, “we’re concerned that the fabric that is holding us together is beginning to tear, that a day will come where we don’t see each other as both Americans and neighbors, but as untrustworthy political opponents with no shared culture.”In his endorsement of one of New Jersey’s most effective representatives, Hyland said, “Congressman Chris Smith embodies the core values of _A Better America_ —civility, conviction, and the common good. I cannot in good conscience campaign for a better America knowing I would be challenging a congressman who practices those ideals in the halls of Congress each day. My congressional run was never about Shawn Hyland, it was always about _A Better America_. Smith is like minded with me and shares the same heartbeat on social issues.”Congressman Smith commented, "I am grateful to have the endorsement of Shawn Hyland today. It is an honor and privilege to stand in solidarity with him in the noble and necessary cause of restoring America. However, this won’t become a reality by merely wishing it so. Shawn and I know that. We know that it takes faith and trust in God, persevering and unceasing prayer, lots of hard work and a vision grounded in righteousness and mercy.”Hyland would like supporters to know that he is still fighting for _A Better America_ and will be campaigning for Smith in 2022, “I ran to be a relentless voice for a better America - one with stronger families, safer neighborhoods, better schools, and more economic growth.I want to thank all of my supporters who believed in me and what we would do together in 2022 and beyond. I hope my supporters will come out and give Congressman Smith the same support they have already shown me.”Thank you,Shawn Hyland
|
---
| | | | [](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=4b8d32d2ee&e=5167ed8367)| [](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=ed7c9c27c7&e=5167ed8367)| [](https://hylandforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=3f2ef567ed&e=5167ed8367)

name: Nate Sandvig
subject: Fwd: It’s Because of You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
I want to thank you personally.
| | | Friends,

Did you see my team’s message below?

They wrote you yesterday as we get back to work in the New Year, to express our deep appreciation for everything you’ve done to support my campaign for Congress.

I’m sending this quick follow-up to personally thank you.

**_It means the world to have you on board!_**

I’m a proud military veteran, involved community member, and family man who is 100% determined to SAVE OUR COUNTRY. I’m fighting for ALL of our families, and for the future we’ll leave our children and grandchildren.

We cannot allow this left-wing insanity in Washington and these unconstitutional mandates we’ve seen to become the “new normal”!

I hope you’ll consider making a special contribution today to help us ramp up. **[Please pitch in](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/956843331ec6bf8f/dbb9040655154784c3d6b838967d376c/37283)[ $20.22,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/956843331ec6bf8f/53e0db66a67f8816c3d6b838967d376c/37283)[ $40.44,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/956843331ec6bf8f/8ce0865a41f62331c3d6b838967d376c/37283)[ or any other amount to fuel our fight for REPUBLICAN VICTORY.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/956843331ec6bf8f/7772e11ddee3c006c3d6b838967d376c/37283)**

Thank you again for being part of our amazing grassroots team.

\- Nate
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/956843331ec6bf8f/6dd1c9cf716507bcc3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
Friends,

The New Year is here, and we could not be more excited about what lies ahead.

We’re coming out of the gate strong, right back to work to WIN BIG this year to put this seat in the Republican column and take back the House.

**We’ve built strong momentum to make it happen,_thanks to top supporters like YOU_!**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/956843331ec6bf8f/cf0c0dab6b171b6bc3d6b838967d376c/37283)
---
The stakes are high, and we can’t let up for a minute. America’s future is on the line.

We've ALL had enough of the Democrats’ tax-and-spend agenda, runaway inflation, open borders chaos, and out-of-control crime!

Today, we’re asking you to take a stand to STOP THE INSANITY. Nate is a proud patriot who loves our great country and will fight with all he has to save it. He’s exactly the type of proven leader we need leading the charge to get America back on track in Congress.

body:
I’m so glad to join Team Cranley, and I hope to have your support. | Hi there, **I’m Teresa, and I’m so honored to be running for Lieutenant Governor alongside John — together, we’re going to turn Ohio around!** I’m an Air Force veteran and a former teacher, and I’ve served Ohio over twenty years in the Statehouse. I’m committed to defending reproductive rights, to modernizing our public education, to cleanning up the corruption in Columbus, to making sure our children have access to health care, to combating human trafficking, and to protecting state lands. I’m proud of the work I’ve done in Columbus. **But I also know that Ohio needs a fresh start — it needs a comeback. That’s why feminist icon _Gloria Steinem_ endorsed our new joint ticket because together, I know we put working families first. ** **[But, team, but we can’t do it without YOU. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. clean_body: I’m so glad to join Team Cranley, and I hope to have your support. | Hi there, I’m Teresa, and I’m so honored to be running for Lieutenant Governor alongside John — together, we’re going to turn Ohio around! I’m an Air Force veteran and a former teacher, and I’ve served Ohio over twenty years in the Statehouse. I’m committed to defending reproductive rights, to modernizing our public education, to cleanning up the corruption in Columbus, to making sure our children have access to health care, to combating human trafficking, and to protecting state lands. I’m proud of the work I’ve done in Columbus. But I also know that Ohio needs a fresh start — it needs a comeback. That’s why feminist icon Gloria Steinem endorsed our new joint ticket because together, I know we put working families first. = = We need to bring jobs back to our small towns and rural communities. To ensure every Ohioan has access to clean water. To create a tax system that actually works for working families. And so much more. I know that that starts by electing a leader we can count on to bring back responsible government to Columbus and actually listen to the people of this state. John is that leader. I’m so glad to have you with us in the fight for Ohio’s future. Now, I need to ask you to support our campaign with = — this is an extremely competitive race, and anything you can chip in will go a long way towards building a campaign that can win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks so much — I look forward to getting to know you in the months to come, Teresa = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. Happy New Year, friend! I wanted to send a quick thank you to everyone who contributed to our campaign this past year. Whether it's through a small donation, showing us love on social media, or simply reading this email – every bit of support helps to fuel this campaign to bring progressive change to district 46. With your continued support, 2022 will be the year that we elect a candidate that’s for the people and not for big pharmaceutical companies. This is the year we elect progressives to Congress, and not conservative Democrats that halt any type of progress that benefits working people. It’s not easy to go up against an incumbent that’s in the pocket of rich corporations. I can’t do this without you. Our opponent has big pharma, but we have the people. With your support, we’ll make it clear that big pharma money is no match against grassroots power. This is our year. Thank you again for your continued support. In Solidarity, Mike Ortega P.S. One way to help us win is to sustain the campaign as a recurring donor. clean_body: | = Happy New Year, friend! I wanted to send a quick thank you to everyone who contributed to our campaign this past year. Whether it's through a small donation, showing us love on social media, or simply reading this email – every bit of support helps to fuel this campaign to bring progressive change to district 46. With your continued support, 2022 will be the year that we elect a candidate that’s for the people and not for big pharmaceutical companies. This is the year we elect progressives to Congress, and not conservative Democrats that halt any type of progress that benefits working people. It’s not easy to go up against an incumbent that’s in the pocket of rich corporations. I can’t do this without you. Our opponent has big pharma, but we have the people. With your support, we’ll make it clear that big pharma money is no match against grassroots power. This is our year. Thank you again for your continued support. In Solidarity, Mike Ortega P.S. One way to help us win is to sustain the campaign as a recurring donor. = | Our campaign is fueled by everyday people like you chipping in whatever they can. Can you give $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stay on track on our campaign costs? = | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Subject: Final update about our end-of-year goal Hello,

I wanted you to hear it from me first — thanks to the support and dedication of this grassroots team, we reached our end-of-year goal!

Early investments are key to winning competitive races like ours. And because so many folks chipped in before the end-of-year deadline, we are starting the next phase of our campaign strong.

But, that doesn't mean we can slow down. In fact, it's time to kick our campaign for mayor of Los Angeles into high gear. With 2021 behind us, the primary is right around the corner. I know with your continued support we can make our vision for L.A. a reality and create a city where all people have the opportunity to thrive.

I want to say **thank you** for supporting our campaign so far. The next few months won't be easy, and every single second from here on out matters. If we're going to tackle homelessness, defend against COVID-19, and build an L.A. that puts our communities and public safety first, we have to stay on target. That's why I'm asking:

**[Will you make your first donation of the new year to my campaign? If you're an L.A. resident, individual contributions up to $214 are generally matched 6-to-1 by the city. Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
| |
---|---|---
|
# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump January 7th, 2022 What we witnessed yesterday was the last gasps of a corrupt and discredited left-wing political and media establishment that has, for decades, driven our country into the ground—shipping away our jobs, surrendering our strength, sacrificing our sovereignty, attacking our history and values, and trying to turn America into a country that our people can barely recognize. These radical leftists in Washington care NOTHING for American Democracy. All they care about is control over you, and wealth and riches for themselves. But they are failing. No one believes them anymore. And the day is quicky coming when they will be overwhelmingly voted out of power. Joe Biden’s voice is now the voice of desperation and despair. His handlers gave him that speech to read yesterday because they know the unprecedented failures of his presidency and the left-wing extremism of the Pelosi-Schumer Congress have destroyed the Democrat Party. Part of their panic is motivated by the realization that, just like the Russia Collusion Hoax, they cannot sustain the preposterous fabrications about January 6 much longer. The truth is coming out. But for them, the worst part of it all is the knowledge that the American People are seeing right through their phony media event—which despicably compared a Pelosi-led security failure at the Capitol to the darkest days in American history and the deaths of 3,000 Americans. The people see right through that sham. They see a cynical politician who ran for office promising unity who is now doing the most divisive thing possible—slandering his political opponents as domestic terrorists, just like insecure dictators do in communist countries. The American People also see that January 6 has become the Democrats’ excuse and pretext for the most chilling assault on the civil liberties of American citizens in generations. It is being used to justify outrageous attacks on free speech, widespread censorship, de-platforming, calls for increased domestic surveillance, appalling abuse of political prisoners, labeling opponents of COVID lockdowns and mandates as national security threats, and even ordering the FBI to target parents who object to the radical indoctrination of their children in school. And this week, January 6 is also the Democrats’ excuse for trying to pass a radical Federal takeover of state election law. They are trying to BAN voter ID and other basic measures that can ensure the sacred integrity of the vote. The reason the Democrats are doing all of this is not because they believe they will win a fair and honest election. It’s because they know they will overwhelmingly LOSE one. Remember, I am not the one trying to undermine American Democracy—I am the one trying to SAVE American Democracy. Today, I am more confident than ever in the strength and common sense of the American People. They are counting the days until we will no longer have to be constantly lectured, lied to, and dictated to by corrupt politicians and their media partners. When we will no longer have to put up with this broken establishment’s hoaxes and its manufactured media narratives—And as Biden and his radical handlers know, that day is coming fast. Because in the months and years ahead, the American People are going to speak up, take action, and VOTE in massive numbers, and we are going to TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY. From the very beginning, all that Americans have wanted is great jobs, safe neighborhoods, strong borders, good schools, a proud nation, and a government that LISTENS to the American People. That is what our movement has always been about—and that is what we are focused on to this day. Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats have failed on every front. But do not lose hope. America WILL be Great Again. | [View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkDFvgzAQhX-N2UD4bHAyMKRFkaoOVYZKURfk4ktwYgwBEyv59TUp6VDJsuX33T3dO1UIxaSikS4gBUhpKuiKZpQlmK8FyDVSVitAmhGe1p0dcbhKp684TlY7VEndRU0BAkKv4AfOv1OpaqA5wErlkufBDvPIFI1z_UjYhsA2HO99ojorjTq5YWr7YNMG2aIflyc--56vMgHIUsK2k2urFpWeWsJKbKU2BPJZHLtpqDGItjaVbHujD7cF1eEr9dEG-MwWn6Sd5HCrhGuqqVfS4bO4sw6t-zWK91_nXfZ58ewecGWNVgH8ExutQqCy3L95eo-GQvVeG6PHXIRVHecR51TRMlNBxAsBeDQBPBYBsN8dTuJyZJf4ncX8I7Uzgtdwu1uPf3WLRbLkBiLKHzwlito)

The American People also see that January 6 has become the Democrats’ excuse and pretext for the most chilling assault on the civil liberties of American citizens in generations. It is being used to justify outrageous attacks on free speech, widespread censorship, de-platforming, calls for increased domestic surveillance, appalling abuse of political prisoners, labeling opponents of COVID lockdowns and mandates as national security threats, and even ordering the FBI to target parents who object to the radical indoctrination of their children in school. And this week, January 6 is also the Democrats’ excuse for trying to pass a radical Federal takeover of state election law. They are trying to BAN voter ID and other basic measures that can ensure the sacred integrity of the vote. The reason the Democrats are doing all of this is not because they believe they will win a fair and honest election. It’s because they know they will overwhelmingly LOSE one. Remember, I am not the one trying to undermine American Democracy—I am the one trying to SAVE American Democracy. Today, I am more confident than ever in the strength and common sense of the American People. They are counting the days until we will no longer have to be constantly lectured, lied to, and dictated to by corrupt politicians and their media partners. When we will no longer have to put up with this broken establishment’s hoaxes and its manufactured media narratives—And as Biden and his radical handlers know, that day is coming fast. Because in the months and years ahead, the American People are going to speak up, take action, and VOTE in massive numbers, and we are going to TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY. From the very beginning, all that Americans have wanted is great jobs, safe neighborhoods, strong borders, good schools, a proud nation, and a government that LISTENS to the American People. That is what our movement has always been about—and that is what we are focused on to this day. Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats have failed on every front. But do not lose hope. America WILL be Great Again. | Donald J. Trump January 6th, 2022 ICYMI: “Why The Supreme Court Should Slap Down Biden’s Utterly Lawless Vaccine Demands” Read the full article by Paul J. Larkin, Jr. with the Federalist . Donald J. Trump January 6th, 2022 ICYMI: “Pelosi Owns The J6 Commission, And That’s Why It Failed” Read the full article by Mollie Hemingway with the Federalist . Donald J. Trump January 6th, 2022 ICYMI: “Democrats Took Control And COVID Got Worse” Read the full article by Eddie Scarry with the Federalist .

# James Marter for Congress (IL14) Releases Impressive Second Round of Endorsements

**Oswego, IL (January 7, 2022) –** James Marter’s campaign for Congress in Illinois' 14th District, has released its second round of personal endorsements. Marter is the twice elected, current Chairman of the Kendall County GOP, in the heart of the new IL14. As the only candidate in the race who lives in the new 14th District, Marter has strong grassroots support including the endorsement from the GOP Chairman of the largest counties in the district: Will, LaSalle and of course, Kendall County. Additionally, the Marter candidacy has growing national support, adding Kenneth Abramowitz to the impressive list of issue experts endorsing Marter. Mr. Abramowitz is recognized as a leading analyst in healthcare and international finance. He is also a frequent Fox News commentator and author of _The Multifront War: Defending America From Political Islam, China, Russia, Pandemics, and Racial Strife_. "Who we send to Congress matters. We need someone who can do the job when they get there and I intend to keep my oath to defend the Constitution and proactively work to protect our country and our rights as citizens,” says Marter. “I intend to bring representation in Congress back to Illinois and the 14th District, and replace Lauren Underwood and the radical policies she is supporting.” The first round of endorsements may be found at [Marter4congress.us](https://ho941.keap-link008.com/v2/click/c8fb7769f15d16f9efdca6cd90093423/eJyNj80KgkAUhd_lriVNTcydiIhoLqLWMeilhnQcZq6BiO_eWOGqoO35-Q5nAkLBBOUNRHDr9_4WLFBYc8lRUNILYvXL9NwgdHwLWi7umeoHCdH0rbv6i7oLAscCGiWaxOkYJ0VeZZcyrwqTlEyZiX8wXui5KyY9xHkJ8_yTix2n9GHQGiJSAy5_Gm4-0Vm1ywSR1JFtd0wRKr_uxVWh1ptB26bNpETRfI4XOL4Z8xNJyV_x). The second round is shown below:
* Kenneth Abramowitz: Analyst, investor, author and philanthropist
* David Shestokas: Candidate for Illinois Attorney General, former Assistant State's Attorney, Author of _Constitutional Sound Bites_ and _Creating the Declaration of Independence_ , extensive work on Election Integrity.
* Dr. Eric Wallace: Candidate for U.S. Senate, Author, Professor, Minister, Founder of Freedom's Journal Institute and former Chair of the African American Republican Council
* David Lombardo: AM 560 On Target Radio Host, President of SAFER USA, Firearms Training School. Board Member, Illinois State Rifle Assn.
* Mark Curran: Three term Lake County Sheriff, Former U.S. Senate Candidate, IL Supreme Court Candidate
* Gretchen Fritz: Will County Board Member, Forest Preserve Commissioner, Plainfield
* Steven Balich: Will County Board Member, District 7
* Tim Hendricks: Vice Chair, Will County GOP, Chair, Joliet Township Republicans

* Diane Harris: Vice Chair, Joliet Township GOP, IL State Senate Candidate

* Rand York: Pastor, author and grassroots leader, Kane County, Big Rock

* Kevin Schramek: Vice Chair, Kendall Cty. GOP, Oswego Twp. GOP Chair, Precinct Committeeperson (P.C.) Oswego 37

* Andrea Houdek: Kendall County GOP Treasurer, P.C. Kendall 02
* Colleen Percy: Plainfield United, P.C. Plainfield

* Claude Ainsworth: Oswego Twp. Road Commissioner, P.C. Oswego 12

* Judy Bush: Oswego Township Trustee, P.C. Oswego 18

* Brian Thomas: Oswego Village Trustee, P.C. Oswego 35

* Terry Olson: Oswego Village Trustee, P.C. Oswego 36

* Donna Sawicki: Oswego Township Trustee

* Kit Kuhrt: Oswego Village Trustee

* Daniel Nicholson: Former Kendall County GOP Vice Chair, P.C. Bristol 9

* Jennifer Martin: Secretary Kendall County GOP, P.C. Bristol 15

* Thomas Nanninga: Kendall County P.C. Bristol 11

* Dennis Corbin: Chairman, LaSalle County TEA Party, P.C. LaSalle County

* Phil Collins: Former Chair, Exec. Director, Illinois Center-Right Coalition

* Adam Dunsmoor: Little Rock Township Trustee, P.C. Little Rock 5
* Rocky Ausec: P.C. Joliet 33
* Gennie Siwicki: Hinckley, DeKalb County

* Debbie Kanarowksi: Kane County P.C. Geneva

* Brian Siwicki: DeKalb County P.C. Hinckley

* David Hale: Rockford TEA Party Founder, former Cong. Candidate IL16

* Barb Rafool Paterson: Peoria County Republican Women, former P.C.

* Pastor Calvin Lindstrom, Church of Christian Liberty

* Pastor Anthony Wilson: Living in the Spirit Ministry, Chicago

* Paul Hurst: Illinois grassroots leader, Ela Township P.C.

* Jim Tobin: Illinois activist and economist, Founder, Taxpayers United of America

I'd be honored to have YOUR support! Jim To [**Unsubscribe**](mailto:info@marter4congress.us), just [**Click Here**](mailto:info@marter4congress.us) and send a blank email. **Better yet, please use the buttons below and visit the campaign's new website!**

Folks,

The new year has already gotten off to a busy start, but I wanted to let you know that thanks to your support, we absolutely _crushed_ our end-of-year fundraising goal! Together, we’re showing the GOP and our opponents that our grassroots campaign should not be underestimated.

We are coming together with a real purpose that all of us care deeply about – protecting this democracy and achieving real progress for working families in Pennsylvania. **As we continue our campaign for the most competitive Senate race in the country, your _continued_ support will help take us all the way to the finish line.**

And while we fight for the change we need – affordable health care, voting rights legislation, protections for workers, action on climate, and so much more – your action and activism will make all the difference.

So once again, thank you for standing with us. I look forward to sharing more successes with you in 2022.

Sincerely,

Conor Lamb [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466375/324472279/-49815258?refcode=em22_220107_eoyty&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NkM2U1NC0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QabymWdVuJ5PnHaWeZyY9leP1pm4Oj37f6CM8nbDx60=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466376/324472280/-49815258?refcode=em22_220107_eoyty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NkM2U1NC0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QabymWdVuJ5PnHaWeZyY9leP1pm4Oj37f6CM8nbDx60=)
