Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466388/324472442/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=)

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, January 7th, 2021**
Peter,
We would not be where we are without supporters like you. The first major deadline of the campaign is coming up fast! The Maryland Annual Campaign Finance Deadline is this Wednesday, January 12th. We need your help to grow our momentum as we approach this critical deadline.
Next week we will see, for the first time, how our campaign stacks up against the others in terms of resources. Polling has made clear we have a viable pathway to victory in the Democratic primary and general election, provided we have the resources necessary to execute our winning strategy. **[With that in mind, I wanted to personally ask you to make an additional investment in our campaign before the January 12 deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466389/324472447/-2033948322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**
You can donate online at **[tomperez.com/finance](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466390/324472450/-2033948322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)** or join us on Monday, January 10 for our**[ last virtual fundraiser before the deadline with Cecile Richards and Congresswoman Grace Meng](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466391/324472454/464494766?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837). **
Thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to keeping in touch.
Happy New Year!
Jessica Semachko
Campaign Manager
Tom Perez for Maryland
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
This week marked the one year anniversary of the brutal attack on the United States Capitol. Violent insurrectionists, incited by the former President of the United States, fought to overturn the will of the People. As we reflect on the events from one year ago, we must realize that this moment requires each and every one of us to organize, mobilize and, most importantly, vote to preserve our democracy for generations to come. Tom released a statement on the anniversary of the insurrection, which you can read **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466392/324472458/1933821209?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466393/324472463/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)
On Monday, Tom was honored to speak on behalf of Delegate Vaughn Stewart at his final fundraiser before the 2022 Maryland Legislative Session. Delegate Stewart is a thought leader whose passion is ensuring equity and justice for all Marylanders. He is the kind of leader that we need in Annapolis.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466394/324472468/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)
Tom had the opportunity to participate in the Maryland Democratic Party’s second gubernatorial candidate’s forum. He shared with Marylanders his visions to fully fund and implement the Blueprint for Maryland’s Future so every student has access to a world-class education and can realize their full potential. You can watch a replay of the forum **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466395/324472472/1787779898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466396/324472476/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)
Delegate Dana Stein is a passionate leader who delivers results for Baltimore and for Marylanders from every corner of our state. Tom joined him at his final fundraiser on Thursday morning where he shared just why we need leaders like Delegate Stein to be reelected. Delegate Stein is a champion for the environment, working to protect the Chesapeake Bay and ensuring that we’re moving toward a green energy and green transportation future. We are so grateful to have him on #TeamTom.
* * *
**In the News**
**[10 Governor's races to watch in 2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466397/324472481/-72084617?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**
_“Democrats may have no better opportunity to pick up a governorship. Gov. Larry Hogan, a uniquely popular Republican in a deep blue state, is term-limited — and his lieutenant governor has passed on running to succeed him ... On the Democratic side, state Comptroller Peter Franchot and Tom Perez, the former national party chair, top a large field of well-known candidates.”_
**[A Baker’s Dozen Political Races to Watch in 2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466398/324472485/1153971642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**
_“As of today, we see three candidates in the top tier — Comptroller Peter V.R. Franchot, author and former foundation CEO Wes Moore, and former Democratic National Committee Chair Tom Perez."_
**[Democratic Gubernatorial Candidates Outline Education Policies at Forum](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466399/324472490/1426747555?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**
_“Perez said he would start by fully funding the Accountability and Implementation Board, a panel charged with overseeing the implementation of the Blueprint. The AIB began meeting in the fall but without a budget, making it hard for them to start work. Perez rebuked Gov. Lawrence J. Hogan Jr. (R) for not using his full authority to start funding the AIB.”_
**[Tom Perez: Governor Hogan should extend and expand hazard pay for essential workers](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466400/324472494/-159890934?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FBy-52fwULELUpTJunlRBml3gFQm4NGMrBEE6jkWp-0=&emci=b08a7e61-0970-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=b2cac4bf-1170-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**
_“But just as we’ve entered another very challenging phase of this crisis, state employees are about to lose a critical support that has helped them weather this storm. Hazard pay for our front-line state workers will expire on December 31st, and Governor Hogan should take immediate action to extend this benefit for at least three months as the omicron spike takes its toll on the people of Maryland.”_

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. = Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, January 7th, 2021 Peter, We would not be where we are without supporters like you. The first major deadline of the campaign is coming up fast! The Maryland Annual Campaign Finance Deadline is this Wednesday, January 12th. We need your help to grow our momentum as we approach this critical deadline. Next week we will see, for the first time, how our campaign stacks up against the others in terms of resources. Polling has made clear we have a viable pathway to victory in the Democratic primary and general election, provided we have the resources necessary to execute our winning strategy. You can donate online at or join us on Monday, January 10 for our. Thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to keeping in touch. Happy New Year! Jessica Semachko Campaign Manager Tom Perez for Maryland On the Campaign Trail This week marked the one year anniversary of the brutal attack on the United States Capitol. Violent insurrectionists, incited by the former President of the United States, fought to overturn the will of the People. As we reflect on the events from one year ago, we must realize that this moment requires each and every one of us to organize, mobilize and, most importantly, vote to preserve our democracy for generations to come. Tom released a statement on the anniversary of the insurrection, which you can read . On Monday, Tom was honored to speak on behalf of Delegate Vaughn Stewart at his final fundraiser before the 2022 Maryland Legislative Session. Delegate Stewart is a thought leader whose passion is ensuring equity and justice for all Marylanders. He is the kind of leader that we need in Annapolis. Tom had the opportunity to participate in the Maryland Democratic Party’s second gubernatorial candidate’s forum. He shared with Marylanders his visions to fully fund and implement the Blueprint for Maryland’s Future so every student has access to a world-class education and can realize their full potential. You can watch a replay of the forum . Delegate Dana Stein is a passionate leader who delivers results for Baltimore and for Marylanders from every corner of our state. Tom joined him at his final fundraiser on Thursday morning where he shared just why we need leaders like Delegate Stein to be reelected. Delegate Stein is a champion for the environment, working to protect the Chesapeake Bay and ensuring that we’re moving toward a green energy and green transportation future. We are so grateful to have him on #TeamTom. In the News “Democrats may have no better opportunity to pick up a governorship. Gov. Larry Hogan, a uniquely popular Republican in a deep blue state, is term-limited — and his lieutenant governor has passed on running to succeed him ... On the Democratic side, state Comptroller Peter Franchot and Tom Perez, the former national party chair, top a large field of well-known candidates.” “As of today, we see three candidates in the top tier — Comptroller Peter V.R. Franchot, author and former foundation CEO Wes Moore, and former Democratic National Committee Chair Tom Perez." “Perez said he would start by fully funding the Accountability and Implementation Board, a panel charged with overseeing the implementation of the Blueprint. The AIB began meeting in the fall but without a budget, making it hard for them to start work. Perez rebuked Gov. Lawrence J. Hogan Jr. (R) for not using his full authority to start funding the AIB.” “But just as we’ve entered another very challenging phase of this crisis, state employees are about to lose a critical support that has helped them weather this storm. Hazard pay for our front-line state workers will expire on December 31st, and Governor Hogan should take immediate action to extend this benefit for at least three months as the omicron spike takes its toll on the people of Maryland.” ICYMI Our webstore is now live! Visit to let everyone know you're on . We don’t know what happened, Peter.
After Letitia and Gabby called on our grassroots supporters to fill our 2022 Election Year Fund, donations came flooding in. Our spirits were high; hundreds of fearless fighters rose to the occasion and committed themselves to standing with our team in 2022.
**And then donations began to plummet.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466458/324472586/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk275-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGNhYzRiZi0xMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Pjw388GbliZiCe4A_tU3Yqw6U56Y41VC0lYDI5YAi0=)
With contributions slowing down to a trickle, we need fearless fighters like you to step up, or we risk falling short of Letitia's _first_ **major goal of 2022. ****Peter, if**** you believe in the same things that Letitia has fought tirelessly for, we need your immediate support. **

name: Wes Farno
subject: Breaking down the #OHSen polls… straight from the source.
body:
Check out our Friday newsletter
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BF7_6eXSNujcazzAZf6zOQXQ9X4FNGCvZ3KoKMRYjwipmsoXW9jYOqkaMZJ9kVia7KpPN7Io00p_zsNZ-UvMce6AUHJdlNMPc2VaacpOy5SemfpV2GhXFsKNlCEwO3W_MAO_jttC0-zFT3o3w6Mzj6SJf0j0ouabBDDEdowWKlFbx72ICquN1A==&c=hVoXB2jvDXGqC-ri_yZTXqKRLh-o2OYkduB6cxai_U1OW-zMgvJsFQ==&ch=V9Od5eIAkbF3ybnJhFpFjItN8jtOUpDIoGvgL4KDQHVom05l24pnQg==)
---
| Peter,
Happy Friday from Team Gibbons!
As we wrap up the week, we wanted to address the latest poll you may have seen from one of our competitors. We typically do not highlight other campaigns' polls, as they are biased and often spread misinformation about opponents, but this one is a bit of a different bird. The poll campaign shows Mike Gibbons in a three-way statistical TIE for FIRST!
The data comes from yet another internal poll promoting Jane Timken's "momentum," but the fact is her support has actually fallen since last May- and last month for that matter.
The term "momentum" is deceptive in the case of Jane, however, as Mike Gibbons is the only candidate in the Ohio Senate Race that has gained support consistently since May- Now that's momentum!
---
| Latest Poll Figures -
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BF7_6eXSNujcazzAZf6zOQXQ9X4FNGCvZ3KoKMRYjwipmsoXW9jYOsC_pjbsueKyvwOxGllQtzaRhtNXku7TvUs5eov6SdPWqAmBs1qEa026i5cI06En-7o3jiRDQkcNSD35Rrye4dzoPfY5XwqtKLDMBgPDqz5LNJUnl8Wf2Ts=&c=hVoXB2jvDXGqC-ri_yZTXqKRLh-o2OYkduB6cxai_U1OW-zMgvJsFQ==&ch=V9Od5eIAkbF3ybnJhFpFjItN8jtOUpDIoGvgL4KDQHVom05l24pnQg==)
---
| *** 2021 -
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BF7_6eXSNujcazzAZf6zOQXQ9X4FNGCvZ3KoKMRYjwipmsoXW9jYOsC_pjbsueKyRX46RrKelNfBE6W8JHKYU6XNB9__NB3HlkaSsmMdfJl_ybEnBs5pMInHUN7J2U9Y43rRyJUj1FLSdWh4NV1UGakJgXsYqJn7ezeIqcj8RL4r2qTXnfxYBLMpiwKZnaNl9FdzYdnJJKflTJKTPa5PFMCxcFNfJOEDIENPJ4qCSGyhGQN-8KT-CxHW5YOekxzZDS8Vt2FXrwA=&c=hVoXB2jvDXGqC-ri_yZTXqKRLh-o2OYkduB6cxai_U1OW-zMgvJsFQ==&ch=V9Od5eIAkbF3ybnJhFpFjItN8jtOUpDIoGvgL4KDQHVom05l24pnQg==)
---
| ***
---
| Net Change -
---
|
---
| *** As you can see above, the numbers between May and today show Mike Gibbons continues on a steady upward path, while other top contenders slip, slide and bounce around.
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Voters want an authentic conservative candidate as their next U.S. Senator and not only are we seeing it in our opponents' polls, we are seeing it on the ground. We launched our bus tour this week, traveling the backroads of Ohio. At every stop, someone came up to the bus to express their support for Mike. A college baseball player from Parma, a farmer at a rural truck stop in Darke County, a grandmother, worried about her grandkids, at a convenience store in Putnam County, all across Ohio voters are showing their support for Mike! It's reflected in the polls and it is reflected on the ground because Ohioans are tired of career politicians, party insiders, and RINOs running for office!
---
| | |
---
|
---
| We're on the road to victory and are looking forward to meeting more people as we continue our statewide bus tour. See you on the ground.
Sincerely,
Wes Farno Senior Strategist Gibbons for Ohio
---
| | |
---

subject: I’m so proud of this bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lq6VxAySN2npcghxYbLNRFkxZKTe9IMrP6RoCvw4FQk=/AyPze80mha5Zawmi44qHJ5YLv6bpQn8Ea2dkRyFTv5o=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220107-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Throughout my career - from federal law enforcement to the CIA to the House - national security has been a throughline uniting each role I've held. In an increasingly digital age, **our ability to track, understand, and measure cybercrime is of paramount importance.**

That's why I'm working so hard to take meaningful action to fight cybercrime. Recent reporting shows incidents of cybercrime are rising at an alarming rate, spurred on by scams related to the pandemic, and our current system is far from effective in combating this pattern.

[_**I 've devoted my time in Congress to delivering impactful results for Virginia and beyond, and I need your support to continue that mission. Will you support our campaign by making a contribution?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/lq6VxAySN2npcghxYbLNRFkxZKTe9IMrP6RoCvw4FQk=/AyPze80mha5Zawmi44qHJ5YLv6bpQn8Ea2dkRyFTv5o=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220107-1-EM&amount=25)

---
A Gallup poll found in 2018 that 1 in 4 American households were the victim of cybercrime - making it **the most common crime in the U.S.** With a more effective system to track, analyze, and prosecute cybercrime, our government could prevent cyberattacks that have and will continue to take a toll on our country.

[_**I 'm proud to be spearheading efforts to improve how our government combats cybercrime, and your support ensures I can continue my work in Congress. Will you contribute what you can today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/lq6VxAySN2npcghxYbLNRFkxZKTe9IMrP6RoCvw4FQk=/AyPze80mha5Zawmi44qHJ5YLv6bpQn8Ea2dkRyFTv5o=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220107-1-EM&amount=25)

Abigail

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466722/324473679/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGQ3MWQ5MC0xNDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cI_G6Lfs9H0iEuPLMRGDr32sHTso1oCbOqPvVSL93zU=&emci=b1c7f706-f46f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=d4d71d90-1470-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=8780864) Hi there, I want to share some exciting news with you... **_I'm running for California State Assembly!_** I believe California must take bold action to combat climate change. We must reform our broken criminal justice system. Together, we can tackle homelessness and provide affordable housing. I've fought for these values all my life – first as a community organizer and then on the San Diego City Council. Now, it's time to take that fight to Sacramento. [**Will you become a founding donor to my campaign to build a fairer, greener, more inclusive California by chipping in just $3 right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466723/324473680/-169587575?refcode=X_010721_Announcement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGQ3MWQ5MC0xNDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cI_G6Lfs9H0iEuPLMRGDr32sHTso1oCbOqPvVSL93zU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466724/324473681/-169587575?refcode=X_010721_Announcement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGQ3MWQ5MC0xNDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cI_G6Lfs9H0iEuPLMRGDr32sHTso1oCbOqPvVSL93zU=) I was blessed to grow up in San Diego’s Barrio Logan with working-class immigrant parents whose daily sacrifices inspired my lifelong commitment to justice. Even from a young age, the differences between my community and more affluent ones were painfully obvious to me. **I've been working for a more just and equitable California ever since.** That passion inspired me to work as an advocate for survivors of domestic and sexual abuse after college. Then, I became a community organizer, working to hold corporations responsible for toxic pollution in our communities. In 2016, I became the first queer Latina on the San Diego City Council, and just two years later, I was elected as Council President and Chair of San Diego public transportation. While on the City Council I proved my leadership by authoring San Diego's new Inclusionary Housing Law to jumpstart affordable housing construction, passing legislation to protect immigrants and refugees in our city, expanding our public transportation system, and leading the implementation of San Diego's Climate Action Plan. I'm ready to fight for all these initiatives and more in the California State Assembly. **[My campaign just launched, so whatever you give now will help us spread the word about our campaign for a more just and equitable California>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466725/324473682/-169587575?refcode=X_010721_Announcement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGQ3MWQ5MC0xNDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cI_G6Lfs9H0iEuPLMRGDr32sHTso1oCbOqPvVSL93zU=)** In solidarity, _Georgette_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40466726/324473683/-169587575?refcode=X_010721_Announcement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGQ3MWQ5MC0xNDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cI_G6Lfs9H0iEuPLMRGDr32sHTso1oCbOqPvVSL93zU=) Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Assembly 2022, #1443281 Georgette Gómez

# Learning is best done in the classroom
---
Yet, as hysteria spreads over the latest version of COVID-19, schools are shutting down once again leaving parents in limbo, and children confused. Nationally, more than 4,500 schools will be closed at least one day this week due to the pandemic according to the Wall Street Journal. You've seen the headlines in Colorado as well.
This fear is impacting our children in ways we may not fully understand or realize for years.
In-person learning has proven to be the best method of education. It not only supports academics, but it provides for social and emotional development, encourages greater mental health, and keeps our kids on track with where they should be developmentally. Remote learning is no substitute. In fact, we are now seeing declining performance among students this year due to the lockdowns in 2020.
That's why I support a parent's right to choose how their children will be educated, including home schooling. My family personally moved to home schooling during the pandemic, and it has proven effective in protecting my children from being indoctrinated by harmful teaching such as Critical Race Theory and unnecessary sexualization.
However, not everyone can take advantage of home schooling, so I strongly support school choice, as championed by Steve Schuck, a co-founder of Parents Challenge. This nonprofit organization is dedicated to giving children the opportunity to escape failing schools by empowering school choice. I am very fortunate to have Steve as a strong supporter of my campaign.
It is also worth considering former Colorado Gov. Bill Owens' work on initiatives to make our schools more competitive by holding them accountable for their performance, and creating grants for tutoring to close opportunity gaps. Perhaps, we should tie federal funding to in-person learning and student performance. Owens too was a strong supporter of school choice.
We must stand up for our children and demand that they be soundly educated in ways grounded in truth, sound philosophy and educational psychology. Simply "waiting out" a virus is wasting precious time when it comes to our youth, and the impacts may be severe and long-lasting. I will stand for our children and their future each and every day I serve in Washington. At the end of the day, my primary reason for running for office is to protect my own childrens' future. Please support me in getting there. Our future, our children, are at risk and we need to stop this madness now.

But headlines and endorsements alone won't win this race. Your voice will – which is why we need your feedback right now. name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Our birthday gift for Rand Paul
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Did you know that today is Rand Paul’s birthday,
Peter? Let’s celebrate by giving
him an early retirement.

Here at Team Booker, we believe birthdays are a reason to celebrate and a
time to think about the kind of future we want to see as we embark on
another trip around the sun.

A future where our politicians prioritize people over profits, care about
how many of us are struggling to make ends, and understand the challenges
so many working families face today.

This future is possible if we put in the hard work this year to replace
Rand Paul and end this chapter of disastrous leadership in Kentucky. So,
in honor of Rand Paul’s 59th birthday we’ve set a goal to raise $5,900 by
midnight tonight to power our grassroots campaign and make sure we send
Charles to the U.S. Senate this year.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14472?refcode=em20220107-1425&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1425%2E346206%2EUyDOMM ]Rand Paul may be spending his birthday today as a Senator of Kentucky,
but let’s make sure that today is his last in office. You can help us out
right now by making a donation of $5.90 or more. Will you chip in?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14472?refcode=em20220107-1425&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1425%2E346206%2EUyDOMM ]Contribute $5.90

Here’s the bottom line,
Peter: Kentucky can’t afford
another six years of Rand Paul.

That’s six more years of spreading conspiracy theories and lies that
undermine our democracy. Six more years of holding up legislation like the
9/11 Victims Compensation Fund and the Emmett Till Anti-Lynching Act. Six
more years of using his elected office to trade stocks using insider
knowledge.

Now that he’s officially announced that he’s running for yet another term
— things are getting more and more serious. The 11 years Rand Paul has
spent ignoring Kentuckians and our needs could just as easily turn into 18
years if we don’t organize, starting right now.

And the reason we have to start now is because Kentucky has one of the
worst records of voter disenfranchisement in our country’s history.
Because of this, failed leaders like Rand have been able to stay in
office. We need to counter this with a mountain of organizing and
grassroots fundraising — because Kentucky deserves so much better than
Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14472?refcode=em20220107-1425&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1425%2E346206%2EUyDOMM ]So Peter,
can you join us in chipping in $5.90 (or more!) to our campaign to elect
Charles Booker today? We’ve set a goal to raise $5,900 by the end of
today, and any amount you can chip in helps us transform Kentucky’s
future.

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220107-1425-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1425_346206_UyDOMM&akid=1425%2E346206%2EUyDOMM

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1425%2E346206%2EUyDOMM

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Lira
subject: An important reminder
body:
Peter, this week, Ted Cruz made a comment that really stuck with us.
On his podcast, Cruz predicted Republicans would impeach the president and more if they gain control of the House “whether it’s justified or not.”
Republicans are on a warpath after Democrats took necessary measures to try and impeach Donald Trump — and that starts with this year’s elections. And they will be after more than just an impeachment but all the progress we have made and are planning to make.
**This race is one of the most critical that will decide who has the majority for the House — and therefore will determine the path this country goes down.**
And what we need now more than ever is strong, determined leaders like John Lira who are ready to fight tooth and nail for the people, especially during this difficult period.
We can’t take what Ted Cruz said lightly — because it’s a reminder that what happens right here in Texas will affect the next 4 years for the rest of the country.

name: Val Demings
subject: Supporter record for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Friend, I'm 2 points behind Marco Rubio in the polls, and experts say this race will come down to who has the resources to compete.

That's why this is so concerning: Florida can decide Senate control, and I'm currently short of my midnight fundraising goal. So my team sent me your updated supporter record:

Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Suggested contribution: $5
Today's donation: PENDING
DONATE:
https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2100-fr-text

Donations from your area: 68% to goal
Deadline: 11:59 p.m.

This race is about more than just my unlikely story of opportunity: It's about a meaningful movement for Floridians and the country. It's about defending the Senate. Mitch McConnell only needs one seat to flip a 50/50 Senate – and we can't let Florida be the seat securing him Senate control.

We can win this – CNN is calling this seat a top pickup opportunity – but we have a steep hill to climb. The GOP is pouring more than $10 MILLION into organizing in Florida to register a groundbreaking number of Republican voters .

Republicans are working in overdrive to make sure no Democrat can flip Florida ever again, friend. This is our moment: It has never been more important to build the infrastructure to fight back, and we need to make early investments. We can't do that if we miss this goal.
I know this people-powered movement is strong enough to defeat Marco Rubio and the GOP, but we need to raise another $50,000 RIGHT NOW to register more Democratic voters and flip Florida blue . Please, friend, I'm counting on you to help me reach this goal:

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2100-fr-text

Friend, rush $5 right now to help me close our fundraising gap before midnight tonight, pull ahead of Marco Rubio in the polls and defend our Democratic Senate majority.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2100-fr-text

I can't thank you enough for your support,
Val Demings

2021 had its share of ups and downs, but we gave it a proper sendoff and are now fully focused on 2022.

We know there’s been a lot of bad news lately: Washington Republicans are desperate to make this their year. All last year, they worked to rig congressional maps in their favor **_in an attempt to steal the House majority._**

But, they don’t get to decide how this year will go: **the American people do.** We will not cede one inch to them or their allies in Columbus. We are determined to make 2022 the year we hold on to our progress and continue to deliver for our seniors, veterans, and families. **Fortune favors those who fight.**

**[Team, I am ready to fight to make this year our year. We can’t let the extreme right-wing Trump coalition take control of Congress. So will you join me in this fight by contributing $22 to keep me in Congress and Democrats in charge?

clean_body: There have been a lot of predictions about 2022, and now that it’s here, we’re determined to fight for it. | \- Marcy Kaptur | | | | 2021 had its share of ups and downs, but we gave it a proper sendoff and are now fully focused on 2022. We know there’s been a lot of bad news lately: Washington Republicans are desperate to make this their year. All last year, they worked to rig congressional maps in their favor in an attempt to steal the House majority. But, they don’t get to decide how this year will go: the American people do. We will not cede one inch to them or their allies in Columbus. We are determined to make 2022 the year we hold on to our progress and continue to deliver for our seniors, veterans, and families. Fortune favors those who fight. | Thank you for all that you do, \-- Marcy Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Hold them accountable.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It’s been one year since one of the darkest days for our democracy, when a
violent mob of white nationalists attacked the U.S. Capitol on January
6th. They wanted to overturn the presidential election results for Donald
Trump. Republicans across the country continue to spread the lie that the
election was stolen from Trump.

We must hold these insurrectionists accountable, along with the government
officials who incited and encouraged them.

Accountability starts with investigating and expelling the Republican
members of Congress who incited the January 6, 2021 insurrection through
their attempts to overturn the election.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88729?t=1002&akid=21372%2E1203867%2EU6aIF6 ]If you agree, will you add your name to become a citizen co-signer of
Cori Bush’s bill to hold the members of Congress who were complicit in the
insurrection accountable?

Add your name

At Justice Democrats, we're fighting for voting rights, racial justice,
economic equality, and against the white supremacist system that has
failed to hold members of Congress accountable for their role in the
January 6th insurrection.

When you become a citizen co-signer, you are sending a message that we
demand accountability for the members of Congress that fought the will of
the people by attempting to overturn the election results. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88729?t=1003&akid=21372%2E1203867%2EU6aIF6 ]Will you
take a moment to add your name?

Add your name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=21372%2E1203867%2EU6aIF6 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=21372%2E1203867%2EU6aIF6 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220107-21372-footer&t=1006&refcode2=21372_1203867_U6aIF6&akid=21372%2E1203867%2EU6aIF6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=21372%2E1203867%2EU6aIF6

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: Here are Two Items of Business for You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Friend,There are two things coming up that I want to remind you of: 1) The next Virtual Townhall is coming this next Tuesday (Jan 11). I will be exposing some very cynical things that are taking place in Idaho that need a lot of light shined on them, "Sunlight is the best disinfectant", right? To be part of the Virtual Townhall you need to be registered and we will send you a link about an hour before the Virtual Townhall so you can get in. It is live and you will be able to ask questions and comment on the chat feed. To register go to this link: <https://www.votebundy.com/campaign-events/virtual-townhall/>. You will not want to miss this one! 2) It is time to purchase Collin Raye tickets! The early bird ticket price will be available until January 20th. This is going to be such a fun event! We hope to have around 1800 people attend and Collin Raye has promised to give us a great show. The atmosphere will be amazing, with friends and family that love liberty and good music, this concert will be a time to remember for the rest of our lives. It is not every day that an artist like Collin Raye comes to Idaho. SO GET YOUR TICKETS SOON! If you live up North then plan to come down. If you live out of state then travel in. This will be an event that will not disappoint!If you are a business owner or just want to be a sponsor for the Collin Ray concert we have $5000, $2500 and $1000 sponsorship packages that will get your name out to people all over Idaho and the surrounding states, including approximately 105,000 people on our email contact list. It is worth the value on its face, without calculating the good it will do in Keeping Idaho IDAHO. So purchase your tickets now by clicking on this link: <https://team.votebundy.com/tickets/>Well there it is, two items of business, the [Virtual Townhall registration](https://www.votebundy.com/campaign-events/virtual-townhall/) and [Collin Raye tickets](https://www.votebundy.com/events/collin-raye/). See you Tuesday! Ammon Bundy
* * *
EVENT SPONSORS:
* * *

* * *

If you did not authorize use of this email address, or no longer wish to receive such messages, please simply [unsubscribe](https://team.votebundy.com/unsubscribe?id=8d545fe0-6532-4b1e-8220-7189428a1194) to immediately have your address removed from our mailing list.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: An Important Announcement
body:
I am still fighting for a Better America! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d90a3ad9b1c9/major-campaign-announcement-8717373?e=5167ed8367)
---
|
---
|
---
_Peter,__A Better America_ has always been the battle cry of my campaign—that our nation would renew our spirit of civility, stand by our convictions, and dedicate ourselves to the common good. When I announced my campaign in October, I looked at the candidates running in my district and I couldn’t find a conservative voice committed to principle, who defended parents’ rights, traditional values, and New Jersey’s independence from Washington. I ran this campaign from day one committed to be that conservative, principled option for New Jerseyans that we were rarely seeing on the ballot.Americans are growing tired of divisive rhetoric and radical politics. We’re concerned that the fabric that is holding us together is beginning to tear, that a day will come where we don’t see each other as both Americans and neighbors, but as untrustworthy political opponents with no shared culture. I believe that the far Left has done all they can to sow division in order to build a radically committed Leftist base. They are, among others, responsible for fanning the flames of division and sparking the anti-American radicalism which is destabilizing our national identity.I announced my campaign in October because I didn’t believe incumbent Democrat Rep. Andy Kim of New Jersey’s 3rd district was the right representative for us. I saw that Rep. Kim was not committed to upholding our districts’ values of freedom, liberty, and limited government.In December, however, New Jersey’s Congressional Redistricting Commission released new maps which moved my community from New Jersey’s 3rd Congressional District into District 4 with incumbent Rep. Chris Smith. To run against Rep. Smith would not be in line with my vision for _A Better America_. That is why I am suspending my campaign for U.S. Congress and endorsing Rep. Smith.
| | | | | |
---
|
---
Congressman Chris Smith embodies the core values of _A Better America_ – civility, conviction, and the common good. I cannot in good conscience campaign for a better America knowing I would be challenging a congressman who practices those ideals in the halls of Congress each day. My congressional run was never about Shawn Hyland, it was always about _A Better America_. Smith is like minded and shares the same heartbeat on social issues. Rep. Smith is a long-standing and tireless advocate for life, religious rights, international human rights, and the spirit of civility. Rep. Smith embodies _A Better America_. He is the right candidate for District 4 and represents what America needs more of in Congress.In the meantime, I am still fighting for _A Better America_. I ran to be a relentless voice for a better America - one with stronger families, safer neighborhoods, better schools, and more economic growth. I am taking to the campaign trail for Congressman Smith and rallying people around our vision for _A Better America_.__ I want to thank all of my supporters who believed in me and what we would do together in 2022 and beyond. I hope my supporters will come out and give Congressman Smith the same support they have already shown me.Thank you,Shawn Hyland
|
---

subject: ICYMI: Bill McSwain Excels in First GOP Gubernatorial Debate
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/icymi-bill-mcswain-excels-in-first-gop-gubernatorial-debate?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**January 7, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# ICYMI: Highlights from the First GOP Gubernatorial Debate
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- ** Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Wednesday participated in the first GOP Gubernatorial Debate at Dickinson College. McSwain highlighted his history as a U.S. Marine, former U.S. Attorney appointed by President Trump, and conservative outsider as the keys to his success as Governor.

McSwain contrasted himself to Governor Tom Wolf and Josh Shapiro, accusing Wolf of dereliction of duty due to his lack of leadership, and emphasized his commitment to being a Governor who will show up and stand up for Pennsylvanians:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=313ed86c9a&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| Throughout the ninety-minute debate, McSwain distinguished himself as a determined, conservative leader whose history of public service has prepared him to take on the Harrisburg swamp. McSwain shared his plans to restore PA’s economy, promote public safety and security, and harness the Commonwealth’s energy and infrastructure, as well as his approach to governing in the face of COVID-19:
---
|
---
| McSwain also emphasized that his status as a political outsider uniquely positions him to help Pennsylvania recover from the poor policies enacted by decades of career politicians. McSwain promised that as Governor, he would be a responsible steward of the people's money by shrinking government, limiting taxes, and fighting government overreach:
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| McSwain went on to describe Pennsylvania as the birthplace of liberty, and promised that liberty will not die on his watch - A McSwain administration, he explained, will get the government off your back so that Pennsylvania can have a brighter future, where streets are safe, children are educated, and the economy is booming:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=0e44522a46&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---

| **BACKGROUND: **

Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=b03a9f0c9c&e=b1ec95759b)

clean_body: | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 7, 2022 CONTACT: Rachel Tripp 202.738.9089 | | ICYMI: Highlights from the First GOP Gubernatorial Debate West Chester, Pa. \-- Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Wednesday participated in the first GOP Gubernatorial Debate at Dickinson College. McSwain highlighted his history as a U.S. Marine, former U.S. Attorney appointed by President Trump, and conservative outsider as the keys to his success as Governor. McSwain contrasted himself to Governor Tom Wolf and Josh Shapiro, accusing Wolf of dereliction of duty due to his lack of leadership, and emphasized his commitment to being a Governor who will show up and stand up for Pennsylvanians: | | | Throughout the ninety-minute debate, McSwain distinguished himself as a determined, conservative leader whose history of public service has prepared him to take on the Harrisburg swamp. McSwain shared his plans to restore PA’s economy, promote public safety and security, and harness the Commonwealth’s energy and infrastructure, as well as his approach to governing in the face of COVID-19: | | McSwain also emphasized that his status as a political outsider uniquely positions him to help Pennsylvania recover from the poor policies enacted by decades of career politicians. McSwain promised that as Governor, he would be a responsible steward of the people's money by shrinking government, limiting taxes, and fighting government overreach: | | | | McSwain went on to describe Pennsylvania as the birthplace of liberty, and promised that liberty will not die on his watch - A McSwain administration, he explained, will get the government off your back so that Pennsylvania can have a brighter future, where streets are safe, children are educated, and the economy is booming: | | | A full compilation of McSwain's answers is . | | BACKGROUND: Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Liz Cheney**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfiyBr4xDmakS6HSfRvBifeixD8VG15KWF44sTbjnEUytNwYhG00oH2PRqExGwxaAU0hiZJWTi5lf1a2kf1rQicB6lhi2HkSkFM7g64RTF9rxDzbvk3zUr-2BEM59C8z90DK-2FkxZ3Rk3Opq2tUlnkgFvltnTyv753rBA0bHOVli6knzqFyvzHGouYYo1-2B2DgSSAxg-3D-3DBpad_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6eQ52wAM-2F1sd6TFZE34z27VqPa2ILmFQTuFP-2BXFE4pFPGZYXHp4XWI6J4kwt8EPl5WY9RPZpkyXAl9iQ9kxU-2FX7-2B-2Fb39niAvMkZOL0Ppq1my-2BB2OQDMkaRnByLBGwBEBMWk6iCAaPUvgCi3RRP7nTxpjWmyOHgik3YlYyFpBt4CuxmqpLUdIngRzip56SC8MD8hdlesVYscIIy-2B37iOWtlzNKpBOQaXqwzCU0aubWOWAWdBgNmizgy9gyPOAKLZNKmRXZVTJXFCCCKti-2BSIVsgBh9EPPlf-2F1SiBCOAQlPylDpa-2BJ-2FwByDfhSsNZmBfCYdrc8Zg-2FX2zbwMb1REGnPI2nwnfY2urMb5uPhSqp3cBhtX8bj55-2B6A8TiUO52PAmwxf5pkfS66mjfuc1eKHTIhpgNrgYRV5TxHr4bqDYIjQA-2BGAvCUXuM4DJLI6BVErlp0JCnE7Itbribf36PV4TT8kMVLP2UzoQayF6POdHJtKGAsPhRv-2FdYg3nYYZ0f5GIf3qbjroAOjKpu5TnNNwoqEv4rTQQyMr6Jl8YpxCptbT-2FPkn8w39aEO7zEupXzG3CgqflswFeckdDihnhTsEB-2BprvjgI7QElF6WEyIXftjJUWn2sz6ipLbcDr7IBI0M-2BJMHxiGSkYjVgHxk8-2Bnc4vemA2uh-2B6u9PEVmtzB9bNPGu6FbZvJFEj7KlSDDS28P4ro6MwMSwS1JobhcwrLj9TF-2BL7FAV8k4o0rvMMop1gWZNUAzjysnwYBj3cCWVO37ejQ48rQ9eTUb8ICxjEsG9xJO9yERNS3FUc1t4PClOC3lOPHUXQzabCUg3PQgccXjRBcL) this week for her work as Speaker Pelosi’s hand-picked “Republican” on her sham January 6th Committee. at the same time Democrats are using that panel to push for the radical federal takeover of Wyoming’s elections. Cheney has remained singularly focused on her position on the committee as she escalates her personal war with former President Donald Trump.

Harriet Hageman, Republican candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives, today issued the following statement:

“Good for Liz Cheney that Kamala Harris is happy with her work in Congress, because Wyoming sure isn’t. Cheney is trying to get another bite at the apple in her vendetta against President Trump after her vote to impeach him failed to remove him from office. And she is helping Democrats with their push for a radical federal takeover of Wyoming’s elections.

“Everyone knows that the January 6th Committee is the only thing that Cheney is focused on, but she never mentions that to constituents in Wyoming. It’s because she knows that’s not what we want, but she’s determined to continue being Nancy Pelosi’s pawn anyway. Getting praise from leftists who want complete control over our electoral process may make her popular in Northern Virginia, where’s she’s from, but for those of us who actually live and make our livelihoods in Wyoming, it just confirms how wildly out of step she is with what the voters want.

“Wyoming only gets one member of the House, and we have to make it count. Right now, we don’t actually have representation because Cheney’s priorities are not ours. When I’m the congresswoman from Wyoming, I will always represent Wyoming’s interests.”

name: Dr. Kelli Ward
subject: Today: SCOTUS Hears Challenge to Biden's Mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD
body:
The United States Supreme Court will hear oral arguments on Friday in a case challenging the Biden administration’s federal COVID-19 vaccine or test mandate for employers with more than 100 employees. In 2021, The Daily Wire was the first major business to file suit against that mandate, followed by several other petitioners, challenging the Biden administration’s use of Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) to carry out the order, arguing that it was a violation of the constitution and that the mandate is not necessary to protect workers. The case has since been consolidated.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: fwd: You have been selected to join our official first 2022 Strategy Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hey Derek,
Our team started combing through our initial 2022 Strategy Survey results and didn’t see your name. **[Would you mind taking a few minutes right now to complete our survey?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220107-4117&t=1&akid=4117%2E434096%2EJIQq1b)**
It’s really important to John and our whole team to hear from the grassroots supporters who are supporting and growing our campaign every day. And with it officially being Election Year, there’s no better time than the present to share your thoughts, ideas, and priorities with this campaign.
**[So, Derek, can you fill out our 2022 Strategy Survey right now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220107-4117&t=2&akid=4117%2E434096%2EJIQq1b)**_It may only take you a few minutes, but it makes a world of difference for our campaign._
Thank you for your time and support,
Bobby
Bobby Maggio
Campaign Manager, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: JohnFetterman.com
Date: Tue, Jan 4, 2022
Subject: You have been selected to join our official first 2022 Strategy Survey
To: Derek [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Derek, it’s officially Election Year, believe it or not, and the very first thing we’re going to do as a campaign is **check in directly with supporters like you.**
John Fetterman really wants to hear the opinions of real people on our campaign strategy to win PA in November, which is why we’ve picked YOU to represent Cresco in our first official 2022 Strategy Survey.
[**Will you take a minute to answer a few questions about our campaign strategy as part of John Fetterman’s 2022 Strategy Survey?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220107-4117&t=3&akid=4117%2E434096%2EJIQq1b)
_[While Dr. Oz self-funds millions of dollars in TV ads, John Fetterman is running a true 67 County campaign strategy across the Commonwealth to reach every voter in every county — no matter how red or blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220107-4117&t=4&akid=4117%2E434096%2EJIQq1b)_
[Do you agree that organizing in every PA county is the best way to take on the Dr. Oz TV ad blitz?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220107-4117&t=5&akid=4117%2E434096%2EJIQq1b)
Select your answer: Yes No Unsure
**[Finish the survey →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220107-4117&t=6&akid=4117%2E434096%2EJIQq1b)**
Right now, as we set our budgets, staff up, and chart out every day of this campaign until polls close, is the *perfect* time to share your input with us, Derek.
The more qualitative feedback we get from genuine Team Fetterman supporters in our 2022 survey, the more insight we'll have from the ground about how we can best defeat the GOP and flip this seat.
**So, will you please take a few minutes (or less!!) of your time to participate in our official survey?**
**[Click here to enter John Fetterman’s 2022 Strategy Survey right now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220107-4117&t=7&akid=4117%2E434096%2EJIQq1b)**
**[Enter the survey →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-2022-strategy-survey/?source=em20220107-4117&t=8&akid=4117%2E434096%2EJIQq1b)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your response. It really means a lot.
Keep an eye out for survey results soon,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220107-4117-footer&t=9&refcode2=4117_434096_JIQq1b&akid=4117%2E434096%2EJIQq1b)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=10&akid=4117%2E434096%2EJIQq1b)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Major Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/rgl74_vOU-FAE82s4siFgw~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjuyucP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYdacpthhC29k31IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~)
---
| _"I disapprove of what you say, but I will defend to the death your right to say it." _-Voltaire Dear Patriot, I'm about to make a very dangerous move. Big Tech has abused their power and harmed the country -- so I'm leaving them behind and setting off down my own path. Just this week, I announced that I will no longer be posting content on YouTube. This comes after they repeatedly punished my channel for posting true statements about masks -- under the guise of fighting "misinformation." I will no longer be a servant to the whims of progressive billionaires. I'm setting off on my own. From now on, my video content will be posted on [Rumble](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/U6pNiMK51Wj45GX--KeHmQ~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjuyucP0RiaHR0cHM6Ly9ydW1ibGUuY29tL2MvUmFuZFBhdWxmb3JVU1NlbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYdacpthhC29k31IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) \-- a competitor to YouTube that respects free speech and expression. This is a dangerous move, however. You see, [Rumble](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/U6pNiMK51Wj45GX--KeHmQ~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjuyucP0RiaHR0cHM6Ly9ydW1ibGUuY29tL2MvUmFuZFBhdWxmb3JVU1NlbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYdacpthhC29k31IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) is much newer than YouTube and not nearly as big. It will require significant financial resources to spread my message far and wide on Rumble, the way I could on YouTube. I could not continue posting to YouTube in good conscience, after the harm that they have done to conservatives. Leaving was the moral decision. But in order to make this work, I need significant help from you. It is an election year for me, and communicating with my constituents is more important than ever. Furthermore, with the Omicron variant spreading, and Fauci whipping up fear, I need to communicate with the general public to tell them the truth about masks, vaccine passports, and lockdowns. Both of those things will be more difficult without being on YouTube. But if enough patriots like you step up, it can be done. And if you and I succeed in this endeavor, we will no longer have to live under the thumb of Big Tech billionaires. Free speech and free expression will be saved from those who seek to censor their political enemies. This move that I am making can have a profound impact on America -- but it will not be cheap. And that's why I need you to step up. [Will you chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately so that I can get my message out on Rumble?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/rgl74_vOU-FAE82s4siFgw~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjuyucP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYdacpthhC29k31IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) Free speech is a bedrock principle of Western society. George Orwell once said, "If liberty means anything at all, it means the right to tell people what they do not want to hear." And long before him, George Washington said, "If freedom of speech is taken away, then dumb and silent we may be led, like sheep to the slaughter." If only those wise men could see the pitiful situation that our great nation is in today. Big Tech oligarchies like Google and YouTube have no right to take away my voice -- or yours. Fortunately, in a free market society, you and I have a right to take our business elsewhere. And that is exactly what I am doing. But [Rumble](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/U6pNiMK51Wj45GX--KeHmQ~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjuyucP0RiaHR0cHM6Ly9ydW1ibGUuY29tL2MvUmFuZFBhdWxmb3JVU1NlbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYdacpthhC29k31IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) is a much smaller platform than YouTube, and it will be neither easy nor cheap to get my message out to the American people. [Will you help me accomplish that by chipping in $100, $50, $25, or $10 today?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/rgl74_vOU-FAE82s4siFgw~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjuyucP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYdacpthhC29k31IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) In Liberty, Rand Paul

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Need your signature on this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey — today we wanted to
talk to you about American history and our educational system. Erica is an
educator, so she knows just how important the learning environment is for
students.

When students receive the support they deserve and an honest, just
education, it allows them to reach their full potential and rise to
heights that otherwise wouldn’t be possible. We must uplift all students
everywhere with the truth of American history — boldly and honestly.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32993?t=1001&akid=751%2E3698%2EAroIt6 ]That’s why I’m proud to join Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, Ro Khanna, The
Sunrise Movement, and more folks to support the African American History
Act. Can you join us today by adding your name to our petition right now?

Add your name →

This act will invest $10 million over a 5 year period in the National
Museum of African American History and Culture (NMAAHC) to support African
American history education programs that are available to all.

The African American History Act is set to increase the national capacity
for African American history education while also funding and improving
upon a variety of the NMAAHC’s resources such as:

* Developing and maintaining accessible resources to promote an
understanding of African American history.
* Engaging with local and state leaders interested in incorporating
these resources in curricula.
* Engaging with the public through programming, resources, and social
media to increase awareness of African American history through a
social justice and anti-bias lens.
* Convening experts and creating and providing scholarly work.
* Translating new and existing NMAAHC work into multiple languages for
accessibility.

Education and literacy play key roles in ensuring all of us have access to
high quality and historically accurate information. And a multiracial
democracy ensures that the social, economic, and political rights of all
in the United States requires us to tell the full truth about our
country’s history.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32993?t=1002&akid=751%2E3698%2EAroIt6 ]The only way forward is if we acknowledge and learn about our past.
[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32993?t=1003&akid=751%2E3698%2EAroIt6 ]If you believe in building a truly equal multiracial democracy, please,
sign your name now so we can invest in and uplift African American
history.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32993?t=1004&akid=751%2E3698%2EAroIt6 ]Add your name →

In solidarity,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220107-751-footer&t=1005&refcode2=751_3698_AroIt6&akid=751%2E3698%2EAroIt6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=751%2E3698%2EAroIt6

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

Friends,

**With all this news about new variants, let’s be clear:**

**Under NO circumstances** will we allow our country to shut down again. Ohio will NOT shut down again.

**Under NO circumstances** will we let Fauci and the Left decimate our economy or ruin our children’s education.
**_Closed schools and remote learning are a MASSIVE injustice to our children._** | [**ACT HERE TO KEEP AMERICA OPEN**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=5658b41fa32a439cb62076ce29dccf10&_e=SVbINhImNobGjN_QM6FgmnSXQPWySp-9ETdWl5G7CjHIuRPqeFhNJq0XxNbRcl2fd29DOpNfc5AaoplwneZI8q0Q-V6edDl7kN5C1uCWF39UGZjE6CSGa1wLs6x2hBg5ujP7gxEsvi6F_Y6Kh60U_TcUnmUjPCMVr1650cLfy8qJAj4YBq2qpC7TYiRUp3pvK06wYTi0OM2qBIQJb24y2q76o2LkuSeVwptynY7rAPB8wC0YPtr29L7CrQlCyU_mGeSFmLiqZFGAKhXr65BzPLa9Rcg3f7wtZQBn9MLlkJYpjVtUXHYgewzDG56isF_8mDuCG6R3uPQQEdlqTWZBmscRbyb6RjVLKiLl0U9Kw8I1yMUzUfHN-X8AHuemPmZFtKRYed5yhOZsCxu9cNHX38c3n8wp8IhZSSVtAuLQsBZrGCb86-jjI69RpyG3q0-z9DV3MmGqs_gtHe9-oSAfipwqwfOie_1_S_g-ta9c0nzOAIn2X828eE-kov9t8WH1MhzDRMnpGVgKkRq_byjo6g%3D%3D)
---

**The aggressive government overreach coming from the Biden administration is unprecedented and dangerous.** The vaccine mandate is the most egregious case of this. We need to ensure every American is protected against this overreach.

**Republicans will keep America OPEN.** The only way we can stop this overreach is to make sure we flip the **Senate RED in 2022.** We need to bring back common sense and elect leaders who respect and protect your freedoms.
[**ACT HERE TO KEEP AMERICA OPEN**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=5658b41fa32a439cb62076ce29dccf10&_e=SVbINhImNobGjN_QM6FgmnSXQPWySp-9ETdWl5G7CjHIuRPqeFhNJq0XxNbRcl2fd29DOpNfc5AaoplwneZI8q0Q-V6edDl7kN5C1uCWF39UGZjE6CSGa1wLs6x2hBg5ujP7gxEsvi6F_Y6Kh60U_TcUnmUjPCMVr1650cLfy8qJAj4YBq2qpC7TYiRUp3pvK06wYTi0OM2qBIQJb24y2q76o2LkuSeVwptynY7rAPB8wC0YPtr29L7CrQlCyU_mGeSFmLiqZFGAKhXr65BzPLa9Rcg3f7wtZQBn9MLlkJYpjVtUXHYgewzDG56isF_8lzOyU4syXtxJcEeGPS-u8zFHuLddd4ucx3NfXqeoXjfknjgPHfCSpcuGITQOd7VtSM1KptYB6fwcXyKBaVb7Cf_6YShZemYmPo7PnB-sboo6-BnJ_O597Bt4j8_HbjK-kccRuOYEv46864yl_5ZOcpQ_H3SjCI-G-9arybBqdXCVli0Cyv8H0NQBfdJqYGo-KBXJeQz6mgHiXDyu3HDUsw%3D%3D)
---

We need your support today to Take Back the Senate. It’s our only hope to keep America open.
[**ACT HERE TO KEEP AMERICA OPEN**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=5658b41fa32a439cb62076ce29dccf10&_e=SVbINhImNobGjN_QM6FgmnSXQPWySp-9ETdWl5G7CjHIuRPqeFhNJq0XxNbRcl2fd29DOpNfc5AaoplwneZI8q0Q-V6edDl7kN5C1uCWF39UGZjE6CSGa1wLs6x2hBg5ujP7gxEsvi6F_Y6Kh60U_TcUnmUjPCMVr1650cLfy8qJAj4YBq2qpC7TYiRUp3pvK06wYTi0OM2qBIQJb24y2q76o2LkuSeVwptynY7rAPB8wC0YPtr29L7CrQlCyU_mGeSFmLiqZFGAKhXr65BzPLa9Rcg3f7wtZQBn9MLlkJYpjVtUXHYgewzDG56isF_8PifHlQusITI83vtHp16sfClU-qF4JFdnjimgeupEWZ_ufq8o3TeFejC1hQ8qf-vfKsT7R_H6vSqqdxSVUZ0gpTthTIgH317X2Yng3SOTIZquKF80fcBiTAP0bUjaYZllkIYKG7KYQ6FBdYKleBZu4FiIRbdYaOJmo2pIf8-14h7goMdm_ubEDqcs4iDVlCrqgy4PVoCHogg5nENGMtmvkg%3D%3D)

Under NO circumstances will we let Fauci and the Left decimate our economy or ruin our children’s education. Closed schools and remote learning are a MASSIVE injustice to our children. | The aggressive government overreach coming from the Biden administration is unprecedented and dangerous. The vaccine mandate is the most egregious case of this. We need to ensure every American is protected against this overreach. Republicans will keep America OPEN. The only way we can stop this overreach is to make sure we flip the Senate RED in 2022. We need to bring back common sense and elect leaders who respect and protect your freedoms. We need your support today to Take Back the Senate. It’s our only hope to keep America open. I’m counting on you. It’s going to take all of us. Jane Timken Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio Jane Timken for Ohio 9856 Archer Ln, Dublin, OH 43017 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

We’re expecting big news that could change everything next week. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefIrS8OKmK02vrwJPCYKKoJtpUAggCsAi2NBs4Sp4pWAucjdvMfPrcjhxXCEUFiw4dBsQSHc7hO99j4bRKAZEqpmRfpzj2H-mrKu_g8WuYP9qeM6pXHlYEc7q1OU_L7WqDzcePc5SknT2iym3U_5FLVqhqHlKsw0OjvL4fGsphqK0bxNWy86Rcn8FyfrKtk0JBEtkgLJO0akbuekwdcSgZ4c/3ii/2PwkysBSQhiATb8Rk8zwaw/h0/pFS-x-Iiqqa029DFl5DBjCkaY8rK0ymMt5nZi0x4D68) Peter, Next week, we’re expecting news from the Tennessee General Assembly about redistricting — and we have to be prepared for whatever happens. Every 10 years, the General Assembly redraws the maps that determine our state and federal legislative districts. The GOP has threatened to gerrymander our district, because they know it will weaken the voice of Black, brown, and working class people in Nashville. Redistricting is an issue of civil rights, and our team needs to be able to respond to any map that comes out. [**That’s why we’re coming to our strongest grassroots supporters to ask: Can you make a donation today so we’re able to fight back against whatever comes our way next week?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEi0PCCnUMtxOJzryfPzSI9DNP74gimYCKyEX6X9T_X0vP9nb8-sIi-p2PVIVCgQ9xqOd3_ywGS8SzexO3TCIVw-PBxmPUu6LHMM0VRQls5gkQShSPqnBaWWW6wf1CiuuJgfV-n2eL91N-86Ythjlqh4mG94cymzkFzIDMsd1O7AMpIL7Jzz1ml72xbz2QNPSagrLIUmycKgP5P5kSHky8efF9RGBfGTeWotdradHSCgCTm_MscvJUytZ1k_FnDKeStINO9jT7mho9k68fg-Ynua3j1FOabfWJOr-jamH6Cjf0/3ii/2PwkysBSQhiATb8Rk8zwaw/h1/kzJB892LAIefi9aIr__u6x6eS1BiA44WZYVMZAFlK10) clean_body: We’re expecting big news that could change everything next week. | | | Peter, Next week, we’re expecting news from the Tennessee General Assembly about redistricting — and we have to be prepared for whatever happens. Every 10 years, the General Assembly redraws the maps that determine our state and federal legislative districts. The GOP has threatened to gerrymander our district, because they know it will weaken the voice of Black, brown, and working class people in Nashville. Redistricting is an issue of civil rights, and our team needs to be able to respond to any map that comes out. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: This campaign has always been about giving voice and power to those who’ve been left behind for far too long. Representation that truly reflects the will of Nashville is central to that. Next week may be a major inflection point in this congressional campaign — which is exactly why we’re so grateful you’re with us, Peter. Thank you for your support, Odessa Kelly HQ | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 01/07/22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=1)
---
Friend, I don't want to release too much information but as a loyal supporter of our campaign, I wanted you to be among the first to know that I have a special announcement coming on Tuesday, January 11th! Keep a close eye on our social media pages and website for more details to come—but our path to fire J.B. Pritzker and renew our state with trusted leadership continues next week. Be sure to tune in next Tuesday! S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** Our first volunteer of the week to highlight in 2022 is our Rock Island County Director, Mike Steffen. In addition to doing a great job getting our signage out, Mike has also organized multiple events in the Quad Cities area. Mike, a fellow veteran, has been a volunteer and supporter since my 2014 AG campaign. Bravo Zulu, my friend! [****](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAEgxxaUss-YIHRZdj0D0G_MeF2Fl6dcwWsTzR_ThBChs&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=2)[If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=3)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA0oSVRPhjfRQslCfmWCorqE1dHtCkI4ScN4TrTx5OKuQ&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=4) [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA0oSVRPhjfRQslCfmWCorqE1dHtCkI4ScN4TrTx5OKuQ&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=5)[
](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=6)
* * *
**Get Involved** Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? **[Pitch in $5, $25, $50, or $100 NOW](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=7)** to help us share our major announcement with more voters across Illinois next week. Have a hand in helping our digital advertising efforts today! ___
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=8).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=9) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_01_07&n=11), software for leaders.
