[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=a45ff967c7224b6191b84457c4e82fbc&_e=x_rYEeHRvaHjQyCPCU_BCu8-u2thc09sjSk3o7iVxeCR_Cha4Si4uzmSmE_jEbux7F2EbP9OekbjZrW9FQ3K5eRkcN-s10ZIMIaWSMJIxZljAumYUGrIR9r6_mmwjLc63xR7nIKjxgJiGnAariUf7-GA5S0l77jAzgCIS8Zr1RXZWRaPTJyK0fD9QnYMFM5w7YFwfC1K0669BfecLM7gp4tUSoAeNufZn__7Ez3Oa-RwxwK-UZ7qLQSoCpedHJy4zGbuKPkCKat0IDq50HiCJA%3D%3D) Why Fiscal Conservatives Should Care about Abortion By Bobby Jindal If Republicans want to win elections, the coalition of pro-life and limited-government conservatives must continue to stand together. | |
---
Democrats are trying to convince themselves that a loss at the Supreme Court over the Mississippi law banning most abortions after 15 weeks of pregnancy would actually be a political win for them in the midterm elections. If the Court overturns the _Roe_ precedent creating a constitutionally protected right to abortion, their argument goes, the Democrats will reclaim the swing suburban voters they lost in the Virginia governor’s race. They believe that a legal setback on abortion would reenergize their dispirited base and donors, while lulling conservative activists into complacency.
**[_Read more_ at nationalreview.com](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=a45ff967c7224b6191b84457c4e82fbc&_e=x_rYEeHRvaHjQyCPCU_BCvhEOit0nDBl73Hg-KClSVILBsQb1Xcs90_dInTJyLSJB7cSB3lkbOXlwUsAdSt4o27DGAhCA105R-Xxjv3hxUTto43DTfLiVkG1tvSkMkG2X2sjV0s0-f5ZMcjmmk2KvfFFOh0K3r8tf21ctphmFigNffFY3QVt1p9FTi_33mZD0J7o-M-XViSH2H9Sc9REWXMwlN3dwqF7-u3OkAe0WQkud9ZrMPR0WYpqQl-Dj7FsKplLWJ28knNzHvuRnCXuT39ZguEzS4v7mtEGduFxeNQyMHgQzj8ehD7frxTWC2W3Yw262YIDyTgqNgjJDOAQdHkuXsPXX1_PKynTvXYHbms%3D)**.

Biden's Vaccine Idolatry is Not Working
By Bobby Jindal
President Biden won the White House promising to resolve the Covid crisis, and prematurely declared victory on July 4th so he could shift attention to his Build Back Better boondoggle. As America’s Covid deaths in his first year exceeded those in President Trump’s last year, liberals are eager to blame conservatives for refusing to “follow the science.” Biden has framed vaccination as self-evident patriotic duty — rather than a personal choice based on risk tolerance and individual circumstances — giving liberals another excuse to feel morally superior.
Today’s Supreme Court hearing on vaccine mandates for large companies and health care facilities provides an opportunity to give Americans the responsibility to make their own heath care decisions. As President Obama opposed health insurance mandates before he was for them, Biden once opposed vaccine mandates. Biden’s employer mandate in September conveniently allowed him to demonstrate executive action. His approval ratings had dropped to their then-lowest levels, thanks to the messy withdrawal from Afghanistan and rise in covid cases.
**[_Read more_ at realclearpolicy.com](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=a45ff967c7224b6191b84457c4e82fbc&_e=x_rYEeHRvaHjQyCPCU_BCrL4ZB_vlfVcmsMYeJeotce0Wq1KqphM3szkgbm41e6i9QIX9F_VK9DFR7OcNctLV1rQWajPMKDDOXB3doShmsAYToD-WzKSvloZg3yjWcuj8Clg766An-Q46iD7VBZvocIa0ylRSAfeCuK1-CVEGh1gwrB5l12hK3GZjNrxKu8V18U1ewB1qxyB6ZUBBTZCksL4Byf4qceu0k5q5NP_zC5SqCcnYlFIezhpD4x5CTOGc-cpBZqd1Lxg4QoGk851Pr3loRc5SKC5Z1SowAIwqU6CIVUpU6xgXc_9PS8s0X54WGkr7aCWzzwA_DCI6n-hesuRvvqTgfUsvstkC8N5kKQ%3D)**

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, I hope everyone had a happy and healthy Christmas and New Year’s. As we enter the new year, momentum continues to grow for Jane’s America First candidacy. With an exciting endorsement and encouraging new poll numbers, Jane is well-positioned to win this primary and deliver a victory in November. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Jane Timken Tied for First!** [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=7af57ca430104fd28ea1c3634a900741&_e=1QDoZ2-JxXG99brfNz1YiOjUR9S66uko6CjffBvHph3Zw_KZTSE56esnSydjIGE8zlj9buN1afVNgVqmi5gQA2XY4NrxSgp338wNHZzxTXoV_wYEYK596rEblUVnHrVnRbcdKIukcz-jd8Sq8c8TMFSem_Led-LuR-Lni0SxlixL8yJvJ1litWsVeEqXRjwuzKsfzjSJNvkBMl7cxvA47R2uoccHgynYip4Yg56Xgf-2M7NIoMLAd-fxkj0X9C80FEIh-zYGWjJv8GngRHOvFQ%3D%3D)
This morning the campaign released our latest internal polling showing Jane statistically tied with Josh Mandel in the May primary. As a first-time candidate, Jane has gutted Mandel’s early lead as Ohio primary voters coalesce around her as the fresh leader and true America First candidate they want in Washington.

Key findings of the poll include:

* Timken is now within a net point swing in the race - a statistical tie - as her ballot position, image, and statewide awareness continue to surge at the right time.
* This continued growth comes when two other candidates and two outside-aligned groups are spending more on paid advertising.
* The more Ohio voters learn about Timken, the more they like her, while Mandel has the reverse effect and continues to fall on the ballot.
* Mandel is vulnerable as Ohio voters are clearly looking for an alternative.
* Mandel's early lead was entirely a product of his perennial candidacies for public office since the 1990s and spending well over $50 million in past campaigns, but he continues to see a decline in his numbers and is underperforming relative to his name ID.
* JD Vance is underwater as his Never-Trump record continues to come to light.
* Vance is running in fifth place, despite a $10,000,000 Super PAC boost, and is the only candidate with a higher unfavorable than favorable rating.
* Mike Gibbons continues to remain relatively stagnant despite this being his second statewide campaign and spending a massive amount of money on paid advertising.

Read the full polling memo below.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=7af57ca430104fd28ea1c3634a900741&_e=1QDoZ2-JxXG99brfNz1YiGvuxqx2ey-yvTqHOCN827izqkRzs01zEJv5sWtS8elswi8hk1-y477Zm1OZ-SDCOvkQfYvddoGY5uPwHQjjoUpQ6yDLiADpSYLLG9Lb1TgqnEYup-jZhMO8kG6oenQoJsjfMtdSBljCAyMJLLJoEV4GGkYPTuLLwVO42R7bzayu03dnEGm3UPeSWUU4XDFHgVIdoSEiYSnrkD0p3vKHqFlS9uHpMwW3TiUwVPow7_lC4scLnd0lUsmKhSSXmSMRrWYL-ZT2iV83f6PslRmdf5WDyHdmNoj5qOagLnVnXI-0TIAQsizfXkLflpjCT2U6ndrX1WdByWCpLUW8q__FyynyPOqRFgFX2P1JhEXjjBLY)
**Media Roundup**
On Tuesday morning, Jane joined Steve Bannon’s War Room to announce the endorsement of Congresswoman and GOP Conference Chair Elise Stefanik.

Congresswoman Stefanik is a strong leader, unapologetic fighter, and a fierce ally of the America First movement. Stefanik, in her first endorsement of a Senate candidate, called Jane "a crucial team member in President Trump's fight to Make America Great Again." Jane was thrilled and honor to receiver her endorsement as Elise leads the charge on key issues to American families. Jane looks forward to standing shoulder to shoulder with Elise as they fire Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer and usher in a stronger, more prosperous America for all.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=7af57ca430104fd28ea1c3634a900741&_e=1QDoZ2-JxXG99brfNz1YiKWDAWMBQzan00BQqklMb62txMcfxL8Dnmm6Wuavk-pcMJ7LP5_aX5HcBzUHcFi6RzJMOXDmhym1FYLf4OTK6ipSen7RQFuzyiG8VrU_-ISYoMsESU2rkj7prhQY-3Ad3mRFdCEatCqQfAqgXtm0gn7-520gnY2xH42IXuLDwA-hVa2mKk86VR1x6OFrw4zaapvwG2TnI5-xNuJpZxJKQLX3WEbxKotjkZB3XNtkrc2KoV4HrYyThU97W0cbY_ZFrMAiUHhQVyjHVhWh_MM0L-m-kZX_g3KR1rLI1jzHwoWa6DFy7bBOnHAsypz_dfugCw%3D%3D)

Last month, the campaign launched Parents for Jane, a statewide grassroots coalition dedicated to highlighting Jane’s staunch support of Ohio parents, children, and families.

We were thrilled to announce our statewide Chair, State Representative Marilyn John, and our three Co-Chairs: Activist and Former Teacher Cathy Pultz, State Representative Bob Young, and State Senator Michael Rulli.

clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, I hope everyone had a happy and healthy Christmas and New Year’s. As we enter the new year, momentum continues to grow for Jane’s America First candidacy. With an exciting endorsement and encouraging new poll numbers, Jane is well-positioned to win this primary and deliver a victory in November. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. Jane Timken Tied for First! This morning the campaign released our latest internal polling showing Jane statistically tied with Josh Mandel in the May primary. As a first-time candidate, Jane has gutted Mandel’s early lead as Ohio primary voters coalesce around her as the fresh leader and true America First candidate they want in Washington. Key findings of the poll include: Timken is now within a net point swing in the race - a statistical tie - as her ballot position, image, and statewide awareness continue to surge at the right time. This continued growth comes when two other candidates and two outside-aligned groups are spending more on paid advertising. The more Ohio voters learn about Timken, the more they like her, while Mandel has the reverse effect and continues to fall on the ballot. Mandel is vulnerable as Ohio voters are clearly looking for an alternative. Mandel's early lead was entirely a product of his perennial candidacies for public office since the 1990s and spending well over $50 million in past campaigns, but he continues to see a decline in his numbers and is underperforming relative to his name ID. JD Vance is underwater as his Never-Trump record continues to come to light. Vance is running in fifth place, despite a $10,000,000 Super PAC boost, and is the only candidate with a higher unfavorable than favorable rating. Mike Gibbons continues to remain relatively stagnant despite this being his second statewide campaign and spending a massive amount of money on paid advertising. Read the full polling memo below. John, and Mrs. Pultz as we gather to talk about our school systems and issues important to parents across Ohio. We have challenges in front of us, but Alabamians know that’s just an opportunity to overcome. Working together, we’ll save the country we know and love for our children and our children’s children. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=d3522b7035814d2184fed50d2316fa7c&_e=v3YWCHe4ggfd6ppR9zkTW-EklOxRzohUYmnD_JLR6Tzgahy_tKAhnibj-eMzjgbar08B8lBMZp48rYKxTzVfagv0FScgy88bG6RpShDeTNvGoDqTdofdSxh77XVtAH_n5AYxHSiOQ5oZklA5RPpHCDapu6nNAGmsHG7tuqWCZzAd3LcwM6zGjgeTzd9Ph_HBeftS0ZYFUKzuvE3T9oyIe1ABK44UOcObqV3dvSSgtzUxmW0uw-AGQj8UjWURxdJUajicMhmRjApRNEf8lR_6ONaqaxaehK3MHD8R1tjDh7I%3D) **Britt Campaign’s Efforts from 2021 and Momentum into 2022** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=d3522b7035814d2184fed50d2316fa7c&_e=v3YWCHe4ggfd6ppR9zkTW-EklOxRzohUYmnD_JLR6TwpcrYFtu0q73277gT2CIuY1Ae4bmV0EkTYZEnMXWkqJo_ihDyd8__QLm2RuxiJviJjagMQTHUBH-k-zEXqoJAitGTxcduC5vyRaEYT8ghl26oWJ4nNNrTzGbkfFUFdWk00D1yYtXx-mCHz8HI1Mc7k0L-2AbDaVTVEI-HpG4Ij-ngd-8-NlufS06bg2hNobtKVf4reqiZIJpF6fF8UFmhM4sEcW01tU7pruE8aJdGjcuptvuJy0_NWHUKw9yqN-P-VxGJ5hWgc4miKDDFFAL1f) Our grassroots campaign built the momentum in 2021, and now it’s time to finish strong in the second half of this race! Together, we will ensure Alabama is always put first and that every community across our state has a seat at the table. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=d3522b7035814d2184fed50d2316fa7c&_e=v3YWCHe4ggfd6ppR9zkTW-EklOxRzohUYmnD_JLR6TwpcrYFtu0q73277gT2CIuY1Ae4bmV0EkTYZEnMXWkqJo_ihDyd8__QLm2RuxiJviKbB5KLjE8EOZ-yRk0rLd10GxP8rdchg3jHz2zGRh0iKvDjAdoBvQ9rmYSvYyXvUqeJtMC3flFFCjWMtJjSH8Hy8SnY1UtA6ideCFWCZwwWczFM1FlDKlt_JkjukBZ1Bp7Om0J9u_cHWDjobWX3_aCmGcf4anV2AnhSpHvKcB3r7-cca6eBx_u2tL07-ZQjQCNK0qjHJfGKYUOCCc9t_ldv) ****Katie Britt on Border Security**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=d3522b7035814d2184fed50d2316fa7c&_e=v3YWCHe4ggfd6ppR9zkTW-EklOxRzohUYmnD_JLR6Tzv5UPk3ubn0xxcRPiQduYGff6QWqcE-gONRgVnmWgVqyG7AhMpkPGyQknpPAKRb-tABUa4TxYpw2JLGo8wnBbnrPA2m7x_BNCQd2EZ28zqJwHA21KCWJ0Yre9PADgHvOc6kjeG085ocY1XMRu9xY8ADHMGgXzIyn2cpVr5Weri3m2rNop7diTNkbiUt5fhQHi7x76mm8LMejwoEzQc233oNgWLTGWytZUGGF681nsiOwwS45ht7VdxJbDfOZpXC2I%3D) We need to secure the border and uphold the rule of law in order to end the national security and humanitarian crisis that we continue to see under the Biden Administration. We’re going to work harder than ever through May 24 to spread our message. Together, we will win this important race and preserve the American Dream! clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Happy New Year from the Britt Family! From my family to yours, Happy New Year! We have challenges in front of us, but Alabamians know that’s just an opportunity to overcome. Working together, we’ll save the country we know and love for our children and our children’s children. Britt Campaign’s Efforts from 2021 and Momentum into 2022 Our grassroots campaign built the momentum in 2021, and now it’s time to finish strong in the second half of this race! Together, we will ensure Alabama is always put first and that every community across our state has a seat at the table. **Katie Britt on Border Security We need to secure the border and uphold the rule of law in order to end the national security and humanitarian crisis that we continue to see under the Biden Administration. I discussed this recently with The Trussville Tribune -- watch here: Katie Becomes the First Republican U.S. Senate Candidate I was happy to become the first Republican candidate to qualify to serve as Alabama’s next U.S. Senator! We’re going to work harder than ever through May 24 to spread our message. Together, we will win this important race and preserve the American Dream! Katie on the Campaign Trail Great time visiting Archie’s Bar-B-Q & Burgers (at the former Golden Rule location) in Hoover this week! Always enjoy seeing Mayor Frank Brocato and supporting Alabama’s tremendous small businesses on the campaign trail. Have you gotten your limited-edition blue Katie Britt hat? ACT FAST to get your hands on the official hat and show your support for Katie in 2022! Snag yours today before they sell out: . Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: **TEXT "KATIE" TO 484848 Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Cheri Beasley HQ
subject: Ted Budd is loyal to Trump — not North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#

Friends -
Just a year ago, Ted Budd voted against certifying the presidential election and doubled down on far-right conspiracy theories, and Donald Trump and his special interest allies are repaying his loyalty by getting involved in this race to try to make sure he wins.
That’s why Donald Trump gave Ted Budd his “complete and total endorsement” and recently held a fundraiser for him at Mar-a-Lago — no doubt raking in tons of max-out checks from Trump’s wealthy friends and special interest donors.
Trump and Madison Cawthorn held a meeting about how to influence our race. Scheming to help ensure Ted Budd wins.
It’s clear that Trump and his allies are willing to spend and say whatever it takes to try to send their hand-picked candidate to the Senate. So it is up to all of us to stop them.
**[Make a $3 donation right now to help us fight back and flip North Carolina. Our opponents will stop at nothing to win, and we cannot take on their lies, smears and conspiracy theories without a lot of grassroots support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220107-1-ma-t1&refcode2=241.357359._QgfPE&t=1&akid=241%2E357359%2E_QgfPE)**

subject: re: our facebook ads

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1973%2E3611125%2EwOP7t2 ][IMG]

Hey y'all—it’s Tevin, Tim’s Digital Communications Director.

I’m hopping into your inbox because we need your help STAT.

My job is virtually all online—so trust me when I say I know what works on
Facebook and what doesn’t—and let me tell you, our ads are killing it.
Just look at this one that has raised almost double what it cost to place
it:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6433?t=1011&amount=35&akid=1973%2E3611125%2EwOP7t2 ]Tim GIF

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6433?t=1012&amount=35&akid=1973%2E3611125%2EwOP7t2 ]Donate to keep this ad running >>

Now that’s a return on investment! But if we want these ads to continue
raking in cash and grabbing folks’ attention, we need your help to keep
them up and running. That’s why we’ve set an ambitious $15,000 Ads Fund
goal.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6432?t=1007&akid=1973%2E3611125%2EwOP7t2 ]Can you chip in $35 toward our Ads Fund so we can continue delivering
online ads and expand our reach?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6433?t=1013&amount=35&akid=1973%2E3611125%2EwOP7t2 ]Chip in to our Ads Fund >>

I’ll give it to you straight, folks, Tim’s GOP opponents have a
super aggressive ads strategy and they’re not hesitating to use every
trick in the book—no matter how dirty.

We’ve got a great digital staff here at Team Ryan, so I promise you our
ads will cut through the noise and help fight back against the GOP’s
attacks—but only with your help.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6432?t=1008&akid=1973%2E3611125%2EwOP7t2 ]Every ad will make a difference in a race this close. Can we count on
you to donate $35 (or more!) so we can keep our ads up and running?

body:
Meet Ed and the Team in Saco - 2:00pm | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=f8a0a76a2b&u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=0a2932c37e)

---
|
# _Ed Thelander for Congress - District 1, will be at the Golden Rooster this Saturday. Please stop in for a bite to eat and a beverage, and sign Ed's nomination papers to put him on the ballot._

## **Saturday, January 8th, 2022
2 PM to 4 PM
Golden Rooster
236 Main Street, Saco, ME 04072 **
While you are there, please find a member of Team Thelander to collect your signature for the Ballot Petitions, and take home a yard sign and bumper sticker while supplies last.
We need your help spreading the word! Together, let's make sure everyone in your community has a chance to sign and support my run to represent Maine's First Congressional District.

2022 is starting strong! Let's show Maine, and the nation, that we're ready to send common sense, integrity and honesty to the office, and return liberty and economic prosperity to the people.
---
|
Ed Thelander

[](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=bb4434204e&e=f8a0a76a2b)

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Great call 💚
body:
Hi there, I just had a great call with one of my donors. We chatted for awhile, and one of the things she said really stuck out to me: "Billionaires need to have their route for escaping from Earth removed." I couldn’t agree more. What we need to address climate catastrophe isn’t escaping and ruining another planet to satisfy our greed. It’s ending fossil fuels by 2030 and rapidly transitioning to 100% renewable energy. [**I’m the only candidate in my race who supports the Green New Deal and ending the fossil fuel industry. Can you chip in a couple bucks to help me fight for that in Congress? clean_body: Hi there, I just had a great call with one of my donors. We chatted for awhile, and one of the things she said really stuck out to me: "Billionaires need to have their route for escaping from Earth removed." I couldn’t agree more. What we need to address climate catastrophe isn’t escaping and ruining another planet to satisfy our greed. It’s ending fossil fuels by 2030 and rapidly transitioning to 100% renewable energy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = The climate crisis is urgent. Over 1,000 people died during the Pacific Northwest heat wave last summer. Over 1 billion sea creatures were cooked to death. The time to act is NOW, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. If you can, please join our thousands of donors with a quick donation right now: = Thank you, -Rebecca Parson Candidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to: Rebecca for Washington PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States Paid for by Rebecca for Washington If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7d48e94bdcc44594ba3ef4b968e0d6f5&_e=VOmZ9p99D0txiDDYmE4Xoqzh3-WIwXI0aF-HxUBcYqJvd3dBJPh43c2qHNWyCaX2Fh5QH8FXzGSJwXc9UB5b_FxO3V_2eqUI5QCElWqyUDs2iGPVex88JblYEC-8_dMOlQoz6x7HEwWhyU0q9fVxtVSbUwUqZoEPdnPJuSC0XAj7n_0O2eu4w5jf4DHcE5FOT1KU37zOAwGgbmQthw8gQD_RNrJzu6LPTowRBQsYoTfvoiKSU3GB3ODzMfFqZ-jck-K9RaL57F9wjSgJxVrBZBegB8IiwF9XEYgJ31OnNfpmLT5Wxcs2Up4tQK6flnva96BB0AQXlEi5tghrAJXGqVuFuyIYDrEcYep9rtU5kBCrLgkbxLlu6YyOiutg-MVZZVZDqVlC-E6dLYCuG3TmE9pJ6w8mRlx1z05TZwAKeiY%3D) | |

**Resolutions For The New Year 📆**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7d48e94bdcc44594ba3ef4b968e0d6f5&_e=VOmZ9p99D0txiDDYmE4XohK_GujCo1xAArUFPM8cvMwYAb8jGCVKkTxLfjhgxayGxkgujPUjQxwQ3RkwfhZeI8H-LsVY8ednX4A6ihECCzqaX7eKJj4hTDXeseTDhljtJAzlGMAEWtN5iMB5TOz6EwD89R8Uv1K6HG3eyMTfy0I5EDqkBGvmlXbn8W2A9myEvZTyfeTSqDei5bXx6PS8KYtJQsXcWKTQ4lZ50ebAlyLWJ2ObMq6Jv0dbRnxeMBjtNJ6fbPru-PuY_DkQMi4F8Cb_rDpWVYSoc2gT15AKapI%3D)
It’s the first TimTalk of the New Year, and I thought it would only be appropriate to list my resolutions for 2022. We can also take a look at how my conservative resolutions stack up against my colleagues’.
**Tim’s Resolutions**

🇺🇸 Pass a real budget

🇺🇸 Secure our border

🇺🇸 Lift restrictions and mandates to get our economy going again

🇺🇸 Take back the House AND Senate
**Liberal Resolutions**

**❌** Ignore record-breaking inflation

❌ Pass budget-busting spending bills

❌ Continue to restrict freedom through mandates and lockdowns

❌ Keep Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House
I’m going to go out on a limb and say my conservative, pro-freedom resolutions are better for America. What do you think?

Democrats are determined to grow the size of government, mandate the heck out of our daily lives, raise prices through the roof, and then tell us we need even _more_ government to solve the problems that government created in the first place. No thank you!

That’s why it’s absolutely essential that we fulfill our resolution to take back the House AND Senate in November and put a stop to their big-government, anti-common sense agenda once and for all.
|
---
**Happy Birthday To A Tennessee Legend 🎸**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=7d48e94bdcc44594ba3ef4b968e0d6f5&_e=VOmZ9p99D0txiDDYmE4Xok854PNRoQuNkXVjDPI9CLlCNzwbNLAWFg-vREZ-UrdTsmMGQOYmwCaRMuBuPeYRN1ZN4cVqbhm6Yyhte-K23Q5jLNYEP99YaOcITav-vpifNI4vGcYaFJi1v9pimrnPhZeWgBA2Or3hCrNHrjbyejsG_fnIp9mBGbnki2fpzD1tx54AT1jv8ywsAIhZjSaTfMVBY-emm0tZaXqCBiO9Nav2HYXFNqx725FF6xooQl8OvN1LkPmwui2djTozosAdsOxIv3pbzaNcnqZQ7-c1Sk1RrHIY17nL1T0NJM4P4L9cbDM4i4uHdKT5PNUImHr2Eky1IxLjVM8LlAcY9gG1y1YbY9vjC3rcC_SX_x5y55gcXNiWL1OJxQM-y7iT8IwQGw%3D%3D)
_Image courtesy of ABC News_
When you think of famous people from Tennessee, it’s a toss-up between the one and only Dolly Parton and the “King of Rock and Roll,” a.k.a. Elvis Presley. Born in Mississippi, Elvis moved to Memphis with his family at age 13. He became one of the most recognizable people in history and the best-selling solo music artist in the world.

Elvis is well known for his music, his hair, and his dance moves, but was also drafted into the U.S. Army, where he served as a private in Fort Chaffee, Arkansas and in Friedberg, Germany in the 3rd Armored Division.

He left his stamp on American music and influenced generations of Tennessee musicians, making Tennessee a powerhouse in the music industry.

Tomorrow, Elvis would have turned 87. Happy birthday to a Tennessee legend!
|
---

name: Team Matt and Cynthia
subject: We're fired up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
We don’t know about you, but we’re fired up about
2022!

It’s officially the election year, and with months until election day,
we’ve got a lot of ground to cover in order to share with voters about
Matt and Cynthia’s campaign to build a Rhode Island for all.

We’re going to organize every neighborhood, knock on thousands of doors,
and mobilize a truly historic campaign to oust a corrupt political
establishment and pass big, bold, progressive policies that won’t leave
anyone behind.

And unlike our competitors, we’re going to do it all without accepting a
single penny from corporate PACs, fossil fuel companies, or corporate
lobbyists.

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3436?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]This is the year we win! Can we count on you to make
your first contribution to our
campaign? It doesn’t have to be big, because when a lot of
people give what they can, it really adds up.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3437?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3438?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]CHIP IN $27 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3439?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3440?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3441?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3436?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

It’s painfully clear that our current leadership is not interested in
addressing the many crises our state faces. It took almost three weeks of
Matt, Cynthia, and more than 100 activists sleeping out in front of the
State House to force Gov. McKee’s administration to act on Rhode Island’s
crisis of homelessness.

Now, election year is here, and we’re going to face steep opposition from
the establishment. They’re amassing a huge political war chest of campaign
donations to try and stop us.

That’s why we need you to make your first
contribution to our campaign. We’re
building our power from the grassroots up, not the other way around.
Please pitch in right now to help get the election year off to a strong
start.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3437?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3438?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]CHIP IN $27 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3440?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1013&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3441?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220107_PM1_V1_S1&t=1014&akid=341%2E43343%2EG4NnDH ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

name: Sign the Card
subject: re: Michelle Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Be sure to add your name soon!
| | | Team -- Michelle Obama's birthday is**just days away** , and we've selected YOU to sign our official birthday card for the former first lady!

We want to show our appreciation for Michelle’s heroic work raising awareness on key issues and serving as a role model for kids across America with a card signed by **thousands** of fellow Democrats -- but our records indicate that **you have NOT yet signed your name!**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: New polling has us up by ONE POINT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Peter,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b9bd7371418b4516b50c8d060dc2df32&_e=MqX_81xD1J2VGdXeYezHIMK_lZwW2GZu63P84PYeJLuLjuQg6fqpvncgQ4_HcnK52dmNcfbXrysazS9vbV5w2WV0B5d0wOwZ9Q6yKRcE4kcEiu8t_vI6Sv-y8-li583jdd6Si3kvr8Yjctn4mHblg3QtazFUZ_Ssok1_RAGzykWUXdXqJ2DulImOA16dEb-GkKblXktJWV0Rdn5XgbXG4j-qORoXOG345hTQApxJ4gvYubX2wXMQehzL0d6rTsF9ZMF8aXvHI5wH5Ue5njd_NiM_5683mwOm7IW1KD5nI7N33_g5xvMVD6dTvRpMTZOnaobWWihpxX86Qb8jM2fVqhrPKHFzgHBqWgkgvg-mqWkmu_jovedPWqD__njg-gEflM2alkNJt3OgC9cXtTm1bTRNE4-Z8AQ4l_-KE9NpsRbzuvI0kAkE7U0buaMGDjGxMvU2KokUYNzr0JnCN2JZ4Q%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b9bd7371418b4516b50c8d060dc2df32&_e=MqX_81xD1J2VGdXeYezHIMK_lZwW2GZu63P84PYeJLuLjuQg6fqpvncgQ4_HcnK52dmNcfbXrysazS9vbV5w2WV0B5d0wOwZ9Q6yKRcE4kcEiu8t_vI6Sv-y8-li583jdd6Si3kvr8Yjctn4mHblg3QtazFUZ_Ssok1_RAGzykWUXdXqJ2DulImOA16dEb-GkKblXktJWV0Rdn5XgbXG4j-qORoXOG345hTQApxJ4gvYubX2wXMQehzL0d6rTsF9mKtXBCexo45vEKhCCNUJrrFU-rNShzl48Yx946NDtTfMXIdwWOWRZQWBiy4vniVk0I5StT66-XLVS6r_vnrcqmEzuoea8DnnEyvzPW_CPrPBl5ZUhnTZ866666ocMZ6dnYaUo_g4hXLLBo3gl5DS7wpJ03DK93n2ySXkDSoBVMj5H1c9s2sdLstuOWAjT9ZbwJE-Tu6g5NkS5duDldK6gw%3D%3D)**

We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. _**[Can we count on you to act now?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b9bd7371418b4516b50c8d060dc2df32&_e=MqX_81xD1J2VGdXeYezHIMK_lZwW2GZu63P84PYeJLuLjuQg6fqpvncgQ4_HcnK52dmNcfbXrysazS9vbV5w2WV0B5d0wOwZ9Q6yKRcE4kcEiu8t_vI6Sv-y8-li583jdd6Si3kvr8Yjctn4mHblg3QtazFUZ_Ssok1_RAGzykWUXdXqJ2DulImOA16dEb-GkKblXktJWV0Rdn5XgbXG4j-qORoXOG345hTQApxJ4gvYubX2wXMQehzL0d6rTsF9TwvBc0KOwCGPVInn1_43CvofgIOTPv1uNGbqGuOBPS0WkSC3AyADYhtzBaa_QgO1AMOfuvJtZUrlQJrE56jFSVFmZjeqwcgvKWeR6IzIlQlt_AYvAdlaI49Q-ZPkGzYSVCnoajifpWUuVrVoNKfgFjmyTLLvW68FFb5fDX1TALWPoRd-BZl7NZNDesRVM46pcOEUayMf9dQP0ecAvkHzYg%3D%3D)**_

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Peter, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Bridget Barton
subject: One Thing for Working Parents and School Kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridget Barton for Oregon
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/49c8290ab728e9f2/9e1d0d6ad50c35c6c3d6b838967d376c/37693)
---
Peter, The year just started and some schools in Oregon are already closing their doors and reverting to stress-inducing online schooling. We can’t have a state full of parents always wondering if their kids’ school will be closed tomorrow. If we don’t elect a Republican governor, there is no end in sight for this uncertainty. I’m a mom and soon to be a grandmother. I know what it’s like to be a working parent.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/49c8290ab728e9f2/6ef085a28f87f224c3d6b838967d376c/37693)
---
If we can give our working parents and school kids one thing this year—it’s certainty that when I’m Oregon’s Governor, the schools will be OPEN. Parents can make their OWN choices for their OWN children about masks and vaccines. Kids will focus on _learning_. Without a Republican governor, we can expect another four years of these endless rolling closures. Can I count on you, Peter, to help me give certainty to Oregon parents? [**Please rush a grassroots donation of $5, $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can right now to help! >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/d87bb1bf48eb013366a6b3c4b83ff292/37693/49c8290ab728e9f2/2874811f147cbb3fc3d6b838967d376c/37693) ** ** In 2022 we can stand up and stop the leftists from jerking around our parents and kids. They’ve had ENOUGH. Chip in today. Thanks for your vital help,
Bridget Barton

body:
The latest news from the Republican Party of Wisconsin

| | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_1_7_2022_v3&n=1)
---
### January 7, 2022
Friend -- From all of us at the Republican Party of Wisconsin, Happy New Year to you and yours! After laying the foundation for success throughout 2021, we are excited to finally reach 2022 and enter a critical Election Year – one that will determine party control of our governor’s office, U.S. House, and U.S. Senate. And of course, it all starts right here in Wisconsin. 2021 was about making inroads and laying the groundwork for victory ahead of 2022. Now, our focus is on winning – which means supporting conservative candidates in April’s local elections, ramping up our ground game efforts, opening new offices, and connecting with communities across the state. You can read more updates about our efforts below. As always, thank you for all that you do. \- Team WisGOP |

This year’s event will be held at the Marriott West in Middleton, Wisconsin on May 20-22 – and we are excited to have our great candidates make their cases and take their messages directly to the grassroots GOP. 2021 was a rough year for Tony Evers. First, Evers’ tax-and-spend budget of liberal priorities, including a $1 billion tax hike, was stopped in its tracks thanks to Republicans in the Legislature, so Evers spent the remainder of 2021 touting one of his biggest campaign promises – the Liberal Maps Commission. body:
Join me on January 26th! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0ded01a907f6/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-6618174?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=8e7009c11a&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Friend,

Did you hear?

You’re invited to join me as I kick off my 2022 campaign for Congress!

It will be a fun evening filled with wine, friends, and politics. Most importantly, it’ll be an evening where you can find out how YOU can help turn our state and nation around.
****

**Date: January 26th
Time: 5-8pm
Location: Tumwater Vineyards, 375 SW Barrel House Way West Linn, Oregon 97068
RSVP: [alex@lorichavezderemer.com ](mailto:alex@lorichavezderemer.com)**
The new year has begun and so it is time to get down to business.

Make sure to clear your schedules for January 26th so we can discuss the bright, conservative future we can build for Oregon together.

See you there!

Thank you,
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
